I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.

They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.

It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. **I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again.**

**[I can’t do it without your support, Peter. Can I count on you to chip in to my reelection campaign and Upset the Setup and become a Founding Donor today so I can get back to work fighting for regular folks like you and me?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59164132/393404447/-2027916988?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230223_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExMGMzYTJlLWQ2YjMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dtJZYU5xTurBLWm9SmGRJK9jw5PNWqw4hVQUhNKZZzs=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, I have an exciting announcement and I want you to be the first to know: I’m officially running for reelection here in Montana. I know this race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t done yet. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | = = = = = I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago. They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running. It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: = = = = = I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected. It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. Peter, The latest estimate of illegal border crossings since Joe Biden took office sits at **FIVE MILLION.**[**That’s more illegal aliens than there are people living in Alabama.**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0b1f53d772ef41ef9f43802e39b05a7d&_e=Hu1RLXJApl539nvKzrFGUbfK_aUDKZENC4fUeX5nSc88seZWSOQ88U60iDl0tcNTYKB678isL7fWPHBfudeG9fwq0ImfjavfIochpfW_xtRr8Q11MT-kIj7zP2Wyev9L6Ufd5cv22CBI4wEqMWzW2AB8kIkr7aPqP6Z0y80mBxpINm3Jnko9uCuNNZvHs7VSA8GCeOh_rRIl_l0dtTmO32FdlB153DEee3B_-UgHtww-efhsHKK1UE8dOVakz4i7BmstegIWrLwXna7WyYuFXw4yx2Ze9AGsoGbzRGRP7YI3NDgLrThKuENkh1TUsZTsQ6TeJnVRzhmAYSx8i7tQU8ULY8a3uYygSthLQFrg5Fng151hEvzgIXjBt16Uzrs7l0UwFO0oNE6yxqzKdGy2MuqyZXvzvkBmALkTQLOezztGWlxH9hIKTy9qQ9oU_7gt) It’s clear that we have a crisis, but Joe Biden is _nowhere to be seen_. He continues to pretend that there is no problem on our border, and **[refuses to even visit for anything more than a photo-op!](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0b1f53d772ef41ef9f43802e39b05a7d&_e=Hu1RLXJApl539nvKzrFGUbfK_aUDKZENC4fUeX5nSc88seZWSOQ88U60iDl0tcNTYKB678isL7fWPHBfudeG9fwq0ImfjavfIochpfW_xtRr8Q11MT-kIj7zP2Wyev9L6Ufd5cv22CBI4wEqMWzW2AB8kIkr7aPqP6Z0y80mBxpINm3Jnko9uCuNNZvHs7VSA8GCeOh_rRIl_l0dtTmO32FdlB153DEee3B_-UgHtww-efhsHKK1UE8dOVakz4i7BmstegIWrLwXna7WyYuFXw4yx2Ze9AGsoGbzRGRP7YIdy7KJV_KyzVMa3kUtq4E3hyFC80Bov3HNxA6xLf1Tk-O-EeIdIVp0WQE3fbBl97mtaurnqt2-JHN8S9BUyI0FYzauytn7jPHIvoXZQk3CGeysMJC5AjXl8vVzyBV8HEQY08NyfzhBkG4p1Sh5a7Dp)** When Katie visited the border earlier this year, she was **APPALLED** at Biden’s negligence. We have a humanitarian and national security crisis, but the President is AWOL!

[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0b1f53d772ef41ef9f43802e39b05a7d&_e=Hu1RLXJApl539nvKzrFGUbfK_aUDKZENC4fUeX5nSc88seZWSOQ88U60iDl0tcNTYKB678isL7fWPHBfudeG9fwq0ImfjavfIochpfW_xtRr8Q11MT-kIj7zP2Wyev9L6Ufd5cv22CBI4wEqMWzW2AB8kIkr7aPqP6Z0y80mBxpINm3Jnko9uCuNNZvHs7VSA8GCeOh_rRIl_l0dtTmO32FdlB153DEee3B_-UgHtww-efhsHKK1UE8dOVakz4i7BmstegIWrLwXna7WyYuFXw4yx2Ze9AGsoGbzRGRP7YKyl8HFDLG3dwVQCXaClm9eIW1muub9YQDeKnrktZqPRrclXO9KOKqpWMQW0ueAn_FOjRblWEJBhI_ExR6Wtp3Pt-QR-RC3DHma9A2GO92ME7d-w7szumOtyeLcVYrFsLxPFpDl0pjlJaxgqo8xEwSX)

name: Susie Lee (personal)
subject: I’m asking you to join me in this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59164925/393417327/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230223_FR_NAOB_A0_NA_U2_X2_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjFhYTg1ZC1kYWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-bThO3BRuNsFAP5lqUgEAMoOzIGnC5K666Pzlpqo1ks=) After a tough re-election in a battleground district, I’m honored to be representing Nevada’s Third District once again and serve my third term in the House of Representatives. I’m about to **[ask for you to chip in $5 to help keep Nevada blue and continue building the movement that demands progress for our state,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59164926/393417328/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230223_FR_NAOB_A0_NA_U2_X2_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjFhYTg1ZC1kYWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-bThO3BRuNsFAP5lqUgEAMoOzIGnC5K666Pzlpqo1ks=)** but first I want to tell you why this work is so important to me. I was born in Canton, Ohio. My father was a military veteran who worked at a steel plant and my mother had her hands full raising myself and my seven siblings. _You read that right -- there were 8 of us._ I started working a paper route at the age of eight, and I fondly remember going to swim practice after school everyday because it was the one sport where my mom could drop all of us off at once. I graduated from a public high school and worked my way through college, at times working three and four jobs. I’ll be honest: Growing up in a working family in the middle of Ohio wasn’t dazzling, **but it taught me a lot about how a hard-working family can succeed when we have institutions that uplift everyone -- not just those at the top.** When I moved to Las Vegas as an adult, I knew I wanted to work to improve public education and create more opportunities for children to become involved in sports. I know firsthand how instrumental education and after-school programming are in setting children up for success -- and I made it my mission to make that opportunity more equitable. But after decades of working in the nonprofit sector, I saw how critical public policy is to every level of success for the families and children I was working with. Washington was failing to take action on the issues these folks needed addressed most _\-- and they needed it to happen yesterday._ They need stronger, more equitable public education where your zip code didn’t determine the quality of your school or how much your teachers were paid. They need a livable wage and workers’ rights that allow them to work in a safe environment. They need access to quality health care that won’t force them to choose between going to see a doctor and buying groceries. **So I ran for Congress in the most competitive district in Nevada to fight for hardworking families and with the help of this team, we won.** I’m fighting each and every day to improve the quality of our public education, protect our environment against climate change, and make health care an accessible reality for ALL Americans. And now that Republicans control the House, we have to push that much harder to make progress. **Here’s where I need your help:** In order to continue this fight, I need to win re-election in Nevada’s most competitive Congressional district. Nevada was a battleground state in the midterm elections, and _Trump campaigned to flip my district the most because he knows he can --**he won it in 2016.**_ National Republicans spent more than $14 million attacking me in 2022, and while they weren’t successful in taking back this district -- they closed the margin of victory and made NV-03 one of the closest toss-up seats in the nation. That’s why I’m asking for your help -- early money is critical in an incumbent campaign in order to fend off interest from the NRCC and dark money super PACs. [**I want to continue fighting for Nevada families -- who have worked hard but Washington hasn’t worked nearly hard enough for them. So what do you say? Will you chip in $5 to help me defend this battleground district and support a fight that believes EVERYONE deserves a chance?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59164927/393417329/-1907207781?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230223_FR_NAOB_A0_NA_U2_X2_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjFhYTg1ZC1kYWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-bThO3BRuNsFAP5lqUgEAMoOzIGnC5K666Pzlpqo1ks=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59164928/393417330/-1907207781?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230223_FR_NAOB_A0_NA_U2_X2_M1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjFhYTg1ZC1kYWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-bThO3BRuNsFAP5lqUgEAMoOzIGnC5K666Pzlpqo1ks=)

clean_body: | | | = After a tough re-election in a battleground district, I’m honored to be representing Nevada’s Third District once again and serve my third term in the House of Representatives. I’m about to = but first I want to tell you why this work is so important to me. I was born in Canton, Ohio. My father was a military veteran who worked at a steel plant and my mother had her hands full raising myself and my seven siblings. You read that right -- there were 8 of us. I started working a paper route at the age of eight, and I fondly remember going to swim practice after school everyday because it was the one sport where my mom could drop all of us off at once. I graduated from a public high school and worked my way through college, at times working three and four jobs. I’ll be honest: Growing up in a working family in the middle of Ohio wasn’t dazzling, but it taught me a lot about how a hard-working family can succeed when we have institutions that uplift everyone -- not just those at the top. When I moved to Las Vegas as an adult, I knew I wanted to work to improve public education and create more opportunities for children to become involved in sports. I know firsthand how instrumental education and after-school programming are in setting children up for success -- and I made it my mission to make that opportunity more equitable. But after decades of working in the nonprofit sector, I saw how critical public policy is to every level of success for the families and children I was working with. Washington was failing to take action on the issues these folks needed addressed most \-- and they needed it to happen yesterday. They need stronger, more equitable public education where your zip code didn’t determine the quality of your school or how much your teachers were paid. They need a livable wage and workers’ rights that allow them to work in a safe environment. They need access to quality health care that won’t force them to choose between going to see a doctor and buying groceries. So I ran for Congress in the most competitive district in Nevada to fight for hardworking families and with the help of this team, we won. I’m fighting each and every day to improve the quality of our public education, protect our environment against climate change, and make health care an accessible reality for ALL Americans. And now that Republicans control the House, we have to push that much harder to make progress. Here’s where I need your help: In order to continue this fight, I need to win re-election in Nevada’s most competitive Congressional district. Nevada was a battleground state in the midterm elections, and Trump campaigned to flip my district the most because he knows he can --he won it in 2016. National Republicans spent more than $14 million attacking me in 2022, and while they weren’t successful in taking back this district -- they closed the margin of victory and made NV-03 one of the closest toss-up seats in the nation. That’s why I’m asking for your help -- early money is critical in an incumbent campaign in order to fend off interest from the NRCC and dark money super PACs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for believing in us, Susie | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . I'm writing to you because this email is your **very last chance** to support our two-day On Notice Flash Fund — an ambitious **$100,000 goal** to help defeat anti-choice House Republicans in 2024.

The MAGA GOP has been in the House majority for less than two months, and we've already seen them pass extreme anti-choice bills, threaten to decimate our social safety net, and prove themselves unfit to govern. If we want to flip the House next year — and I believe we must — defeating these Republicans is our best shot. name: =?utf-8?Q?Lori=20Chavez=2DDeRemer?=
subject: A reminder of what unites us as Americans
body:
We can work together... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0722e8395881/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8117387?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=49384147f4&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Peter

_**Biden’s State of the Union address is a reminder of what unites us as Americans._We have much more in common than what divides us, and I am dedicated to rising above partisan bickering and delivering results for the people of Oregon and all Americans._**_

I strongly believe that we can work together to achieve great things for our country.

By **supporting American-made products** , we can improve our nation's infrastructure, create good-paying jobs, and strengthen our economy. We can also counter China by bolstering our domestic supply chain and demonstrating cooperation across party lines.

**Tackling the fentanyl crisis** , which is impacting communities across Oregon and the country, must also be a top priority. It's imperative that the administration presents a concrete and timely plan to address this urgent issue.

**Our veterans deserve quality care and recognition.** During my time as mayor, I led the effort to build a local veterans' memorial, and I am committed to working with Congress and the executive branch to help service members transition to civilian life, address mental health issues, and empower our veterans and their families.

[_**Oregonians in the 5th District want to see less partisanship and more results. I am dedicated to being a part of the solution. Are you ready to join the fight as we work towards a brighter future for our state and our country? >>>**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=e5e1487a18&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=1b64727443&e=c87c5d8d97 "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| Together, we can rise above the partisan bickering and deliver results for the people of Oregon.

Thank you,

[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=76bc45a661&e=c87c5d8d97)
Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05

subject: Can I count on you to renew your 2023 DNC membership today?→
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our country. But our work is far from over, and Democrats are counting on this grassroots team to continue building the strongest party in history. | |

We’ve come so far together, Derek. We’ve created millions of new jobs, expanded access to affordable health care, made historic investments in climate, infrastructure, and veterans benefits, and signed the most significant gun legislation in three decades. I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our country. **But our work is far from over. clean_body: I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our country. But our work is far from over, and Democrats are counting on this grassroots team to continue building the strongest party in history. | | We’ve come so far together, Derek. We’ve created millions of new jobs, expanded access to affordable health care, made historic investments in climate, infrastructure, and veterans benefits, and signed the most significant gun legislation in three decades. I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our country. But our work is far from over. Kamala and I are counting on this grassroots team to continue building the strongest Democratic Party in history. The DNC is the only party organization tasked with winning elections for Democrats at every level -- in state legislatures, governor’s offices, Congress, and more. Last year they ran innovative organizing, data, tech, and voter protection programs to secure our Senate majority, flip gubernatorial seats in Arizona, Maryland, and Massachusetts, and win state legislative chambers in Michigan, Minnesota, and Pennsylvania. But running those programs well required early investment, Derek. Thank you for everything you do, Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . name: Richard Hudson (NRCC Chairman)
subject: BEYOND disgusting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | _I can 't believe I even have to write this email. _

**Politico just published a bombshell report about a shady Democrat-linked firm stealing confidential military records in an attempt to smear Republican vets running for office.**

Phase one was leaking the personal details of a top GOP recruit in a battleground race just before the midterms. Now we're hearing that was only the beginning.

_**[I need your help to make them pay the political price for this disgusting smear campaign.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62357498:Jb0YJ7GNR:m:1:3331421248:64BF1B6DEF8FD720E7AD97829775264E:r "I need your help to make them pay the political price for this disgusting smear campaign.")**_

We have soldiers, fighter pilots, army doctors, Navy SEALs, Marines, and military intelligence officers in our conference - their noble service should be honored...

...NOT used against them to win elections!

---
| | | [DEFEND OUR REPUBLICAN VETS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62357498:Jb0YJ7GNR:m:1:3331421248:64BF1B6DEF8FD720E7AD97829775264E:r "DEFEND OUR REPUBLICAN VETS")
---

According to the report, a radical young activist called up an Air Force office, impersonated someone seeking employment history, and dumped any information they could twist and distort to tarnish the good name of a Republican into their opposition research file.

**I 'm furious. And I have a hunch you are too.**

Now I'm asking you to help me do something about it. These Radical Democrats will try every dirty trick in the book to claw their way back into power - this is a prime example of how low they're willing to go for control.

_**[So as the new NRCC Chairman, I'm personally asking everyone reading this to pitch in to help defend our honorable Republican vets.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62357498:Jb0YJ7GNR:m:1:3331421248:64BF1B6DEF8FD720E7AD97829775264E:r "So as the new NRCC
Chairman, I’m personally asking everyone reading this to pitch in ten or twenty bucks to help defend our honorable Republican vets.")**_

Thank you,

Richard Hudson
_NRCC Chairman _

---
| | | [DEFEND OUR REPUBLICAN VETS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62357498:Jb0YJ7GNR:m:1:3331421248:64BF1B6DEF8FD720E7AD97829775264E:r "DEFEND OUR REPUBLICAN VETS")
---

name: Pete Sepp
subject: How to stop debt addiction in Congress
body:
This is a clear case of debt addiction.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq8fv103pa2o6agf64ro4kl7odg13v8p3f32bem8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9j66ob4cph2bs)

Friend,

When most people hit their financial limits, they slow down their spending and reevaluate their budget.

**But when Congressional borrowing hit its limit, they decided to push it further and continue to rack up national debt at an astronomical rate!

_How many times can _you_ ask for an increased line of credit before the answer is "No"?_**

Congress doesn't know the meaning of that word and has proven itself to be utterly incapable of fiscal restraint in the best of times. Every time Congress whips out the credit card, it gets easier to do it again, and the timeline between raising the debt ceiling shrinks once more.

**This is a clear case of debt addiction. **

My name is Pete Sepp, President of the National Taxpayers Union (NTU). We are the voice for taxpayers in D.C. We're working with members of Congress to cut reckless spending and putting pressure on members who refuse to do so.

[_**Will you support our work with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5k34r9kqgc6o17rk5bif8jliumcmdlpc5fsoet8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9j66ob4cph2bs)

Congress must have a very serious conversation about this nation's fiscal future.

**There 's waste. There's fraud. There's the misallocation of federal dollars in every department of this federal government toward things that aren't priorities.**

They need to look across the federal budget and bring actual solutions to the table instead of taking certain departments or programs they like off the table. They also need to quit blaming tax cut programs, like the NTU-backed Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, for their budget issues.

_It 's the spending that matters_. It all adds up and contributes to our massive economic problems, including inflation and our runaway national debt of $31 trillion and counting.

**But your generous support helps us convince Congress to control their spending habit before they ruin America 's fiscal future. **

[_**Join the Fight to STOP Congress 's Debt Addiction! Click here to show your support today >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3vl2768lj1ks7q54ubgit0v9h5histi0cb2c7p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9j66ob4cph2bs)

Thousands of lobbyists work to keep Congress spending. So who is speaking for your interest?

**NTU is the _" Taxpayers' Lobbyist."_**

In addition to the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, NTU has proudly been a major player in signature taxpayer victories of the past five decades:
* We were there when the federal tax code was overhauled under President Reagan in 1986.
* We championed the cause for a "Taxpayer Bill of Rights" in the late 80s and 90s, along with follow-on legislation, the 2019 Taxpayer First Act.
* In 2020, our public education arm launched the Taxpayer Defense Center to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS major defeats in the Supreme Court.

The National Taxpayers Union is unrivaled at achieving the most favorable outcomes for taxpayers.

Will you join our fight to cut reckless Congressional spending?

**Click any link below and send your generous support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfjs2bk7qsn8u1ni6bvn6udpeochav9fur20n0h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9j66ob4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziaslrfk644qturi4led3auaq50u163vvgd62fe0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9j66ob4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z101h1jp1davq6knfc8ihnnjaa85pfd1m30a2lmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9j66ob4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za9d30iual7tqfajh1om95vpno7nntu511gi0q4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9j66ob4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z35bgg5b7sqphcok6gi03t4vk8v6k48vfc620jlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9j66ob4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2mlu37cnf20hqhdvsc6e4gh685bqii2ri3icmo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9j66ob4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zko60fp21r5r69odqs3ijgt7mhd1p8h6ji91td50_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9j66ob4cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1c58kda0u1ca06v1nd54h1treunsca208noabu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9j66ob4cph2bs)

Thank you,

Pete Sepp
President
National Taxpayers Union

_NTU is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit, nonpartisan citizen group whose members work every day for lower taxes and smaller government at all levels._

name: American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvc9d0ubasoi6v9p0vpbd51jvu2v1n199vjill0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9j66ob4c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ohm008ogdjj3jlt4fbo6oi0k9gc0g363e2oup8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9j66ob4c5h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7fqpe7ho9e0j4vmfqvqip0i4si2mpkogvjaiajo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9j66ob4c5h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi2qud80s157q66iguf85lf97dm4te7cipnk54ro_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9j66ob4c5h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zunsrtqqokmc5m7b8cdt4b6iivgm5ljm0p4rn6u8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9gm0o36chh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkvar11ae25d8gafgs4c2h6mbalkbjb74cli3a80_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9gm0o36chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4vgkpm74kjepbgonopk60q3dfi1jvt9uoig1o48_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9gm0o36chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdmdkd43bu7mnvcmis4b2r6osfrgpmhgf0jhpetg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9gm0o36chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Kash Patel
subject: I led the Russiagate investigation, and what I discovered changed me forever
body:
When Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered, good or bad about President Trump, it had to be published.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlj9i6uaupq1n6786gsvm18srkl8100vqip6vtpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9gm0o32c3h2bs)

Friend,

When Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered, good or bad about President Trump, it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever.**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation, and what I found makes me believe that they did it on purpose to get rid of President Trump. **

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

_To this day, most Americans still aren 't aware that Russiagate was a hoax_.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know what protection whistle-blowers need when they expose corrupt government gangsters. That's why I started Fight with Kash, a foundation to offer legal help to whistle-blowers.

[_**Fight for Kash is counting on people like you to help whistle-blowers in court, so I 've set a goal to raise $33,000 before the end of February. Will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to protect whistle-blowers? Click here to rush your support >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2g4p5ujj9504v2a01rak66fcrdg5de66op41vlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9gm0o32c3h2bs)

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv4m77qhpk6j6bmq9o763b7482b7ol5bqoqrh9t0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9gm0o32c3h2bs)

I am on a mission to root out all government gangsters from positions without our bureaus. I know these people are still in positions of power, and we must expose them to the American people. Without legal protections in place, whistle-blowers will not come forward.

With the new Congressional Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government, you and I have a unique opportunity to hold these thugs accountable.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl3ruh2q4h0cppis5a9aokr2sq3hmhlvqkhvb1q0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9gm0o32c3h2bs)

Fight for Kash is helping whistle-blowers to expose the deep state. But the process of being a whistle-blower is costly.

[_**Will you join my fight to protect whistle-blowers with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount?**__**Click here >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkau6c0605hvgijel8tlig84lvjdegr5uavgr8u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9gm0o32c3h2bs)

An anti-democratic Deep State has infiltrated the highest levels of government. We can never again allow the deep state to undermine a presidency as they did with President Trump.

A sinister cabal of corrupt law enforcement personnel, intelligence agents, and military officials at the highest levels of government plotted to interfere with a presidential election. They spoon-fed misinformation and disinformation to news organizations to cover it up. Lie on top of lie.

Even after they failed, they continued to secretly pull the levers of power without any accountability to the American people.

**But more whistle-blowers are coming forward, and I am calling on your immediate support to help us. Be prepared for major revelations with the new subcommittee in Congress. **

Can you help reach our goal of raising $33,000 by the end of the month, friend? **Click below to rush your support. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqa9gtrehrlc1vi4sa15nqnijn88qusemmqvbrig_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9gm0o32c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc5kpalvhn6rcum07m43k6j1ps2b5eauddu7lrj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9gm0o32c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zifktrbo211lldajm1eafc44vhn2vlnpuffs0v88_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9gm0o32c3h2bs)

clean_body: When Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered, good or bad about President Trump, it had to be published. Friend, When Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered, good or bad about President Trump, it had to be published. When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. But this investigation changed my life forever. Trump did NOT collude with Russia. My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation, and what I found makes me believe that they did it on purpose to get rid of President Trump. It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news. To this day, most Americans still aren 't aware that Russiagate was a hoax. As a former federal prosecutor, I know what protection whistle-blowers need when they expose corrupt government gangsters. That's why I started Fight with Kash, a foundation to offer legal help to whistle-blowers. I am on a mission to root out all government gangsters from positions without our bureaus. I know these people are still in positions of power, and we must expose them to the American people. Without legal protections in place, whistle-blowers will not come forward. With the new Congressional Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government, you and I have a unique opportunity to hold these thugs accountable. Fight for Kash is helping whistle-blowers to expose the deep state. But the process of being a whistle-blower is costly. An anti-democratic Deep State has infiltrated the highest levels of government. We can never again allow the deep state to undermine a presidency as they did with President Trump. A sinister cabal of corrupt law enforcement personnel, intelligence agents, and military officials at the highest levels of government plotted to interfere with a presidential election. They spoon-fed misinformation and disinformation to news organizations to cover it up. Lie on top of lie. Even after they failed, they continued to secretly pull the levers of power without any accountability to the American people. But more whistle-blowers are coming forward, and I am calling on your immediate support to help us. Be prepared for major revelations with the new subcommittee in Congress. name: Kathi Paroska
subject: Reminder: ICYMI: Ohio Republican Leaders Endorse Matt Dolan for U.S. Senate
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001waqicttbf30GtHmwNcJHQrHd7yoGvdqpXrfnf00-XSeeIz0SCfNgAHqL5N9Rimh5833IJmQfZ9eywpebMGISqI6hRIQVUCsDowGEUyTOFlFxG7MvcDmIy8fvaccv2lUneLIa5r1yrqU5OmNHAM2KvA==&c=-wD8MQhGzSEH4V-hqGZgNBIjqbF1ioCAGVq-2EBboHH5ogXId0Q7dg==&ch=sM9vkl8TTNm2X23hmhp15ANFSA_E7dOSoaa8RY14adUkETi6VV9bzw==)
---
| For Immediate Release: February 21, 2023 | [press@DolanForOhio.com](mailto:press@DolanForOhio.com)

Ohio Republican Leaders Endorse Matt Dolan for U.S. Senate
Cleveland, OH: U.S. Senate candidate Matt Dolan announced Tuesday the latest slate of Republican campaign endorsements from across Ohio.
"The challenges confronting America today require the kind of hard work, innovation and results-oriented focus embodied by our growing list of Republican supporters across Ohio. Together, we're working to build a statewide movement of grassroots conservatives and dedicated public servants working to build a better future for Ohio families, workers and businesses. I'm proud to have their support for U.S. Senate," Matt Dolan said.

Full list of today's endorsements (county):
Council President Pro tem Jay "Chip" AuWerter, Gates Mills (Cuyahoga)
Vice Mayor Kate Baker, Huber Heights (Montgomery)
Mayor Robert Breneman, Wooster (Wayne)
Commissioner Sabrina Christian Bennett (Portage)
Councilman Lee Czerwonka, Blue Ash (Hamilton)
County Commissioner Julie Ehemann (Shelby)
Councilman David Furry, Rocky River (Cuyahoga)
Councilman Joe Gambatese, Lyndhurst (Cuyahoga)
Councilman Jim Kaminski, Strongsville (Cuyahoga)
Council President Phillip Kiriazis, Seven Hills (Cuyahoga)
Councilman Pete Marsh, Hilliard (Franklin)
Mayor Sarah Mays, Xenia (Greene)
Mayor Dennis Morley, Eastlake (Lake) Councilman Bobby Phillips, Troy (Miami)
County Commissioner Rich Regovich (Lake)
Councilman Bill Rozell, Troy (Miami)
Councilman Grand Russel, Findlay (Hancock)
County Commissioner Larry Schmidt (Crawford)
Councilman Roby Schottke, Grove City (Franklin)
Councilman Todd Severt, Troy (Miami)
Mayor Bob Stone, Beavercreek (Greene)
Councilman Patrick Thackery, Urbana (Champaign)
Councilman William Twiss, Troy (Miami)
Councilman Barry VanHoozen, Perrysburg (Wood)
Mayor Ann Womer Benjamin, Aurora (Portage)
For more information on Matt Dolan's campaign for U.S. Senate, email [press@dolanforohio.com.](mailto:press@dolanforohio.com.)
###
---
| Follow Matt on Social Media!
---

| | | | | Peter, **_Blue Amp Action's Bi-Weekly "BlueLetter!"_** * 😱 😱 [Marge Taylor Greene wants a national divorce. Ok](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9af4aa46-29e3-445d-a151-af9f79962028/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). WATCH!! [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1z0FyDTq79o&t=7s](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ad0e805-ac18-4ec1-a401-52931e28bc17/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ******************* **👍👍👍 Have [you visited our sponsor Dissent Pins yet?? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf9b6db1-9186-4805-92a1-e546e9091902/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)Need a ["Mazel Tough" t-shirt? A "No One's Treading On You, Sweetie" sticker or something from their Pride Collection?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T943d68bd-a793-48e2-910a-ed828aab3df3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** **It's all [here at Dissent Pins!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9c3495c-4d14-4b8a-abd3-2ff49583baa4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** ******************* 😁😉 Before we go, a funny clip. God-knows we need 'em these days. So...an accidental kitchen fire, a fleeing husband & wife removing her shoe. You decide how ya think it ends: [https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpr3mNMkbqfd2E4vTIRVMIg/community](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a54a123-9ac8-4720-a0de-dc64becd948c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for reading and watching!

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6cdc11d2-9b01-4328-80f0-fdc184a631d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

Peter, My message is clear and simple: **NO MORE OIL to Communist China!** I'm proud to be leading the charge, alongside West Virginia Democrat Joe Manchin, to build a bipartisan coalition to stop the Biden administration from shipping one more drop from our nation's oil reserve to our nation's greatest advisory. Senate Republicans are all-in and we have FIVE Democrat cosponsors on the Cruz-Manchin Protecting America's Strategic Petroleum Reserve from China Act!**
** **I shared more on this important legislation on one of the latest episodes of _Verdict_. **
---
[**LISTEN NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62359617:J-8Wn7GEN:m:1:3331421248:5ADCC4D50B75728E5049929B0119D646:r)
---
Joe Biden exploited our nation's oil reserve to drop the cost of gas before the election. You've seen where prices have headed since. And we know that some of the oil the Biden administration released was shipped out to Chinese communists with ties to Joe and Hunter and their business dealings. _You can bet that Joe Biden and his far-left pals are firing up their spin machine to stop us! _ **It 's time to take China off the table, period.** The fact that we've drained our stockpile of emergency oil to help fuel China's economic growth is the definition of insanity.

For Liberty,

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Time to stop the CRINGE and Unite as a People
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy Democrats
body:
Friend,

This week I appeared on Fox a few times to argue that we were missing what's at the root of the East Palestine, Ohio's train derailment - it's what happens when industry puts 'Profits Over People'. Instead of investing more in safety and innovation, Norfolk Southern lined their pockets with $18 billion in a stock buyback scheme.

My heart goes out to the residents and businesses of East Palestine who have to deal with this ecological disaster. This avoidable accident is a result of lax regulations and feckless rules that only allow the government to fine Norfolk Southern $225k - which Congress can change today if they really wanted to - but they won't.

This tragic derailment exposes the critical lack of trust that exists between our government and our people. Our enemies overseas love this, and they want to divide us from within. It's time as a people that we identify the CRINGE - China, Russia, Iran, North Korea, and Global Extremists as our competitors and our enemies investing millions to divide us here at home. It's imperative that we put aside showy partisan bickering and rally together to focus on the real culprits and to maintain the sacred American principles.

Please click the image below to view my appearance on Fox today and share it with your friends and family to spread the message of American unity in the face of these foreign affronts and those trying to divide us.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dPIVlPhzljMloo0l3VmALSNiw28pfjroYqOvjctoOWI=/oIDd48RdFiKH8H2U5YxiJQL2OQCNUdN0FRkoLRxYq88=)

Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Undersecretary of the Army
Former Congressman
Paid for by Kennedy Democrats

Bristol PA 19007 United States

name: Jay Lucas
subject: Miles to Go before I Sleep!
body:
The Sunshine Report
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_hAjtcjDFI9BmAq9N0IL2QZe8JUxTrLndyx_sRGrmMbRkm7oNuSxP2GqA6GrUSwL6-GsotV7Dv4g6ShAq0INNOOdLqkHNyJfk96BS6EaAjfB-tZpY7lXvCxhUwMwA18djx7vIJw-5bgWVR3n2fnLglS3r8SJu-N03Oqr0ClgxtZuOcJ9IuGZm-u9Q_Q5lSAPENI_mf38AQE=&c=hJiYEQNCtgpGO9RLwTgcdQf1iiKUUM_5_2_X-r4IvTPKHq5v6gZ78g==&ch=BnILhTiUjatrR6lNPg7lCFT-ceuaU8FnoM27AJY_xD4l1XI9Bugjeg==)

|
# The Woods Are Lovely Dark and Deep...
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_hAjtcjDFI9BmAq9N0IL2QZe8JUxTrLndyx_sRGrmMbRkm7oNuSxP7EsTm3cZ-vkwCiXmZzAOaEpmDSQ7g4bxCJzVU2QuMDEkWqsfG8jwwwlv1VZ3yrWSQhNDOyc85y8pS4OKK1KdB_js4HV5L47VA==&c=hJiYEQNCtgpGO9RLwTgcdQf1iiKUUM_5_2_X-r4IvTPKHq5v6gZ78g==&ch=BnILhTiUjatrR6lNPg7lCFT-ceuaU8FnoM27AJY_xD4l1XI9Bugjeg==)
---
| 'Jay shares thoughts on the inspirational strength of the human spirit in persevering, pushing forward and completing the journey!'
---
| 'But I have miles to go before I sleep.' These are words from the famous Robert Frost poem - 'Stopping by Woods on a Snowy Evening.' It's a great piece of work in that it describes a dilemma that nearly everyone faces at one time or another. You find yourself on a mission. May even be a lifetime goal. But it's something dramatically important to your very being and what you feel you 'need' to achieve. Yet inevitably, there are hurdles along the way. The path is arduous and at times, exhausting. In these moments, the dark, still woods offer refuge, a place to rest and curtail your journey - perhaps even ending the quest. Yet, you summon up the energy - and awaken to the realization that there is no choice. You must move on. And so, you do. With many more miles to go before you sleep.
To put it in personal terms, have you ever set a goal for yourself and along the way either found yourself stuck, uninspired, distracted or just downright ready to give up? Perhaps things become a bit more difficult than anticipated, or we lose sight of our vision because something gets in the way, or we procrastinate and say we'll pick things back up tomorrow. Whatever the case may be, it's important that when we set a goal for ourselves, we remember that we're not just setting our sights on something, but we're also making a promise with ourselves to achieve something.
Throughout our lifetime, we work hard to build trust with others, demonstrating our integrity and reliability as a means of creating social bonds or maybe getting a long sought after promotion. Oftentimes though when we're trying to demonstrate our competence and aptitude to others, it comes with a heavy price. Even when we may have built and kept a great reputation, we have to ask ourselves, have we been reliable to ourselves? While we've kept our word to others, have we kept to our own word and our own internal promises?
Life has a tendency to put things in our path that can distract us, knock us off course, or discourage us from achieving or attaining the things we want most. These can even be things that feel like the right thing to be doing in the moment but ultimately just get in the way of where we're really trying to go. So, it's essential to remember that when we set goals or dream about our future, while it's ok to stop, take a break, and enjoy the journey, we must also be conscious that we made a promise to ourselves and that there is still work to be done in order to make good on that promise. Don't let fatigue, distraction or issues of the moment get in the way - and rob you of your destiny. Keep faith with your mission and know that you have all that it takes to go those many miles before you sleep.

| Positive Profile of the Week - Jeanne Gerulskis - Born to Explore!
---
| | |
---|---
|
This week we are delighted to highlight a leading contributor to our community in so many ways, Executive Director at McAuliffe-Shepard Discovery Center. Jeanne T. Gerulskis.

By way of background, Jeanne began her tenure at the Christa McAuliffe Planetarium in 1998 as its Executive Director. How she got there is an interesting story. Back when she was growing up in Norwood, MA, her family would vacation in NH. She remembers in 1969 sitting around a small black and white TV with family and friends at Tucker Pond in Warner, NH watching Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin become the first humans to ever land and step on the surface of the moon! She graduated from Williams College in 1979 with a bachelor's degree in economics and has a background in the museum field and the tourism industry. She was the Senior Curator of Programs for Ketchikan Museums in Alaska overseeing all programs and exhibits at a Native American cultural center and museum, Totem Heritage Center, and a history museum, Tongass Historical Museum, before joining the Planetarium.

After the passing of Derry, NH native Alan B. Shepard, America's first astronaut, and while still in her first year, Jeanne worked with community leaders, educators, scientists, engineers, the State of New Hampshire, and NASA to transform the Planetarium into an amazing 45,000-square-foot science center dedicated to both Christa McAuliffe and Alan Shepard (check out the above article to learn more about one of New Hampshire's most significant citizens of all time, Alan Shepard.) The newly renamed McAuliffe-Shepard Discovery Center opened in March 2009, featuring two floors of interactive exhibits on astronomy, aviation, earth and space science, an observatory, full-dome digital planetarium, science store, dedicated parking lot, and outdoor exhibits.

Jeanne currently serves on the New Hampshire Space Grant Board and on the Bow NH Rotary Club and Foundation boards as immediate past president. She is passionate about inspiring the next generation of space explorers, scientists, and engineers.

Learn more about the center at www.starhop.com and find out how they "bring the universe to you!" Thank you, Jeanne, for all that you do to make our community here in New Hampshire such a special place!

clean_body: The Sunshine Report | | | | == | The Woods Are Lovely Dark and Deep... | == | 'Jay shares thoughts on the inspirational strength of the human spirit in persevering, pushing forward and completing the journey!' | 'But I have miles to go before I sleep.' These are words from the famous Robert Frost poem - 'Stopping by Woods on a Snowy Evening.' It's a great piece of work in that it describes a dilemma that nearly everyone faces at one time or another. You find yourself on a mission. May even be a lifetime goal. But it's something dramatically important to your very being and what you feel you 'need' to achieve. Yet inevitably, there are hurdles along the way. The path is arduous and at times, exhausting. In these moments, the dark, still woods offer refuge, a place to rest and curtail your journey - perhaps even ending the quest. Yet, you summon up the energy - and awaken to the realization that there is no choice. You must move on. And so, you do. With many more miles to go before you sleep. To put it in personal terms, have you ever set a goal for yourself and along the way either found yourself stuck, uninspired, distracted or just downright ready to give up? Perhaps things become a bit more difficult than anticipated, or we lose sight of our vision because something gets in the way, or we procrastinate and say we'll pick things back up tomorrow. Whatever the case may be, it's important that when we set a goal for ourselves, we remember that we're not just setting our sights on something, but we're also making a promise with ourselves to achieve something. Throughout our lifetime, we work hard to build trust with others, demonstrating our integrity and reliability as a means of creating social bonds or maybe getting a long sought after promotion. Oftentimes though when we're trying to demonstrate our competence and aptitude to others, it comes with a heavy price. Even when we may have built and kept a great reputation, we have to ask ourselves, have we been reliable to ourselves? While we've kept our word to others, have we kept to our own word and our own internal promises? Life has a tendency to put things in our path that can distract us, knock us off course, or discourage us from achieving or attaining the things we want most. These can even be things that feel like the right thing to be doing in the moment but ultimately just get in the way of where we're really trying to go. Don't let fatigue, distraction or issues of the moment get in the way - and rob you of your destiny. subject: The 5 lies of Critical Race Theory
body:

---
Dear Fellow Conservative, The anti-critical race theory movement is gaining traction both ideologically and politically. And that has progressives both outraged and panicked. They’ll do anything they can to stop this movement. Their latest strategy is to distort the truth and mislead the American people so that they can continue to push their Marxist agenda. And they are using their friends in the establishment media and Big Tech to do so. But these lies are being unmasked and exposed by The Heritage Foundation. That’s why I’m sending you this email today.
---
| | I'm told that you are an American who is concerned about the levels of indoctrination we’ve seen from Critical Race Theory—and what that could mean for the future of our country. **So, today,[I want to send you a FREE copy of The Heritage Foundation’s latest eBook, ](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zsglrrf3f0h7cmr8omn37btslj7vsf7f3qjbsv60_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9gmeoj6c5h2bs)**[**_The 5 Lies of CRT_****.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z205rvcjftc3gdhamql6p7u8qskc7ifqn8mok4fg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9gmeoj6c5h2bs)

---
| | Inside this important resource, you’ll not only learn the 5 lies Progressives have employed in their campaign to push Critical Race Theory, but you’ll also discover that:
* None of CRT’s policy approaches would help people of any race or national origin.
* All of the biggest names pushing CRT have affirmed that they are promoting Marxism.
* The Left is using CRT to wage a battle royal for the soul of America—and even the West itself.

**You can get instant access to your FREE eBook right now using this secure link:[ https://secured.heritage.org/5lies-of-crt-ebook/](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z09dahmcnha0gpd8gkscu4mrq66rc3q4ev3415ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9gmeoj6c5h2bs)** As the Left ramps up their campaign through the power of the media and Big Tech, it is crucial that we inform as many people as possible with the truth about what is really going on. I hope this is a helpful resource for you. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development, The Heritage Foundation

body:
| | |
---
| | **My sweet husband, Mark, is innocent. **
---
[Please don't let him die in prison!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62361060:6sUwZ7GNd:m:1:3391001263:27F8DC73CAF93A7CD89C10679CB5A3B0:r) Hello, my name is Sarah Bessner. I'm the proud wife of Michigan State Trooper Mark Bessner. That's Mark in uniform in that photo. I'm holding our precious baby girl, Samantha. Mark arrested hundreds of violent criminals, served dozens of high-risk search warrants, served undercover, and was decorated several times for saving innocent lives. Mark's a hero, but he was railroaded by a cop-hating county prosecutor, an unjust judge, and a kangaroo court for trying to protect people. He faces 5 to 15 years in prison for manslaughter ... if he lives that long. You see, Mark is behind bars with dangerous criminals who HATE police. And they'll get serious "street cred" if they murder him! Click here to read the whole story of how this happened! [Now Mark is filing an appeal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62361060:6sUwZ7GNd:m:1:3391001263:27F8DC73CAF93A7CD89C10679CB5A3B0:r) But, we need help... that's why we turned to the National Center for Police Defense. They're a non-profit group started by police to defend innocent police.
With your urgent help, they can fight for Mark in his appeal process. Please give a critically important $25, $50, $100, $250 or more now to help save Mark's life. My husband is innocent...please help protect him. Please help him get home to me and our baby girl, Samantha.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
In an interview published in Imprimis, Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d278f9cb1ad84744934addd303c69fba&_e=XW4JKFXhqaT0RcAHt14Gj0dDFON23H-vaPPL0SLh8MLBAk2DmQlyA6doDdMOV9tPRk5GsfqkidnF0JK_AZX-BDpJRM7ILW74QR1CVvMvxe-WEbo5LuOKdGegEtlg3bGpxsLjtvQlnADMI1bogG3hetvSTALqUJ1iIv4USmeyqnYwONlQja9UVCduzKNmwXYor7Bnyuei3cIy-MhHEnKVT8pLF9JQMxCkEJc8i45ywNCsYHt4C7gbplrh6xAoIsu0-a1tS4BMsZ5TLh883TiuBdg2jSolMMWQumoO7semhJdNdMbk7DM06mx1aMQUbbSZEL97hRQrL7fAPKU-RbKYS-JhKEGeLqFQYrXs_Iz1WUBEj9wsFrBLUrbgHKjXgB8mqMqbLeOJlY1I2Lw5NqDUtQ%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d278f9cb1ad84744934addd303c69fba&_e=XW4JKFXhqaT0RcAHt14Gj0dDFON23H-vaPPL0SLh8MLBAk2DmQlyA6doDdMOV9tPRk5GsfqkidnF0JK_AZX-BDpJRM7ILW74QR1CVvMvxe-WEbo5LuOKdGegEtlg3bGpxsLjtvQlnADMI1bogG3hetvSTALqUJ1iIv4USmeyqnYwONlQja9UVCduzKNmwXYor7Bnyuei3cIy-MhHEnKVT8pLF9JQMxCkEJc8i45ywNCsYHt4C7gbplrh6xAoIsu0Q7qgap3gIlUgeV2zL_y4Qi8WMvvAmIjss7x80GReaImCFcHQNzjzPf6sJ9fF4UhnlpIN3T1ySeepJuYnd53nND5J-f2FHR7k7WPga-LKeoXIUbHpNRrp3TlxBcJoqUoyo2fMegnuOjWLvB0eZEEL4A%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d278f9cb1ad84744934addd303c69fba&_e=XW4JKFXhqaT0RcAHt14Gj0dDFON23H-vaPPL0SLh8MLBAk2DmQlyA6doDdMOV9tPRk5GsfqkidnF0JK_AZX-BDpJRM7ILW74QR1CVvMvxe-WEbo5LuOKdGegEtlg3bGpxsLjtvQlnADMI1bogG3hetvSTALqUJ1iIv4USmeyqnYwONlQja9UVCduzKNmwXYor7Bnyuei3cIy-MhHEnKVT8pLF9JQMxCkEJc8i45ywNCsYHt4C7gbplrh6xAoIsu0Nexp2mEh4g-UVbF47j1OjCX9OhoGRBcCNdm3qvgWmMaZ-9Lbb2lPaREpQ7MW53XWYG3yMVdSaTb7t1wsfeiX-DiWMTXleJu70Z76jf0ojn69ViV1-J-b7wKvANCOKSQcdYycqqNQNrAWIl7vEDiw6w%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=47b46a0439004cef8a4c4fc5d9dda949&_e=FrwcXvLnyzVPJAAS9oRqY8s-q_t9veDqHCoblEjLD4HBuxEqWUdbhISU7l-PP12sHYyq3yYurZMQGCjSECvqip6C9-bIjYW2yeVYw3Zma3qkpiZPmmf7E9ndGq3dnkNNB98b9kNLkh58E2utTWkGhar8JWV3Ax4DhmebDXgVQinLtRs5njyfRgBpOUo_BHepQFFWFrC7psPBCkenrN9caclTiwuFxMM-Sedb-ZsxOqnvWsnLDVr4JDu5tjymrenZdXOS4LwO7zUjCg5ADyFeBZOya4TrGNIpOz6mpgStqwAXZ_-LwB-6noFe_kSfxDAkjQvQNFGgNtCECVVWCQe5k5_8kq9ADIr-BdZBqUPjauE-GzwaL2TQ7CaL7B8lrC9ZwL2UdOunxzRsaF-3jkO-gM8hnYDuXGZXlRvx6KAmGgN4Wvuluc_eO59JUMtg0bnD)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=47b46a0439004cef8a4c4fc5d9dda949&_e=FrwcXvLnyzVPJAAS9oRqY8s-q_t9veDqHCoblEjLD4HBuxEqWUdbhISU7l-PP12sHYyq3yYurZMQGCjSECvqip6C9-bIjYW2yeVYw3Zma3qkpiZPmmf7E9ndGq3dnkNNB98b9kNLkh58E2utTWkGhar8JWV3Ax4DhmebDXgVQinLtRs5njyfRgBpOUo_BHepQFFWFrC7psPBCkenrN9caclTiwuFxMM-Sedb-ZsxOqnvWsnLDVr4JDu5tjymrenZdXOS4LwO7zUjCg5ADyFeBfPM8UF9SBelPef5jmRNJ_gjq8IzGqW7VdJZfsWoshmRkzVBzCaB2TmG8ezD2YyZW3m97G7TWO3DLH1bSnfr2XdnMykFWrrj3EZnqI9u28mQXMEzXvlsPcnaWjPlE5z2gho4_iq60hiQEEaCWpO9rnyJGRSnbmrNFrSX8p-WOoJV)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=47b46a0439004cef8a4c4fc5d9dda949&_e=FrwcXvLnyzVPJAAS9oRqY8s-q_t9veDqHCoblEjLD4HBuxEqWUdbhISU7l-PP12sHYyq3yYurZMQGCjSECvqip6C9-bIjYW2yeVYw3Zma3qkpiZPmmf7E9ndGq3dnkNNB98b9kNLkh58E2utTWkGhar8JWV3Ax4DhmebDXgVQinLtRs5njyfRgBpOUo_BHepQFFWFrC7psPBCkenrN9caclTiwuFxMM-Sedb-ZsxOqnvWsnLDVr4JDu5tjymrenZdXOS4LwO7zUjCg5ADyFeBRAD4s3n3J0gc0DlHrV1TXCyS1GK0i2w0adDtPoEjiJF7VcNfbeCZhZvhX5XoVsM7cLkB53lUG80URx_I-npWAbcATGs0eHOv9D8anJEQgUCmHbW3-v_8FuKqzpNrWyLwlBWWjK-Y5GxzUibpuhPbF77WoFJkGWuP4P4jS0HvkWb)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=47b46a0439004cef8a4c4fc5d9dda949&_e=FrwcXvLnyzVPJAAS9oRqY8s-q_t9veDqHCoblEjLD4HBuxEqWUdbhISU7l-PP12sHYyq3yYurZMQGCjSECvqip6C9-bIjYW2yeVYw3Zma3qkpiZPmmf7E9ndGq3dnkNNB98b9kNLkh58E2utTWkGhar8JWV3Ax4DhmebDXgVQinLtRs5njyfRgBpOUo_BHepQFFWFrC7psPBCkenrN9caclTiwuFxMM-Sedb-ZsxOqnvWsnLDVr4JDu5tjymrenZdXOS4LwO7zUjCg5ADyFeBbhFjVaGEfGRaEj34NTk80RG_LJVcyfaK8QPZeVxjOpsAK8iQgzMrhu344RzrgIg2aHnX0ISusMGUWF64PBAdU3WVPqw9lgB1HtHcUnrBGlDxA1h6fb0uic6kI4K5imJhEwok6fVsX3XJ3ZTZN143tusAV33PvyhvWhr3qDVFdWy).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |

name: Great America Update
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78089%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1d40YDgJyoPM4%2fddWZWV6g&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation’s highest court: **“My job is to apply the Constitution.”**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78080%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PvflbRNypYyztn9tEHObCQ&sysid=1) [NO](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78081%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NpBzdTtLufKf14VaR54%2b%2bw&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78082%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IOloTY7fftK1n6SI9MhVOQ&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as “Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution.”

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78083%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dvKCkGxkfFOQYIW4dLRipg&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Conservatives Give
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb0ec7578718438b841b6a81c0e907e4&_e=Nk5ZMf63MKugqaIskTR6R2lrGhrPdMNaiEGkIpNxw6VcZwA8a8-B5uUmwbb4IXz1UiVZaySbbZEsZ1c_kcpmnHI03cIlvAdV5sny5IL40dyCtWz95K79o3pGMjFytm5GoczhV7vNg1_0NMrTdamyn7f8CNkn7uLVQiFdqfhG59jmu3FyKlFMhXKt-yfFNwEhlOYEqMsQ3SR4Ur4gxGoPbHvgSeXe4vit9jryUb4f1DpYvyaqtPpU2m4nVAiMo7uxtWhoSwlM0AIIS8xPME_AEYUuisB9TQPVL4HS6wNkWBx9WAU7xDEgWzrmUwcYh-LJg9pSw3-Z6XPLLtlmAJjjuXo7aShzuZGqwpCYRc9BXAQX3xbQaFlCqgajuC7JGJsWAS9_GiSaMJ8tZGGCKbRJuCRT8by504nf6qs0hWTY64vgYE92DDCQUozlOxkooZNW)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb0ec7578718438b841b6a81c0e907e4&_e=Nk5ZMf63MKugqaIskTR6R2lrGhrPdMNaiEGkIpNxw6VcZwA8a8-B5uUmwbb4IXz1UiVZaySbbZEsZ1c_kcpmnHI03cIlvAdV5sny5IL40dyCtWz95K79o3pGMjFytm5GoczhV7vNg1_0NMrTdamyn7f8CNkn7uLVQiFdqfhG59jmu3FyKlFMhXKt-yfFNwEhlOYEqMsQ3SR4Ur4gxGoPbHvgSeXe4vit9jryUb4f1DpYvyaqtPpU2m4nVAiMo7uxtWhoSwlM0AIIS8xPME_AEcWmkmLI81AaKoW6iWiae1v9WJ792Hx5I8eU2o9Mhi9WjiLdLw9hqif45uggLLnvNGzL6qrCCrjHbMWOrP0Mppwl50idcE5L4ML46z2RMhzZRUo5AvfoSGLtaB7nKSI24CBs11zZOTfQ3yXQNgoYZS7OnZWLzGIxhTgk4bxEw1dV)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb0ec7578718438b841b6a81c0e907e4&_e=Nk5ZMf63MKugqaIskTR6R2lrGhrPdMNaiEGkIpNxw6VcZwA8a8-B5uUmwbb4IXz1UiVZaySbbZEsZ1c_kcpmnHI03cIlvAdV5sny5IL40dyCtWz95K79o3pGMjFytm5GoczhV7vNg1_0NMrTdamyn7f8CNkn7uLVQiFdqfhG59jmu3FyKlFMhXKt-yfFNwEhlOYEqMsQ3SR4Ur4gxGoPbHvgSeXe4vit9jryUb4f1DpYvyaqtPpU2m4nVAiMo7uxtWhoSwlM0AIIS8xPME_AEZRzNu8inM73INsPqq2tvodgi_N86-UDNaPKODL6w8GB6zK9hDSserRiHCFXzNSqi1HO_E-lPOq1s3ISe02p-q_qkFTduUhFDuLlnoKX83hntAkqjjHFY3CHS_DhwV6MbeAydYa29mA7lg9qxKEybVhndKbrcOALctxmbnAdvNbi)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb0ec7578718438b841b6a81c0e907e4&_e=Nk5ZMf63MKugqaIskTR6R2lrGhrPdMNaiEGkIpNxw6VcZwA8a8-B5uUmwbb4IXz1UiVZaySbbZEsZ1c_kcpmnHI03cIlvAdV5sny5IL40dyCtWz95K79o3pGMjFytm5GoczhV7vNg1_0NMrTdamyn7f8CNkn7uLVQiFdqfhG59jmu3FyKlFMhXKt-yfFNwEhlOYEqMsQ3SR4Ur4gxGoPbHvgSeXe4vit9jryUb4f1DpYvyaqtPpU2m4nVAiMo7uxtWhoSwlM0AIIS8xPME_AEdPs4dAcwIDvdhBRQV9uFwsEzEYqsGUAGNfCxDuD13T8_eZVmv66NTUFx9xfrAKPDE2ggGojMFNZSRn0i0U-_rxPSqfOlVAqpAHZJjhtaHbZe-JLY08lqJzGvP9zn1P-yXA02KqmFRIGRvZtq5X5XlPJ_ynaCvQmsLRzgK1FcOo5).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=fb0ec7578718438b841b6a81c0e907e4&_t=_q5kfpKn4Rx0NmiSlfeCC9WX9zy4fN9a2ozyLWsv7fRf0BCsifArGa1QKhAnzO1ySspXNdJw3RPeVPjeRxFs7mf_Fmk4aLSDOVNk6QL3l56SrT3Pk8uuTjua-XQIWNtnvlfailVYeY-h7Wv4z_RE7xuEBMdZGyLQO8oy6oOYyj4%3D)
