name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Want to replace an unserious, conspiracy-minded fool like Lauren Boebert with a results-oriented, liberal-minded fighter?
body:
Boebert out
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T583b38e3-2566-4f6f-b4ac-8c75dfe31fd8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **We have a gun crisis, a climate crisis, inequality--both economic and ethnic.**_To quote President Andy Shepherd, played by Michael Douglas in "The American President":_ “We have serious problems to solve, and we need serious people to solve them. And whatever your particular problem is, I promise you Bob Rumson is not the least bit interested in solving it.” _**Change "Bob Rumson" to Lauren Boebert, and the speech is perfect. Adam Frisch, who announced he's challenging Boebert again after losing in the closest House race in the country, is someone we backed early. **__We knew of his talent, and what a fool Boebert is. We knew the state, district makeup, her idiocy and his candidacy created a real chance to win. So, once again, we're 100% __behind him_. [**_Let's turn Frisch's strong run in '22 into a win in '24--send Boebert packing and take back Kevin McCarhthy's gavel. Will you join us in giving Adam Frisch $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to replace a conspiracy-minded fool with a results-oriented, liberal-minded fighter?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9a8511c-362f-4e45-89b8-c3456e36252a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|

| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4514f0d2-950d-4315-aeb2-4d9d9e98e8f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _**Frisch hasn't disappointed, either. He made his own Andy Shepherd speech on Twitter yesterday, reacting to yet another imbecilic, conspiracy tweet by Boebert** :_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d3e7948-1a6e-46f6-9c9f-ec134726ba79/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _To paraphrase Andy Shepherd: **We have serious problems, and Adam Frish is a serious person. And Boebert? She isn't the slightest bit interested in solving your problems** , whatever they may be._ [**_Let's turn Frisch's strong run in '22 into a win in '24--send Boebert packing and take back Kevin McCarhthy's gavel. Will you join us in giving Adam Frisch $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to replace a conspiracy-minded fool with a results-oriented, liberal-minded fighter?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd87f8f3-55ad-47bf-ae7b-21d143ee6db5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your dedication. Cliff

| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/frischvsboebert2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b056931-2c0b-4435-a796-08f4ca9f6820/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: J. Rosen
subject: before I have to head into my next meeting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I've been doing some reflecting today on the experiences that have shaped my fights in the Senate, so **I wanted to send a quick note before I head into my next meeting in a few minutes.**
I've been reflecting on where my story began: in a working-class family that taught me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence.

I've been reflecting on how I became the first in my family to graduate from college – working as a waitress and taking out student loans to cover the cost.

And I've been reflecting on how I learned firsthand about inequality in the workplace as a young computer programmer in a male-dominated field.
These experiences and more are the reasons why I fight so hard to end pay discrimination, expand access to affordable health care and education, and establish paid family leave for all. They're also why I fight so hard _against_ GOP tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy and cuts to Social Security and Medicare.
**But here's the problem, friend: Democrats are clinging to a _razor-thin_ majority in the Senate – and experts at **_The Washington Post_**say that I'm one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot. I simply cannot win reelection and continue this fight without your critical grassroots support.**
**[So please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to help me defend this seat and our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar could mean the difference between winning and losing.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59189482/393509713/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2339-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTM3YWMxMS02NmI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6psR71VToUU0LB3jMGMyIN06OpL3eOdJ-FuN6XOQpjs=)**
Thank you for being by my side – I'm so grateful.

Jacky Rosen
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=ARhbJC3DJfu8JriQ7u%2BPks9Eyl9FmyjmA%2FrqIn6MpyIVaCJ5wDLl7VBvr6JL1MMwHGHSYCzJy1roGFktjO8STovK6Nn66Kmj%2F0SzGSeoLfT7QfbAVo6rDXHH6VTqP5F2a8A6f%2BmWvhN6yJxd3gHtv70smXfLwXj%2BBn0aMOwX%2FfJ1N3%2FJLmMyiYznNUKHNNJ627IhL2HVqh4CYVy%2BtaGsXyKJCrcjjW39e0mYLA42HxlKsGqWW8C0gLYE4MVsj18wgC5%2FRnsvJAvMy%2FQ3PIdQalVas5UTYqfNtr8UXEu5eKrMeyqCfqpgaXyLpXtio2JeECHaizH2VTvcZyUF7VBMjQ4bntgWEctIHLwkazcXUV6DRqsbULHyKRhuKHIqs1UbDjEellsXWZ3D%2FoTe1A6SUwhQ69vkHyb%2BdX%2BZ2hPhMAQ%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

name: Shift WA
subject: ACTION NEEDED: Demand support for public safety
body:
Democrat Senate Chair of the Law and Justice Committee has said she will NOT move a critical public safety bill forward. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61534891:sOjO6-DtN:m:1:2610672541:467AFF2FE7DE0F6FA8510D4EEAD7EE53:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends, Democrats have done quite a lot of damage to public safety in the last few years in our state. We've seen crime rates skyrocket in communities across Washington because of their terrible anti-police policies. Unfortunately, most Democrats (even the ones who talked about public safety during their campaigns) aren't in any hurry to recognize their failures and fix them. Perhaps no other policy has failed communities across our state more than the Democrats' 2021 bill banning police from pursuing suspected criminals fleeing the scene of a crime. We've all seen the damage from this legislation. That's why a** bi-partisan group of House lawmakers - i.e., Republicans and a handful of reasonable Democrats - attempted to amend that law this year via **[**HB 1363**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61534892:sOjO6-DtN:m:1:2610672541:467AFF2FE7DE0F6FA8510D4EEAD7EE53:r). This reform ([**HB 1363**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61534892:sOjO6-DtN:m:1:2610672541:467AFF2FE7DE0F6FA8510D4EEAD7EE53:r)) would have again allowed police pursuits given a reasonable suspicion a crime had been committed. But the rationality behind the amending bill was a step too far for many House Democrats. Instead, the House is now poised to pass a watered-down version of the reform, which gives police the authority to pursue someone who they reasonably suspect of a violent crime, a sexual crime, vehicular assault, escape, DUI, and domestic violence. Notably, vehicular theft - a crime that has reached unprecedented levels in our state - was not included. **Despite the change, we here at Shift WA recognize the importance of ultimately passing some reform **([**HB 1363**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61534892:sOjO6-DtN:m:1:2610672541:467AFF2FE7DE0F6FA8510D4EEAD7EE53:r))** - watered down or not. **That's why it's so concerning that that the Democrat Senate Chair of the Law and Justice Committee has said she will NOT even move the bill forward. Democrats have made it clear that they are pro-criminal - and we must stand up to them. We need your help to demand the State Senate pass the bill ([**HB 1363**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61534892:sOjO6-DtN:m:1:2610672541:467AFF2FE7DE0F6FA8510D4EEAD7EE53:r)). **Please call the Legislative HOTLINE today at ****1.800.562.6000 and demand that your State Senator push for the passage of **[**HB 1363**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61534892:sOjO6-DtN:m:1:2610672541:467AFF2FE7DE0F6FA8510D4EEAD7EE53:r). Please also sign and share our petition demanding the State Senate pass the bill. >>>**_[SIGN THE PETITION](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61534893:sOjO6-DtN:m:1:2610672541:467AFF2FE7DE0F6FA8510D4EEAD7EE53:r)_** <<< The public safety in communities across our state is at stake. Please join us in demanding the change which our law enforcement professionals needs to help keep our communities safe. Thank you, The Shift WA Team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61534894:sOjO6-DtN:m:1:2610672541:467AFF2FE7DE0F6FA8510D4EEAD7EE53:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14145028&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osOjO6-DtN).
---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: My story in pictures.
body:
I wanted to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.
| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650184%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7CCwL%2b1lQ0Q1SZSAFtEmTg&sysid=1)
---
| | | |
My name is Nikki Haley. **[I wanted to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. After you get to know more about me, I hope you’ll consider joining my team today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650195%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QhBFsiCCBBmyEOUFXDS%2big&sysid=1 "I wanted to tell you a bit
about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. After you get
to know more about me, I hope you’ll consider joining my team today.")**

I’m the proud daughter of legal immigrants. We were the only Indian family in our small, rural southern town. My dad wore a turban. He still does to this day. My mom wore a sari. Nobody knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. I was a brown girl in a black-and-white world.
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650184%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7CCwL%2b1lQ0Q1SZSAFtEmTg&sysid=1)
---
Every day, my family faced stares, whispers, suspicion, and exclusion. Not every day was great. But every day was better than the one before.
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650184%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7CCwL%2b1lQ0Q1SZSAFtEmTg&sysid=1)
---
|
I started doing the books at my mom's store when I was just 13. After graduating from Clemson with an accounting degree and working in the corporate world, I came back to the family store.

I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for the government to take it away. When I mentioned my frustrations to my mom, she said: “Don’t complain. Do something about it.”
So I did. I ran for the state legislature. It wasn’t easy.
---
I was running against a 30-year incumbent. No one said I had a shot.

A week before the primary, I was polling at 15 percent. But together, we fueled a grassroots campaign, took on the status quo, and won. Then, I immediately got to work for the people of my state.

After I served in the state legislature, I ran for governor. I was the underdog. I was the least funded, and least known GOP candidate in the race. But together, we won. Then we cut taxes, created thousands of jobs, and revitalized our economy.
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650184%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7CCwL%2b1lQ0Q1SZSAFtEmTg&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650184%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7CCwL%2b1lQ0Q1SZSAFtEmTg&sysid=1)
---
Then, I was proud to serve our country at the United Nations. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn’t know what hit them.

After I left the UN, I started a grassroots movement to stand for America. I crisscrossed the country to endorse, advise, and financially support more than 60 strong conservative candidates.
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650184%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7CCwL%2b1lQ0Q1SZSAFtEmTg&sysid=1)
---
| _**So who am I?**_

I am a proud American. I am the proud daughter of Indian immigrants and a proud military wife. I am a conservative. I am a mom. And soon a mother-in law! I am a runner. I am an unabashed Clemson Tigers fan. I’ve served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America’s ambassador to the United Nations...and I’m a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country.
---
**[And now, I am running to be your next President of the United States.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650196%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Pz3xyA1AFNF3PFZWLP%2fkHg&sysid=1 "And now, I am running to
be your next President of the United States.")**
---

| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650197%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rsmlf7Dp5nhbCwYlh3lgCQ&sysid=1)
---

We need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people.

I hope you will join me as I embark on this journey and fight for our country.

**[If you’d like to join my team and help me in this fight, I’m humbly asking for your support today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650198%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bDbJn%2fzEcEcnCafTUfYwGw&sysid=1 "If you’d like to join my
team and help me in this fight, I’m humbly asking for your support today.")**

My very best,
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650184%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7CCwL%2b1lQ0Q1SZSAFtEmTg&sysid=1)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650199%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zi3tVcNtwKsrtyzRss6X9w&sysid=1)
---
| | | | |
* * *
**GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH**
A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! All of our merchandise is made in America. **[Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your Nikki Haley for President shirt today.>>](https://secure.winred.com/team-stand-for-america/navy-for-pres-shirt-footer-t?sc=PEmailTV&recurring=true&utm_campaign=20230224_WG-AUN2.103067_nikki-haley_t1314252-2667&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=WG-AUN2.103067&utm_content=20230224_my-story-in-pictures.tv-au-20230224&xunv=20230224_my-story-in-pictures.tv-au-20230224&ex_tid=20230224_WG-AUN2.103067_nikki-haley_t1314252-2667 "Contribute now to support
Nikki Haley and claim your Nikki Haley for President shirt today. >>")**
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650190%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=htLFvP9mEr577FF2WDe8MQ&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [Claim Your Shirt](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650191%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8pPHK%2fxw13BDw4jA49wAfQ&sysid=1 "Claim Your Shirt")
---
| |
**JOIN NIKKI’S TEAM**
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650192%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8eA0tZFW1KTyO4Wkip3JCw&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She’s served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America’s ambassador to the United Nations...and she’s a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country.
Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She’s served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America’s ambassador to the United Nations...and she’s a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country.

Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people.

**[In order to build momentum and get Nikki’s message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki’s team and pitch in a donation today?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650193%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uvgVVjDBpxg%2bY0cARDAf5w&sysid=1 "In order to build momentum
and get Nikki’s message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki’s team
and pitch in a donation today? ")**

Thank you in advance for your support.

Thank you,

Team Haley

P.S. If you don’t have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time to share this with 5 friends today.

---

clean_body: I wanted to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. | | | | | | | | | | My name is Nikki Haley. "I wanted to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. After you get to know more about me, I hope you’ll consider joining my team today." I’m the proud daughter of legal immigrants. We were the only Indian family in our small, rural southern town. My dad wore a turban. He still does to this day. My mom wore a sari. Nobody knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. I was a brown girl in a black-and-white world. | | Every day, my family faced stares, whispers, suspicion, and exclusion. Not every day was great. But every day was better than the one before. | | | | | I started doing the books at my mom's store when I was just 13. After graduating from Clemson with an accounting degree and working in the corporate world, I came back to the family store. I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for the government to take it away. When I mentioned my frustrations to my mom, she said: “Don’t complain. Do something about it.” So I did. I ran for the state legislature. It wasn’t easy. I was running against a 30-year incumbent. No one said I had a shot. A week before the primary, I was polling at 15 percent. But together, we fueled a grassroots campaign, took on the status quo, and won. Then, I immediately got to work for the people of my state. After I served in the state legislature, I ran for governor. I was the underdog. I was the least funded, and least known GOP candidate in the race. But together, we won. Then we cut taxes, created thousands of jobs, and revitalized our economy. | | | | | | Then, I was proud to serve our country at the United Nations. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn’t know what hit them. After I left the UN, I started a grassroots movement to stand for America. I crisscrossed the country to endorse, advise, and financially support more than 60 strong conservative candidates. | | | | | So who am I? I am a proud American. I am the proud daughter of Indian immigrants and a proud military wife. I am a conservative. I am a mom. And soon a mother-in law! I am a runner. I am an unabashed Clemson Tigers fan. I’ve served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America’s ambassador to the United Nations...and I’m a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country. "And now, I am running to be your next President of the United States." | We need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people. I hope you will join me as I embark on this journey and fight for our country. "If you’d like to join my team and help me in this fight, I’m humbly asking for your support today." My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! All of our merchandise is made in America. "Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your Nikki Haley for President shirt today. >>" | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Shirt" | | JOIN NIKKI’S TEAM | "NikkiHaleyPodium" Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She’s served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America’s ambassador to the United Nations...and she’s a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country. Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She’s served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America’s ambassador to the United Nations...and she’s a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country. Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people. "In order to build momentum and get Nikki’s message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki’s team and pitch in a donation today? " Thank you in advance for your support. Thank you, Team Haley P.S. If you don’t have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time to share this with 5 friends today. | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Inc. This is no joke, Peter. The radical left is poised to spend **BILLIONS** (yes, you read that right) of dollars on electing socialist candidates all across the country. The war they are waging is far-reaching, and nothing is off the table. From local school-board elections to the White House, they won’t rest until they’ve re-shaped every aspect of our lives to fit their agenda. And they have their Hollywood donors to back them up and their Big Tech cronies to shut us down. That is why it is so important that we stand up to them and win. We can’t do that unless we have a mass of conservative warriors ready to lead the charge though. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. **I want to talk to you about my best friend in the Senate, John Barrasso. ** John is a Senator from Wyoming, and he’s one of the few people in Washington that is fighting, day and night, against the leftist woke ideology. He’s in the trenches with me to hold China accountable, defend the Second Amendment, advance school choice, and he is DEMANDING American energy independence. **_He’s the sort of guy that belongs in the Senate._** But he needs your help, Peter. With the left’s tsunami of spending coming our way, John needs your help to make sure Republicans are ready to hit back and hit back hard. **[Please, if you’re able, can you chip in $5, $10, $25, or any amount that you can to help us take on the left? ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1cd55faf881f41ecaf02522ffbb33997&_e=_PbXQ60L_hebc_whtBnCSF6p5JQAr3fG4HOOSUxIjuNrgq0mtJrE0kgKTsxUqXpEXT2s5RCKmSpS1sQfTr3kscINrwPoyCw4MKxuC-ZC0iUiaECxn3Lhc_LHsiHXQ_EDnjbg59VIEdYKaKouE1zEODTy8lZGNwovKTabVaBbutworAAxNl5AC5DfPxpo9qovTH9-ICoIXMJ2zoN7z9h6Z1wYmBgwDbEE2LmcUrJUHL4oOsHG3fF2HI1RaY3TsoHPB7iMH6H44pKtjAV9rrM4KAXEvZgQfbhDB1YOEo8oDnb3l-FFmcYbhyymn1LW7-PjkjaoXweTiIQ0IFgiYQ_EH95KcCVT6sKpqLhegc2UUjPGur-i3fBS3d-7NaFChOWS4fxTvEkudWzno9OLSCNVZE4NG9N-GALQdUE82HwYeTXGM_mmGn0ZrlNoaLUwUZz6t3mM6OlexfvT5jDobviuug%3D%3D)** It might not seem like much, but I promise your support is what will make the difference between who controls the power in Washington.

clean_body: Will you help my friend?| | | | | Peter, I was reading the news this morning, and I came across an article that made my skin crawl. This is no joke, Peter. The radical left is poised to spend BILLIONS (yes, you read that right) of dollars on electing socialist candidates all across the country. The war they are waging is far-reaching, and nothing is off the table. From local school-board elections to the White House, they won’t rest until they’ve re-shaped every aspect of our lives to fit their agenda. And they have their Hollywood donors to back them up and their Big Tech cronies to shut us down. That is why it is so important that we stand up to them and win. We can’t do that unless we have a mass of conservative warriors ready to lead the charge though. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. I want to talk to you about my best friend in the Senate, John Barrasso. John is a Senator from Wyoming, and he’s one of the few people in Washington that is fighting, day and night, against the leftist woke ideology. He’s in the trenches with me to hold China accountable, defend the Second Amendment, advance school choice, and he is DEMANDING American energy independence. He’s the sort of guy that belongs in the Senate. But he needs your help, Peter. With the left’s tsunami of spending coming our way, John needs your help to make sure Republicans are ready to hit back and hit back hard. It might not seem like much, but I promise your support is what will make the difference between who controls the power in Washington. | | Thank you, Tim Scott Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. subject: I’m just a dirt farmer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59190586/393513736/73003207?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3962-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjgwZWY4Zi02OWI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9LwM26vJ-nu5UpU57qFRTV7hMG966eBwat7NjegeDU=)
Hi there, can I tell you a little story about me?

I grew up on my family’s farm, and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me.

When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there — but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor.

Here’s why I’m telling you this: Just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained T-shirts, **my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government.**

With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency.

**I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state across the country.**
[**I’m officially running for reelection, so here’s the part where I ask: Can you become a Founding Donor of my campaign to help us block Mitch McConnell from retaking the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59190587/393513737/73003207?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3962-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjgwZWY4Zi02OWI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9LwM26vJ-nu5UpU57qFRTV7hMG966eBwat7NjegeDU=)

clean_body: | | | = Hi there, can I tell you a little story about me? I grew up on my family’s farm, and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me. When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there — but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor. Here’s why I’m telling you this: Just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained T-shirts, my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government. With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency. I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state across the country. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Jon Tester and Kirsten Gillibrand: | | | = | = | | = | = You don’t need 10 fingers to know right from wrong and you can bet I’m going to spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country. I appreciate your support, and anything you can pitch in today will go a long way for our grassroots campaign. Thanks again, Jon | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Corey DeAngelis
subject: School choice is under attack in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62361304:6cURt7GNn:m:1:3331421248:5E628DB1D1BAF5402442B45401C9348C:r)
---
| | Hi Peter, Corey DeAngelis here, Senior Fellow at the American Federation for Children. I don't know what I'm more surprised by, the fact that Katie Hobbs is blatantly lying about school choice bankrupting her state **or** that she wants to rip away education freedom from vulnerable families in Arizona. She has attempted to paint school choice as an unfair system and a detriment to public schools **which is simply not true**. The reality is that school choice provides opportunity and hope for families who otherwise would not have access to quality education for their children. As a beneficiary of a private school education herself, you would think she wouldn't fight to prevent other students from having that same opportunity.
---

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: The Democrat Fundraising Playbook
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
If the Democrats have used it successfully, we should too! | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61534983:soFNp-DNe:m:1:877327319:012AE214FEA0E55FE0E114EA92BD116E:r)
---

Fellow American - Wouldn't it be nice to steal a page from the Democrats' campaign playbook?

Republicans have a major problem: Democrats are killing us in the small-dollar fundraising competition because they start fundraising early, _**sometimes before there is even a nominee.**_

In 2020, The Radical Left was livid at Senator Susan Collins (R-ME) for voting to confirm Justice Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court, so they went after her with a vengeance. Democrats used what's known as a "Senate Nominee Fund" in their attempt to defeat Senator Collins. _**Here's what it looked like:**_

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61534983:soFNp-DNe:m:1:877327319:012AE214FEA0E55FE0E114EA92BD116E:r)
Essentially, they raised money into an account that was given to whoever won the Democrat Party's nomination for U.S. Senate in Maine. **As soon as their candidate won the primary, she got an instant infusion of $4.1 million on DAY ONE of the general election!**

The Left uses these funds - similar to a GoFundMe page - to kickstart their challenger candidates, so they don't miss a beat after the primary. They can begin their attacks immediately.

**Meanwhile, our Republican candidates often emerge from competitive primaries bruised, bloodied, and broke.** It usually takes our nominees weeks - if not months - to recover and raise money. This wastes valuable time and allows the Democrats' attacks to go unanswered.

**[IT'S TIME TO STEAL A PAGE FROM THE DEMOCRATS' PLAYBOOK!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61534983:soFNp-DNe:m:1:877327319:012AE214FEA0E55FE0E114EA92BD116E:r)**
We can help our Republican nominees win critical races in competitive states, but we must start NOW to be successful. **[Right now, Republican "Senate Nominee Funds" are already up and running, and I'm counting on your help to fill them.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61534983:soFNp-DNe:m:1:877327319:012AE214FEA0E55FE0E114EA92BD116E:r)**

**I'm focusing on the Senate Nominee Funds for the critical races in Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia. These are Red states that have Blue senators. If we flip these seats, Republicans will take back the Senate majority next year!**

If you're tired of being beaten by the Democrats and ready to take back the Senate to save this country before it's too late, **[will you chip in $10, $15, $30, or more so our Republican nominees have the resources they need on DAY ONE of the general election?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61534983:soFNp-DNe:m:1:877327319:012AE214FEA0E55FE0E114EA92BD116E:r)**

We cannot let Democrats win the small-dollar money competition any longer. **[Fellow American, please help kickstart our 2024 campaigns by giving directly to these critical Senate Nominee Funds today!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61534983:soFNp-DNe:m:1:877327319:012AE214FEA0E55FE0E114EA92BD116E:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61534983:soFNp-DNe:m:1:877327319:012AE214FEA0E55FE0E114EA92BD116E:r)
Lindsey Graham

P.S. It may seem like election day is far away, but I promise you Fellow American, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and the Democrats are already raising millions to protect their majority. Your support today will help us flip these seats AND win back the Senate majority! **[Please chip in $5 or even $25 directly to these key races right now!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61534983:soFNp-DNe:m:1:877327319:012AE214FEA0E55FE0E114EA92BD116E:r)**

| [** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61534983:soFNp-DNe:m:1:877327319:012AE214FEA0E55FE0E114EA92BD116E:r)
---

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61534984:soFNp-DNe:m:1:877327319:012AE214FEA0E55FE0E114EA92BD116E:r)
For text updates from Team Graham, **[click this link to subscribe!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61534984:soFNp-DNe:m:1:877327319:012AE214FEA0E55FE0E114EA92BD116E:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61534985:soFNp-DNe:m:1:877327319:012AE214FEA0E55FE0E114EA92BD116E:r)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61534985:soFNp-DNe:m:1:877327319:012AE214FEA0E55FE0E114EA92BD116E:r)

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Before the weekend ends: fighting racism
body:
It's funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvd134cuinud21kfpbgckpv18bb0jttp5j5nbt70_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hm0oj5clh2bs)

Friend,

It's funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month.

But it's hard to ignore Sanger's racism when even Planned Parenthood has stated that Sanger believed in eugenics,

_"**An inherently racist and ableist ideology** that labeled certain people unfit to have children. . . [and] caused irreparable damage to the health and lives of generations of Black people, Latino people, Indigenous people, immigrants, people with disabilities, people with low incomes, and many others."_

Time and time again, abortion apologists try to justify her beliefs in eugenics, but it's hard to explain away quotes like:

_**" We do not want word to go out that we want to exterminate the Negro population."**_
-- Margaret Sanger

Before I tell you the full story, I want to introduce myself. My name is Brandon Tatum, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm53arfqanjma8gksr3m4kccv6rfii633blbvplo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hm0oj5clh2bs)

BLEXIT focuses on teaching Black and minority communities about the importance of freedom, faith, and family to get them away from Planned Parenthood, CRT indoctrination, and the victimhood mentality.

I've set a goal of raising $50,000 this month to promote families over abortion, and I need your help to reach that goal.

[_**Will you send your support with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3fpfm45a4fs4udvkqhilvnuvkh3suica71lg43g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hm0oj5clh2bs)

Planned Parenthood is a racist organization that takes advantage of vulnerable teens and young adults in Black and minority communities:

79% of Planned Parenthoods are within walking distance of communities with a higher proportion of Black and Latina women.

**Because Planned Parenthood comes into Black communities,****they have surgically aborted 20 MILLION Black babies****.**

Since 1973, Planned Parenthood has effectively cut the Black population in half.

Now, abortion is the leading cause of death amongst Black Americans.

Unlike many of these causes of death -- like cancer, heart disease, or accidental deaths -- abortion isn't an accident or a sickness.

**Abortion is murder. **

I know it's cliche to call people racists. I'm sick of it. But Planned Parenthood and abortion need to end.

clean_body: It's funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month. Friend, It's funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month. But it's hard to ignore Sanger's racism when even Planned Parenthood has stated that Sanger believed in eugenics, "An inherently racist and ableist ideology that labeled certain people unfit to have children. . . [and] caused irreparable damage to the health and lives of generations of Black people, Latino people, Indigenous people, immigrants, people with disabilities, people with low incomes, and many others." Time and time again, abortion apologists try to justify her beliefs in eugenics, but it's hard to explain away quotes like: " We do not want word to go out that we want to exterminate the Negro population." -- Margaret Sanger Before I tell you the full story, I want to introduce myself. My name is Brandon Tatum, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT focuses on teaching Black and minority communities about the importance of freedom, faith, and family to get them away from Planned Parenthood, CRT indoctrination, and the victimhood mentality. I've set a goal of raising $50,000 this month to promote families over abortion, and I need your help to reach that goal. Planned Parenthood is a racist organization that takes advantage of vulnerable teens and young adults in Black and minority communities: 79% of Planned Parenthoods are within walking distance of communities with a higher proportion of Black and Latina women. Because Planned Parenthood comes into Black communities,they have surgically aborted 20 MILLION Black babies. Since 1973, Planned Parenthood has effectively cut the Black population in half. Now, abortion is the leading cause of death amongst Black Americans. Unlike many of these causes of death -- like cancer, heart disease, or accidental deaths -- abortion isn't an accident or a sickness. Abortion is murder. I know it's cliche to call people racists. I'm sick of it. But Planned Parenthood and abortion need to end. BLEXIT is teaching people to value life and the sanctity of every individual. We stress the importance of supporting families and how the nuclear family can heal Black and minority communities. By building strong families and educating future generations about the history of our great country, we can change the narrative surrounding America's minority communities. Your generous support helps the BLEXIT Foundation fight for our country, empower minority communities with our message, and win the hearts and minds of thousands. With your help, BLEXIT can put an end to abortion in Black communities. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

That’s what we needed to raise every day in February in order to hit our goal. Unfortunately, we’ve been coming up short (by a lot). Don’t get me wrong, I understand when supporters need to take a break from giving — and we are so thankful for everyone in this community, no matter how much or how often you give. Eva

| | | Republicans gutted train safety rules during the Trump administration, and we saw the results with the recent disaster in East Palestine, Ohio. And yet, incredibly, Republicans in Congress are blocking Democratic efforts to fix the problem. [**Add Your Name: Demand Republicans Stop Blocking Reasonable Train Safety Rules >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9bf8468-9482-40b6-86ff-46a17363ff3b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Republicans knew exactly what they were doing and risking when they slashed these rules. Way back in 2018, Fortune Magazine ran a headline that was pretty close to a crystal ball: [_" Trump Rolls Back Train-Braking Rule Meant to Keep Oil Tankers from Exploding Near Communities"_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f38757a-1e91-409a-bd9d-2b226f1da1eb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And yet, Republicans still oppose sensible steps -- and they are putting us on the fast track to the next disaster. [**Don't let them get away with this. ****Add your name: Demand Republicans Stop Blocking Reasonable Train Safety Rules >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T411e3c6f-adc4-487a-a7e5-42c30e036e68/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Are you ready for the horse race?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
|
---
Friend,

You probably know that I do a lot of focus groups. And since we’re starting to see the 2024 Republican presidential primary heat up, I wanted to know what Republican voters are thinking about the race. So far, Nikki Haley officially announced she’s running. Trump is already in the race. And others like Ron DeSantis are expected to jump in. DeSantis is widely seen as Trump’s most formidable opponent. I wanted to see just how true that was for real voters and find out more about what a Trump vs. DeSantis showdown would look like. [Listen to my recent episode of The Focus Group podcast here to find out what I learned](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VX0V7374hhQmW2S83W98Cr695W8BHpjy4XqrY_MwF3V73q90_V1-WJV7CgJQgW25bpSN6k1Wk4N1CCH0x8NH14W3YH4FP872VpSW6zgJhf1mznR_W9dmxqB7hCQcKW58L_Sq5C2HtvW3FtGcy6fRMNZW5QtZb-7cC1jMW502qb57-m8CjMBgVmJ9NkK5W90WgQ48CgtCCW7NXS6Q6lFH7WW8CRBbM4mXKwqW4y56Ll7ysvmsW8YY2w57d9fqGW7qd3Tj64S2gFW41bNQ866pxj4W8_n7nh5Dn73sW2GM3YL40Ws_vW5_mvbQ20lNfzW3XWFN931lGDqW3-Rv_F7YfwzvVPNzWg4RQFQxVLh3ZM2j4pMWM7P7p7_fWYSW5y7pms48MHGNW4hNGvZ5WrHTFW6fdc971fhVMHW70xGwH5x9tbVVtQZ-W7b-RG735_p1). I was joined by Tara Palmeri of Puck News, and she brings in her own reporting from the Trump and DeSantis camps to add her insight to what we heard from voters. One thing is certain: It won’t be a boring primary. So if you’re wondering if DeSantis has what it takes to go against Trump, how low Trump is willing to go, and whether or not Republican voters are really ready to move on from Trump, [**you won’t want to miss this**](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VX0V7374hhQmW2S83W98Cr695W8BHpjy4XqrY_MwF3V73q90_V1-WJV7CgNbvW4-PVDT6H2F7gW6z4m-D1j9V9yW8WBSSb1Stmj4W5YfyGz4MPM0lW1RW6CY6csfs7N7ljPmGYgnPgW3YwCvb8zHNhYW66bm904GkGB-VKhD6d6hktv5W5H4Ll35M0HGkW3Nc12m432NGxW4GFfZM231KzFW9hVxgs2GQ8SfW46XWZC90BrfgW5j37vm1xQfnFW5Mjn9J29bmZHW5Z4pVk7t--BHW3YtD5X34qTyfW2bg25M4Mg9bRW4CjFv_2VK7jBW6wNb0D6xLRbWW4g1KJ654F0RTW49WCvK1K6Q56VcXBY-3pJ-KnW4F586g3pvMNbW54MyHg7Sg74JW8bDjPd5hc7xhW27gZRp3nJcTNVS4rd83Ddg7DW4zWVZL2SfPN-3fRq1). Conversations like these will help inform our strategy as we get closer to 2024. I hope you’ll give it a listen. Sarah Longwell President and Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC
---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Growing up poor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor
in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going
to stand for that.

Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and
the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs
to name just two.

Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I
worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in
Congress.

The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht,
the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving
relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an
America that lives up to its ideals.

As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned
growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.

I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re
going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18893?t=1001&akid=3005%2E346206%2Ei0v-4P ]Can you please split a $25 contribution between Charles Booker and my
United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so
important.

CHIP IN →

The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to
sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do
yet, either.

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230224-3005-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3005_346206_i0v-4P&akid=3005%2E346206%2Ei0v-4P

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3005%2E346206%2Ei0v-4P

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brencia=20Berry?=
subject: 2023 So Far
body:
Special Elections and Black History Month | | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends,
Tuesday, Democrats up and down the ticket demonstrated that they are building on the hard work of the 2022 midterm cycle. Several decisive races across the country show that voters continue to choose Democratic candidates fighting for them. First, we saw Representative-Elect Jennifer McClellan secure a nearly 50-point victory in Virginia’s fourth congressional district, building up on a 30-point democratic success in 2022 and a 36-point win in 2020. She will become the first Black woman elected to Congress in Virginia with her victory. In addition to this historic first, we saw many other critical races. In Wisconsin, we saw record turnout for the Supreme Court primary elections; Janet Protasiewicz secured nearly half of the vote. Cassie Chambers had the most substantial win of the night in Kentucky, overperforming by almost 30%. Finally, in New Hampshire, Chuck Grassie was able to retain his seat, giving the Republicans only a 2-seat majority in the state house. Thank you for your tireless work that helps advance Democratic values and for fighting with us for a better future.
Best,
Brencia Berry
Director of Coalitions and Community Engagement
Democratic National Committee
---
|
---
|
---
| **Congratulations to Representative-Elect Jennifer McClellan!** Former Virginia State Senator Jennifer McClellan will become the first Black woman to ever represent the commonwealth of Virginia. Representative-Elect McClellan succeeds the late Representative Donald McEachin, maintaining the seat in Democratic hands.
---
|
---
| **Happy Black History Month!** Please see a message from the DNC Black Caucus Chair, Virgie M Rollins, below: **Greetings,**
**Congratulations to those around the country and abroad who made 2022 a success! ** **While others may have doubted, calling for a "red wave", we were steadfast, hosting Regional Summits to energize voters and support Black leaders. Yet again, Black voters stopped that wave and made sure that Democrats won up and down the ballot.** **This month, it is critical that we continue to bring Black history to the forefront and to take pride in Black history as we move forward.**
**In solidarity,
Virgie M Rollins
Chair, DNC Black Caucus**
The Biden-Harris Administration has celebrated Black History Month in a variety of ways as well:
---
|
---
**VPOTUS Invites HBCU Students to the White House**
On Thursday, Vice President Harris and Senior Advisor for Public Engagement Keisha Lance Bottoms hosted HBCU student journalists from across the country at the White House where they discussed issues impacting students and their institutions.
| **Emmett Till: Nearly 70 Years Later**
The President hosted a screening of “Till,” the story of Mamie Till-Mobley who pursued justice after the lynching of her 14-year-old son, Emmett Till, in 1955. In attendance were 150 guests, including actors, film producers, partners of the film, family members of Emmett Till, civil rights leaders, historians, student groups from Mississippi and Illinois, and community activists who are working to combat hate-fueled violence in Buffalo, New York and Charleston, South Carolina.

**Prioritizing Equity Since Day One**
On his first day in office, President Biden signed Executive Order 13985 to emphasize the enormous human costs of systemic racism and persistent poverty, and provide a powerful and unprecedented mandate for all federal agencies to launch a whole-of-government approach to equity. To strengthen the federal government’s ability to address the barriers that underserved communities continue to face, today, President Biden signed a new Executive Order, [Further Advancing Racial Equity and Support for Underserved Communities Through the Federal Government](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8ad270afc5&e=d6c5c7d7ec). This second Order reaffirms the Administration’s commitment to deliver equity and build an America in which all can participate, prosper, and reach their full potential.

**HBCU Love**
On Friday, Assistant to the President for National Security Affairs Jake Sullivan met with 18 leaders of Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCUs) to discuss a range of issues, including partnerships to advance national security, recruitment of graduates from their campuses for national security careers, and campus security. This was the first ever engagement with HBCU leaders by a national security advisor.

Just down the hall, the White House Office of Public Engagement also hosted over 60 Historically Black College and University (HBCU) student veterans and Reserve Officers’ Training Corps (ROTC) students from seven HBCUs for the White House Student Veterans and Cadets Forum. This was a first-of-its-kind event to amplify the President’s ongoing commitment to supporting HBCUs, service members, veterans, and their families.

**Supporting Minority-Owned Businesses**
Last week, Second Gentleman Doug Emhoff, SBA Administrator Isabel Guzman and Deputy Treasury Secretary Wally Adeyemo hit the road to support local businesses across the country.
---
|
---
|
---
| **The Biden-Harris Administration Saves Homebuyers and Homeowners $800 per Year**

The Department of Housing and Urban Development will reduce its annual mortgage insurance premium by 0.30 percent, from 0.85% to 0.55% for most new borrowers. Vice President Kamala Harris and Secretary Marcia Fudge made the announcement today in Bowie, Maryland. On average, American families will save roughly $800 a year. You can read more on the new change at the link below: [FACT SHEET: BIDEN-HARRIS ADMINISTRATION ANNOUNCES ACTION TO SAVE HOMEBUYERS AND HOMEOWNERS $800 PER YEAR](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1a8ee5ac2e&e=d6c5c7d7ec) Bloomberg: [US to Cut Mortgage Insurance Costs for Some New Homeowners](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ff8d6f8dea&e=d6c5c7d7ec) Reuters: [White House to roll out plan to lower first-time home buyers’ mortgage costs](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9df669cf34&e=d6c5c7d7ec) Wall Street Journal: [Biden Administration to Cut Mortgage Insurance Costs for Lower-Income Buyers](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ccc79a46ea&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
|
---
| **The Biden-Harris Administration’s Ongoing Efforts to Cleanup Ohio Train Derailment** The U.S. Environmental Protection Agency has ordered Norfolk Southern to conduct all necessary actions associated with the cleanup from the East Palestine, Ohio, train derailment. EPA’s order marks the transition of the multi-agency response from its “emergency phase” to a longer-term remediation phase. As part of EPA’s legally binding order, Norfolk Southern will be required to:
* Identify and clean up contaminated soil and water resources.
* Reimburse EPA for cleaning services to be offered to residents and businesses to provide an additional layer of reassurance, which will be conducted by EPA staff and contractors.
* Attend and participate in public meetings at EPA’s request and post information online.
* Pay for EPA’s costs for work performed under this order.

Read more on the EPA’s efforts at the link below: Fact Sheet: [Biden-Harris Administration Deploys Additional Federal Resources to East Palestine, Ohio - The White House](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=bb0dbc00d6&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---

clean_body: Special Elections and Black History Month | | | | | | | Dear Friends, Tuesday, Democrats up and down the ticket demonstrated that they are building on the hard work of the 2022 midterm cycle. Several decisive races across the country show that voters continue to choose Democratic candidates fighting for them. First, we saw Representative-Elect Jennifer McClellan secure a nearly 50-point victory in Virginia’s fourth congressional district, building up on a 30-point democratic success in 2022 and a 36-point win in 2020. She will become the first Black woman elected to Congress in Virginia with her victory. In addition to this historic first, we saw many other critical races. In Wisconsin, we saw record turnout for the Supreme Court primary elections; Janet Protasiewicz secured nearly half of the vote. Cassie Chambers had the most substantial win of the night in Kentucky, overperforming by almost 30%. Finally, in New Hampshire, Chuck Grassie was able to retain his seat, giving the Republicans only a 2-seat majority in the state house. Thank you for your tireless work that helps advance Democratic values and for fighting with us for a better future. Best, Brencia Berry Director of Coalitions and Community Engagement Democratic National Committee | | | Congratulations to Representative-Elect Jennifer McClellan! Former Virginia State Senator Jennifer McClellan will become the first Black woman to ever represent the commonwealth of Virginia. Representative-Elect McClellan succeeds the late Representative Donald McEachin, maintaining the seat in Democratic hands. | | Happy Black History Month! Please see a message from the DNC Black Caucus Chair, Virgie M Rollins, below: Greetings, Congratulations to those around the country and abroad who made 2022 a success! While others may have doubted, calling for a "red wave", we were steadfast, hosting Regional Summits to energize voters and support Black leaders. Yet again, Black voters stopped that wave and made sure that Democrats won up and down the ballot. This month, it is critical that we continue to bring Black history to the forefront and to take pride in Black history as we move forward. In solidarity, Virgie M Rollins Chair, DNC Black Caucus The Biden-Harris Administration has celebrated Black History Month in a variety of ways as well: | VPOTUS Invites HBCU Students to the White House On Thursday, Vice President Harris and Senior Advisor for Public Engagement Keisha Lance Bottoms hosted HBCU student journalists from across the country at the White House where they discussed issues impacting students and their institutions. | Emmett Till: Nearly 70 Years Later The President hosted a screening of “Till,” the story of Mamie Till-Mobley who pursued justice after the lynching of her 14-year-old son, Emmett Till, in 1955. name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Before the weekend ends: fighting racism
body:
It's funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqabvqgbfv3b5i4aklmf94n25bov2d68cfnsc6e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmaob4s3h2bs)

Friend,

It's funny how you never hear about the racist origins of Planned Parenthood during Black History Month.

But it's hard to ignore Sanger's racism when even Planned Parenthood has stated that Sanger believed in eugenics,

_"**An inherently racist and ableist ideology** that labeled certain people unfit to have children. . . [and] caused irreparable damage to the health and lives of generations of Black people, Latino people, Indigenous people, immigrants, people with disabilities, people with low incomes, and many others."_

Time and time again, abortion apologists try to justify her beliefs in eugenics, but it's hard to explain away quotes like:

_**" We do not want word to go out that we want to exterminate the Negro population."**_
-- Margaret Sanger

Before I tell you the full story, I want to introduce myself. My name is Brandon Tatum, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl01i1c1lta9n24au3hhnmrgb3bpg76utq6qfg20_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmaob4s3h2bs)

BLEXIT focuses on teaching Black and minority communities about the importance of freedom, faith, and family to get them away from Planned Parenthood, CRT indoctrination, and the victimhood mentality.

I've set a goal of raising $50,000 this month to promote families over abortion, and I need your help to reach that goal.

[_**Will you send your support with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs33hs8a7cllk8hap69k174s8mhdq33rh0o5tj48_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmaob4s3h2bs)

Planned Parenthood is a racist organization that takes advantage of vulnerable teens and young adults in Black and minority communities:

79% of Planned Parenthoods are within walking distance of communities with a higher proportion of Black and Latina women.

**Because Planned Parenthood comes into Black communities,****they have surgically aborted 20 MILLION Black babies****.**

Since 1973, Planned Parenthood has effectively cut the Black population in half.

Now, abortion is the leading cause of death amongst Black Americans.

Unlike many of these causes of death -- like cancer, heart disease, or accidental deaths -- abortion isn't an accident or a sickness.

**Abortion is murder. **

I know it's cliche to call people racists. I'm sick of it. But Planned Parenthood and abortion need to end.

[_**Can I count on you to join the fight against the racism and murder perpetuated by Planned Parenthood? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6dkoeio8qk5rgs5oatbubhmsnprnohop1bjhqng_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmaob4s3h2bs)

BLEXIT is teaching people to value life and the sanctity of every individual.

We stress the importance of supporting families and how the nuclear family can heal Black and minority communities.

By building strong families and educating future generations about the history of our great country, we can change the narrative surrounding America's minority communities.

Your generous support helps the BLEXIT Foundation fight for our country, empower minority communities with our message, and win the hearts and minds of thousands.

[_**Please consider supporting BLEXIT Foundation with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount. Click here to send your donation >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu627297cb1s8tpjrkpurrivem1ulk6csr56q7f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmaob4s3h2bs)

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zitr54cpl12ma3mpgql1n04nck5a1pda39d6i4co_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmaob4s3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb98kbt1fk1ek9i28h9v69lt9rvotp0rrjamv0d0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmaob4s3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znpht6ee3uanlqhluara9g58guru4j36qvd27e0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmaob4s3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2vrso0stll1n7uhra3kfdj9nuinq9u96g6s0oc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmaob4s3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo4rg8jj2ugqls1t0no39qmeve5fvgfmkvdrt4sg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmaob4s3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjei9kdocd3ali0bfcfhvivofdto5pgsrlpdf838_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmaob4s3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmsqtfbo8jjccpjipkd8kcm4nmik4103c4a9k3kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmaob4s3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmqoci976u4q3t8gsv02jlnck27v9b7el533ks90_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmaob4s3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znbr0kpie1rvrftbs0lub1nj82v3bu0v89521or0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmaob4s3h2bs)

With your help, BLEXIT can put an end to abortion in Black communities.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

name: American Update
subject: Breaking: FTX Founder Sam Bankman-Fried Hit with New Charges and Faces Decades More in Prison
body:
And Trump’s Trifecta: 24 Hours Of NEEDED Leadership

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650147%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xcFQEndmvrJrNfUXcJMdEg&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650148%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y8%2fNxly98h68i77ZFvRKPA&sysid=1 Breaking: FTX Founder Sam Bankman-Fried Hit with New Charges and Faces Decades More in Prison

FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried faces potentially decades more in prison as new charges are added to superseding indictment, including conspiracy to operate an unlicensed money transmitting business and conspiracy to make unlawful political contributions and defraud the Securities and Exchange Commission.

name: Team IDCCA
subject: The Party Builder Awards Are Not To Be Missed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
Governor Pritzker and the rest of our Democrats are joining in celebration!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4SAEXiGByW9x2_H77jxK3ONj50LEhwNA-9boQlfFv_o=/zYYnehn_1oXEoGRmBkCB62YiXAvDn5HoXEPoERAiPBs=?refcode=EM_EV_230224PB3_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_Logo)
Fellow Democrat,

You are a valued member of the Democratic Party and a huge supporter of our mission here at the IDCCA. Which is why we would love to see you at the 2023 IDCCA Party Builder Awards at Chicago Navy Pier - **happening in just 10 days!**

Please join us alongside **Governor JB Pritzker** and all of Illinois' Constitutional Officers in honoring **Deborah Cosey-Lane** and **Michael Macellaio** for their dedication to helping working families across the state.

You don't want to miss out on one of our most prestigious events of the year, and the opportunity to hear from some of Illinois' top Democratic officials!

**[To become a sponsor or buy individual tickets click this link to RSVP.](https://act.myngp.com/el/4SAEXiGByW9x2_H77jxK3ONj50LEhwNA-9boQlfFv_o=/1ZRzZbVkG5qzFBRV-0qfBSxWPcMb_dsdV0ARAOFXgcQ=?refcode=EM_EV_230224PB3_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_L1)**

You can find more information about the event and how to get your ticket below:

_**Please join us for IDCCA 's 2023 Party Builder Awards**_

**WHEN:** Monday, March 6th from 5:30pm - 7:00pm

**WHERE:** Offshore Rooftop, 1000 E Grand Ave, Chicago

**Honorary Event Co-Chairs:** Bob Reiter, President of the Chicago Federation of Labor & Tim Drea, President of the Illinois AFL-CIO

**Honorary Event Host Committee:** Hon. JB Pritzker, Hon. Juliana Stratton, Hon. Kwame Raoul, Hon. Mike Frerichs, Hon. Alexi Giannoulias, Hon. Don Harmon, Hon. Emanuel "Chris" Welch, Hon. Lisa Hernandez, Hon. Susana Mendoza, and Hon. Toni Preckwinkle

clean_body: Governor Pritzker and the rest of our Democrats are joining in celebration! Fellow Democrat, You are a valued member of the Democratic Party and a huge supporter of our mission here at the IDCCA. Which is why we would love to see you at the 2023 IDCCA Party Builder Awards at Chicago Navy Pier - happening in just 10 days! Please join us alongside Governor JB Pritzker and all of Illinois' Constitutional Officers in honoring Deborah Cosey-Lane and Michael Macellaio for their dedication to helping working families across the state. You don't want to miss out on one of our most prestigious events of the year, and the opportunity to hear from some of Illinois' top Democratic officials! You can find more information about the event and how to get your ticket below: Please join us for IDCCA 's 2023 Party Builder Awards WHEN: Monday, March 6th from 5:30pm - 7:00pm WHERE: Offshore Rooftop, 1000 E Grand Ave, Chicago Honorary Event Co-Chairs: Bob Reiter, President of the Chicago Federation of Labor & Tim Drea, President of the Illinois AFL-CIO Honorary Event Host Committee: Hon. JB Pritzker, Hon. Juliana Stratton, Hon. Kwame Raoul, Hon. Mike Frerichs, Hon. Alexi Giannoulias, Hon. Don Harmon, Hon. Emanuel "Chris" Welch, Hon. Lisa Hernandez, Hon. Susana Mendoza, and Hon. name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: Approaching the Halfway Point
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _Approaching the Halfway Point_
---
The first bill of the 2023 legislative session has been signed, and with important deadlines approaching (and some having already passed), next week is shaping up to be a busy few days for legislators at the statehouse. SB 2, the first bill signed by Governor Holcomb, will enable small business owners who file individual income taxes to fully deduct their state tax payments from their federal taxes, allowing each one to potentially save hundreds or even thousands of dollars in federal taxes. These businesses are essential to our state's economy, and this legislation is another step forward in our efforts to foster and promote a business environment that encourages growth and supports our Hoosier entrepreneurs. As you can read further down, many of the priority bills of our Republican caucuses and Governor Holcomb continue to move through the legislative process, passing out of committees and onto chamber floors. Collectively, these bills focus on cutting taxes, making historic investments in education, strengthening public safety, reaffirming parental rights, protecting Hoosiers' data privacy, and more. There's still a long time to go, but Republican legislators are hard at work, set to _again_ deliver results for Hoosiers. And as Governor Holcomb has said about the session so far, "We came out of the gate strong." Enjoy this week's newsletter and share it with a friend. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| |
# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# _Visiting Valparaiso, Celebrating Success_
---
---
| | _**Governor Eric Holcomb** speaks to students at Valparaiso High School._
---
This week,**Governor Eric Holcomb **visited Valparaiso High School to celebrate its football state championship and to present them team with a congratulatory resolution authored by State Rep. Ed Soliday and State Sen. Ed Charbonneau. Afterward, he toured many of the school's STEAM classes and facilities. "Thank you for making history," **Gov. Holcomb** said to an audience of seniors and the football team. "Thank you for doing it the right way. Sometimes it's the long way, sometimes it's the hard way, but you did it the right way. And this, what you achieved, this will live on forever." Later in the day, he spoke with [local media](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/132529944ececa7f/27cf3c3e8f7273aac3d6b838967d376c/40313) about Indiana's continued momentum and his role in telling the Hoosier success story. “Indiana is on a roll. We’re experiencing such positive momentum, and it didn't start yesterday. Over time, that stability, certainty, and continuity really breeds confidence.” — **Gov. Holcomb** During the discussion, **Gov. Holcomb** highlighted the importance of telling Indiana's story to our long-term economic succuss. “You’ve got to go out and share the good news," he stated. "We go all over the world. Foreign and domestic investment doesn't happen unless we're out sharing the good news and sharing our Indiana story.”
---
|
---
# _Become a Digital Member_
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/132529944ececa7f/b8c7635e69eab0e8c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
We’re not letting up for a moment to elect Republicans up and down the ballot across Indiana. Our strong and united Indiana Republican Party got the job done to keep our great state **dark red** on November 8, 2022, and now is the time to prepare for the fights ahead. You can help us do just that by [signing up for a digital membership](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/132529944ececa7f/e04aed804b69de3cc3d6b838967d376c/40313) —you’ll receive a membership card in the mail and be an official part of our team of digital supporters that’s helping us keep Indiana a Republican stronghold.
---
| | |
---
# _Another Busy Week at the Statehouse_
---
Bills continue to move out of committees at the statehouse, while others have moved from one chamber to the other. _Priority Bills of House Republicans_ This week, HB [1001](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/132529944ececa7f/7285eb6e3b91d797c3d6b838967d376c/40313) and [1002](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/132529944ececa7f/8599728453759bc3c3d6b838967d376c/40313) passed the chamber. HB 1001 is the budget bill and HB 1002 would establish career scholarship accounts students could use to pay for workforce training such as apprenticeships, internships and coursework outside of their school corporation. So far, HBs 1005, 1006, and 1007 have passed. Other priority bill have cleared committees and are on a second or third reading. _Priority Bills of Senate Republicans_ This week, [SB 4](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/132529944ececa7f/902e6b7c7db6f6c4c3d6b838967d376c/40313), passed the chamber. SB 4 would establish the Local Public Health Fund grant to support local health departments that voluntarily choose to provide additional public health services. Other priority bills have cleared committees and are on a second or third reading. Many other bills are moving. To stay up-to-date, visit [iga.in.gov](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/132529944ececa7f/e3d9eef084fcfcd0c3d6b838967d376c/40313) and check back here next week.
---
|
---
# _CNBC: Key Fed inflation measure rose 0.6% in January, more than expected_

---
Somebody get President Biden some new talking points. From the _[CNBC](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/132529944ececa7f/7cdb71a72667f9e3c3d6b838967d376c/40313):_ A measure the Federal Reserve watches closely to gauge inflation rose more than expected in January, indicating the central bank has more work to do to bring down prices. The personal consumption expenditures price index excluding food and energy increased 0.6% for the month, and was up 4.7% from a year ago, the Commerce Department reported Friday. Wall Street had been expecting respective readings of 0.5% and 4.4%. The core PCE gains were 0.4% and 4.6% in December. Markets fell following the report, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average off around 500 points in morning trading. “This morning’s strong inflation data continued the recent spate of market-unfriendly news. This could keep the policy rate higher for longer than the market had hoped, which in turn will likely pressure earnings,” said Matt Peron, director of research at Janus Henderson Investors. _
Story continues._
