| | This next week (Feb 28th- 4 March) will be a week we are watching closely in the Nebraska Legislature. The 4 bills highlighted above need your support. There are 3 main ways to support this legislation and timing is important:1- Call your [Representatives](https://www.ne.gop/so/adOQ16l4K/c?w=0auqsX2wv6Ok0geTv-2xQRsYN9TUxbX6lriV3dQnG24.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9zZW5hdG9ycy9zZW5hdG9yX2xpc3QucGhwIiwiciI6IjY3NWJiMmQzLTVlMjQtNDAyZi1jOGQzLTE1MjExYmRjNDRmNiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjQxOGMxNzYxLWVkZDMtNGMxYS1iMDY0LWMwYmFjOWQwMjY0ZiJ9)2-*Write public comment to support the bill3- SHOW UP AT THE HEARING and "TAKE YOUR SEAT IN THE SECOND HOUSE"(This ACTION gains the MOST ATTENTION FROM THE SENATORS )* Tools for the Legislative Action Below:Video Tutorial: [https://youtu.be/ee2CDnZwdqE](https://www.ne.gop/so/adOQ16l4K/c?w=peB9CKzD7X9m1VIXqBN8eZaMq0-aPFe5lLuYaxacZzo.) William Feely, Committeeman and Legislative DirectorWritten Tutorial: [https://forwardnebraska.substack.com/p/how-to-comment-on-your-bills?r=rb3iq&utm_medium=ios&utm_campaign=post](https://www.ne.gop/so/adOQ16l4K/c?w=PGlYrNBS9H8mZMPf3_wcXYna2-SmMRRnB7wlO2VIelA.) Sue Greenwald, Committeewoman
[LB 77](https://www.ne.gop/so/adOQ16l4K/c?w=3nzelZMtzrbtF6o_lg7hVph-9jKfJAK1PcuFjlfKlNw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NDk3MTAiLCJyIjoiNjc1YmIyZDMtNWUyNC00MDJmLWM4ZDMtMTUyMTFiZGM0NGY2IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) - Provide for carrying of concealed handguns without a permit, change provisions relating to concealed weapons, and prohibit certain regulation of weapons by cities, villages, and counties This bill would authorize concealed carry without a permit in Nebraska. Restrictions currently codified within the Concealed and gun Permit Act relating to place and manner of concealed carry would be made to apply generally to any person carrying concealed and not to permitholders only. The crime of carrying a concealed weapon would still exist for minors and for persons who are prohibited from possessing dangerous weapons. [LB 79 ](https://www.ne.gop/so/adOQ16l4K/c?w=7nbTf5MzaFSdH9hl3pg-dcTzuxMH_IIfOhathVaaeyM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTAxODMiLCJyIjoiNjc1YmIyZDMtNWUyNC00MDJmLWM4ZDMtMTUyMTFiZGM0NGY2IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0)Nebraska EPIC Option Consumption Tax Act*Imagine being able to pass the family business/farm down to the next generation without undue inheritance taxes.* How great would it be to stop losing our young adults to states that have little to no state income taxes, and cheaper housing costs because of no property taxes?* Imagine Nebraska being a state where those approaching and in retirement don't have to worry about how they can afford to keep the house they raised their family in; a house they lived and loved in.* Imagine Nebraska being a destination for corporations to place their headquarters. So much so that they compete to be in our state. * Double taxation steals from our present and our future, our children's future, and our grandchildren's future.Eliminate all Nebraska Property, Income, and Corporate (including Inheritance) taxes. ELECTION RELATED BILLS:[LB 228](https://www.ne.gop/so/adOQ16l4K/c?w=v6SeAVZzMkEZezAwxWFKMzS1cFfzlxKanB5L8riQZDM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTAyNjMiLCJyIjoiNjc1YmIyZDMtNWUyNC00MDJmLWM4ZDMtMTUyMTFiZGM0NGY2IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) Establishes a holiday on the day of a statewide primary election and on the day of a statewide general election. The bill requires voting in person with a photo ID. Those who need to vote early may do so at the county election office or the county clerk's office. Only military personnel and those living in a registered nursing home or assisted living facility may vote by mail. The bill also stipulates that all ballots be counted at the precinct level on the day of the election. [LB 230 ](https://www.ne.gop/so/adOQ16l4K/c?w=XUqIrCbYeqGVzqQow0fnTU4vJ0hvaskHfFjNwXdYxSk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTAyNTUiLCJyIjoiNjc1YmIyZDMtNWUyNC00MDJmLWM4ZDMtMTUyMTFiZGM0NGY2IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0)The following constitutes the reasons for this bill and the purposes which are sought to be accomplished thereby:LB 230 requires a photographic ID when voting and defines what constitutes as a qualifying photographic ID for voting purposes.Those submitting provisional ballots without showing a qualifying photographic ID must do so at the county election office on or before the following Tuesday in order for their ballots to be counted.Those qualifying to vote early must present a photographic ID along with their application. Those who are handicapped or who are members of the armed forces or are members of the Nebraska National Guard shall qualify for early voting.An agent delivering a ballot to a registered voter shall pick up the ballot no later than one hour prior to the closing of the polls and return the ballot to the polling place before the polling place closes along with a color photocopy of the registered voter's qualifying photographic ID.The bill criminalizes any election official or election worker who scans a qualifying photographic ID or who does not require a voter to show a qualifying photographic ID when voting.The bill requires the American flag to be printed on all operators' licenses and state identification cards.The bill prohibits fees for the issuance of a state identification card used for voting purposes and prohibits fees for the issuance of a birth certificate used to obtain a state identification to be used for voting purposes. BILL UPDATES![LB 574](https://www.ne.gop/so/adOQ16l4K/c?w=pEPr7zaP2BT5i77VlIKMGDxE1DddvHw7zYwolIb4z-0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NDk5NjEiLCJyIjoiNjc1YmIyZDMtNWUyNC00MDJmLWM4ZDMtMTUyMTFiZGM0NGY2IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) "LET THEM GROW ACT'Has made it out of committee! LB 574, to be known and cited as the Let Them Grow Act, would prohibit the performance of gender-altering procedures for individuals under the age of 19, provide for the definition of terminology and allow for civil action to be brought against violators of the act. [LB 626](https://www.ne.gop/so/adOQ16l4K/c?w=u-TAwwhexo9078nTzAtXhuyX-yQh46qWIyedIKx5cM0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTA2NDEiLCJyIjoiNjc1YmIyZDMtNWUyNC00MDJmLWM4ZDMtMTUyMTFiZGM0NGY2IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) "Adopt the Nebraska Heartbeat Act" Has made it out of committee! LB626 provides that a physician may not perform or induce an abortion before testing for a fetal heartbeat, and that a physician may not perform or induce an abortion if a fetal heartbeat is detected, except in cases of sexual assault, incest, or medical emergency. An unlawful abortion by a physician in violation of LB626 constitutes unprofessional conduct.The purpose of LB626 is to save the lives of unborn children. To encourage greater respect for human life in society and to preserve the integrity of Nebraska's medical profession. Thank you to all who are engaged and taking ACTION for this generation and the next!

body:

Peter Willis,

Bernie Sanders is taking on the greed of Big
Pharma as Chairman of the HELP Committee, and their CEOs are terrified
that he’s coming for their blood money.

When he called on Moderna’s CEO to testify and answer for their plans for
an outrageous price hike for the COVID vaccine, they immediately
backtracked and announced they were keeping it free for our most
vulnerable neighbors.

This is why our work matters! With Our Revolution and our progressive
movement organizing on the outside, and Bernie using his position on the
inside — we are making a difference for people’s lives.

three lobbyists for every member of Congress. All that firepower is coming
for Bernie, and we need to have his back. Can we count on you to pitch in
to help defend Bernie from Big Pharma attacks?

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Celebrating Black American History:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Black trailblazers and activists have led the social movements that have strengthened our nation and freedoms.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59197129/393536415/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmI2OTIyYjYtN2JiNC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SREn0dmdERi0c-NJGL6oZPuI9DJxMdn24usqBTWlhUk=&emci=812c389a-60b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6b6922b6-7bb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)

Happy Black History Month, Peter!

This month, we recognize and celebrate Black Americans, their contributions to our nation’s institutions, innovations, progress, and culture.

It’s important to recognize that Black history is American history. Black trailblazers and activists have led the social movements that have strengthened our nation and freedoms — from the Civil Rights Movement, Labor Movement, Women's Rights Movement, and the fight for LBGTQ+ equality and reproductive justice.

While this month is about celebrating the contributions that Black Americans have made to our country, _like significant advancements in medicine, technology, education, and so much more,_ **we must also acknowledge the severe inequities that persist.**

Every day, extreme legislators volley relentless attacks to try and erase Black history in our schools, suppress the voices of Black and brown voters across our nation, and much more.

Peter, rooting out systemic racism in all of our institutions is work that needs to continue every single day, not just during Black History Month — _and it begins with us._

**[Together, we can stop voter suppression, reform our criminal justice system, ensure access to high-quality health care, and fight for reproductive justice. This Black History Month, please join me in recommitting to the fight for racial justice:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59197130/393536417/272120051?ms=em23_230224_bhm_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em23_230224_bhm_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em23_230224_bhm_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230224_bhm_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=%2F8axHC%2FdlZTKryHUgsKHgKmqdAz6z81XsFeQwUYhw%2FqnMydw1DcuKtIjULfNhkczX3%2Fj3sAV%2FuHcl8ys4oJ2ZhoXxwKtD6Cwno5UCT9tMQ4gG9Ox0MQZaUq792%2BEtxO85tttEOELIdubdwvk6hCsKJw5pTsTA%2FQlQCJdeStnWF8%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmI2OTIyYjYtN2JiNC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SREn0dmdERi0c-NJGL6oZPuI9DJxMdn24usqBTWlhUk=&emci=812c389a-60b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6b6922b6-7bb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)**

clean_body: Black trailblazers and activists have led the social movements that have strengthened our nation and freedoms. Happy Black History Month, Peter! This month, we recognize and celebrate Black Americans, their contributions to our nation’s institutions, innovations, progress, and culture. It’s important to recognize that Black history is American history. Black trailblazers and activists have led the social movements that have strengthened our nation and freedoms — from the Civil Rights Movement, Labor Movement, Women's Rights Movement, and the fight for LBGTQ+ equality and reproductive justice. While this month is about celebrating the contributions that Black Americans have made to our country, like significant advancements in medicine, technology, education, and so much more, we must also acknowledge the severe inequities that persist. Every day, extreme legislators volley relentless attacks to try and erase Black history in our schools, suppress the voices of Black and brown voters across our nation, and much more. Peter, rooting out systemic racism in all of our institutions is work that needs to continue every single day, not just during Black History Month — and it begins with us. As always, it's an honor to serve you, Derek Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma, WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. | =

name: ICYMI News
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy.

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4ff0jj9dollp2qmbif7cpdvg925tpnmp37iui88_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmeor4clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq3rd00d12nm32nm802uqpvo4li1iodcofbtlthg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmeor4clh2bs) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6sa1fe9vktjts13up561coh1m9589igdhls8h88_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hmeor4clh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844

We are sorry to put that thought into your head, but the Washington Post says she’s inching close to getting into the race.
That’s why Ruben is asking for $3 today.
$3 to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goals.
$3 because a huge number of donations will mean more endorsements.
$3 because these goals and these early endorsements are what we need to WIN and keep Kari Lake (and Senator Sinema) out of the Senate.
I know you’re probably thinking, “what difference can my $3 donation make?”
Well, by the time you got to this sentence, someone gave $3. Now they’re hoping you’ll do the same. Just like someone after you will give $3 because you did.

name: Mark Racchini
subject: A quick update
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417 Keith Ellison for Attorney General
body:
Friend, Each month, we set a fundraising goal to help keep our budget for the year on track. With only a few days left this month, I’m afraid we’re going to fall short. I have a meeting with Keith later today, and I want to be able to tell them we’re on track before the weekend. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59179213/393473530/1210286738?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmIwNzJlNS01M2I0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SWslzZVTZAbzp0jG7CvyQbWXrrvkdLlNBHv23G5tass=)
---
Friend,
Each month, we set a fundraising goal to help keep our budget for the year on track. With only a few days left this month, I’m afraid we’re going to fall short. I have a meeting with Keith later today, and I want to be able to tell them we’re on track before the weekend.
Our campaign works hard in the off-year to ensure we can have Keith’s back as he fights to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect as our Attorney General.
We can’t forget everything we overcame in November. There are still special interests doing everything they can to restrict our right to vote, end our right to choose, make us less safe, claw away Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, and make corporations more powerful and the middle class weaker.
Friend, I’m going to be honest with you. In order to get back on track, we need to raise $3,500 before Tuesday, February 28. There’s too much at stake to come up short this early into the year.

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Elissa’s op-ed in the Detroit Free Press
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We wanted to make sure you were one of the first to see.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/193?t=1&akid=25%2E135344%2Edikpxr)
Friend -
We wanted to make sure you were one of the first to see Elissa’s op-ed in the Detroit Free Press.
She reflects on the anger she felt as she faced 50,000 Michigan State University students and their families last week to tell them that nothing had changed at the state or federal level since the last time Michigan had a school shooting.
And she talks about the steps the Michigan legislature is taking right now to address this issue head on and be a model for states around the country on how to take responsive and life-saving action to protect our kids.
If you have a minute and want to read the whole op-ed yourself, click below to see more.
**[READ MORE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/189?t=2&akid=25%2E135344%2Edikpxr)**
Thank you,
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=25%2E135344%2Edikpxr).

name: Giffords
subject: Gun safety is a winning issue
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Our work to elect more gun safety champions in 2024 has already begun
#

Just a decade ago, it was taboo for candidates to talk about fighting our nation’s gun violence epidemic. Now, the 2022 elections made it clear: Gun safety is a winning issue, with 78% of voters in 2022 saying it was a top issue for them at the ballot box.
The American people want gun safety—the only place where it’s controversial is in Congress. Partisan politics has gone so far that right now, we have a U.S. House where extreme members of the Republican party are concerned with defending the special interests of the gun lobby instead of protecting their constituents.
But in state legislatures with Democratic control, gun violence prevention has become a top priority.
Both Michigan and Minnesota flipped during the 2022 midterm elections, and now both states are determined to pass lifesaving gun safety policies like background checks, child access prevention laws, and extreme risk protection laws (aka red flag laws).
It’s simple: gun safety majorities in state legislatures save lives. It’s critical that we invest early and often in states where we have the ability to flip legislatures.
Our work to elect more gun safety champions in 2024 has already begun. That’s why we’re asking for your support today.
[**Will you make a contribution to Giffords PAC to help us fuel our work to elect leaders at all levels of government who will have the courage to act?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230224-1-15&t=1&akid=4307%2E3935704%2Eg3aTsW)

subject: JUST one dollar (yes, that's it)

I implore you to read this short email from start to finish.

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zia1pl688h2ihn7pr183mm9qb4gegf1tthkhvfg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hm1p73c3h2bs "STEVE SIGNED ENGAGEMENT")

Hi, this is Steve Scalise.

**I implore you to read this short email from start to finish.**

As Majority Leader, I'm humbly asking you for _**[ONLY one dollar (yes, that's it).](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaji00qb3hvcvku6aembhkora61if1r7eumqmkq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hm1p73c3h2bs "ONLY one dollar \(yes, that's it\).")**_ Why? Because February is a short month and we still need 10,500 gifts before 2/28 to prove the strength of our grassroots team.

I know it's annoying to pull out your card and fill out the short form, but I promise you:

**It's important.**

Democrats are always bragging that their movement is bigger and more enthusiastic than ours because they have more donors on file.

_**[They're wrong. Help me PROVE IT by adding just one dollar here.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqp8kkr9pv2u2kike4pos4j46ujvr09g3rkdtpio_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hm1p73c3h2bs "They're wrong. Help me PROVE IT by adding just one dollar here.")**_

If you want to give more, I certainly won't stop you but I do ask that *EVERYONE* gives at least one dollar.

---
| | | [ADD JUST ONE DOLLAR> >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu9de0d5g85udcg4n2009bev6eb9qedpkb0fhq0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hm1p73c3h2bs "ADD JUST ONE DOLLAR")
---

Thank you,

Steve

---

subject: China's buying our farmland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress](https://links
body:
We know why.| | | **This is concerning, friend.**
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=960d6ffbac7845fd92207e175b8d2510&_e=CmwFn6dbHPpPNZ8_rlBr2ozUCwRZahAqT2oubSKnlBIPPCFvOxC7wM92BCD27pw2SYHnZm7niHkjfhvZPtF8ueIJZ_86Lkhx5Xup5eXHa9JFNwZMjeyc4RFHioV8tWhrwyLqnZemCzGseVjfbHg1mJnqZdZCrQFYj7MbVqlsqI4AyVAzUYoIYbLehVhQ-IseGQ-0aelvUJbHXJX1qQmbUlG6EYrJeUqlk3eSo7B8piHtuNpbA2OyQmXyKNQDHbkRwgkvf1PO11xoULhFOsOqlA%3D%3D)
---
China owns over 380,000 acres of American farmland, some only 12 miles away from an American military base, and we know why: To gain control over our agricultural industry and gather intelligence on our military capabilities. This HAS to stop. Do you want China controlling our food supply and gaining access to our military bases? Brad always says _"Food security is national security"._ [**Sign Brad's petition and DEMAND the Biden administration take action TODAY!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=960d6ffbac7845fd92207e175b8d2510&_e=CmwFn6dbHPpPNZ8_rlBr2ozUCwRZahAqT2oubSKnlBIPPCFvOxC7wM92BCD27pw2SYHnZm7niHkjfhvZPtF8ueIJZ_86Lkhx5Xup5eXHa9Ihf5qGjCN16TlUJcsNxPfEGr9rh7pz6hx1iROpjVU24RmeP6-hGsMm92vPWqkijqSU1p4xqNKDlKgO7P1hB94el7xOJaysgkOparF28y2ZNhAt2Rlx_gijcdQHnplrEkHB-N_SsyRNPhd0HRSxW2DGFEGglusrPBIjRvvtcNYu4A%3D%3D)

clean_body: We know why.| | | This is concerning, friend. China owns over 380,000 acres of American farmland, some only 12 miles away from an American military base, and we know why: To gain control over our agricultural industry and gather intelligence on our military capabilities. This HAS to stop. Do you want China controlling our food supply and gaining access to our military bases? Brad always says "Food security is national security". It is unacceptable that the Biden Administration is continuing to stand by and allow China to have unabashed access to our land. Thank you, Aaron E. | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Now is not the time to take our democracy for granted.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I want to start by telling you a bit about what our grassroots movement for fair maps has accomplished over the past few years.

Derek,

I want to start by telling you a bit about what our grassroots movement for fair maps has accomplished over the past few years.

Thanks to supporters like you, Democrats secured what the New York Times called the fairest congressional map in 40 years—which resulted in defeating election deniers in key battleground states, and flipping control of multiple state legislative chambers across the country.

**But let me be perfectly clear: Now is not the time to take our democracy for granted.**

**[It’s up to us to not only protect the progress we have made but also build on it for future generations. Will you pitch in now to help the National Democratic Redistricting PAC and Josh Shapiro continue this critical work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59198794/393543771/1577291453?refcode=email_022423_ndrc-shapiro&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjdjYzg5Ny04MGI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6cnP5z3_HTYfkJRttxHZ_CalAWnh-ofL6KeW2dV-IxA=)**

We’re heading into 2023 facing a number of ongoing challenges.
* A quarter of our states still have gerrymandered maps.
* Republicans want to reverse fairly-drawn maps in key states.
* The Supreme Court will decide two cases that are critical to the fight for fair maps, with the Voting Rights Act and our system of checks and balances at stake.

Derek, the path to progress is winding. In a fight for a more fair and just system, progress isn’t measured over seasons, years, or decades. Progress is measured over generations.

That’s why I’m asking you to recommit to this fight by contributing today to support the National Democratic Redistricting PAC and Josh Shapiro's efforts to strengthen our democracy.

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Using a tragedy to sow division
body:
This is how deprived The New York Times has become.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8at6e6g47i44rulu3lbcf9rhkglkqk5p366bml0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9jm0pj1c1h2bs)

Friend,

This is how deprived The New York Times has become.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaqhb9573dijt8h9a3ehkbreqebusikb3s0ltlh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9jm0pj1c1h2bs)
Instead of caring for the families in Ohio affected by the chemical spill, The New York Times is attacking conservatives who disagree with Biden.

They hate you more than they care about people in Ohio.

They would rather ban your way of life by taking away gas stoves than report on Biden's atrocities.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, and I'm the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

Our goal is to raise $10,000 this week to expose The New York Times and other corrupt media organizations.

[_**Friend, will you send $10, $35, $50, or any amount to expose the true evil in media? Click here to send your support >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zokmgc2iq6pmrni5gl3lnbshpdgo0o2hqsupkelg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9jm0pj1c1h2bs)

The New York Times will say anything that goes against Biden is _" right-wing,"_ even caring for your fellow Americans.

People have every right to be critical of Biden's poor handling of the situation. But The New York Times is attempting to change the narrative and make the people concerned about it out to be the bad guys.

**The left-wing media lies to protect politicians ... and MRC exposes them.**

On Tuesday, NewsBusters reported that the broadcast networks of ABC, CBS, and NBC had abandoned the environmental fallout from the February 3 train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio.

On their flagship morning and evening shows, ABC covered it for 0 seconds, and CBS and NBC only covered it for 1 minute and 42 seconds after an evacuation order was lifted on February 8.

But since our study's publication and public outcry about the threats posed to the community's air, food, residents, and water supply, the liberal networks rediscovered the issue Wednesday morning.

They covered the story for a combined 6 minutes and 42 seconds.
* Tuesday's CBS _Evening News_ had a 31-second brief.
* CBS Mornings stayed on the case with a 2 minute and 29 second report.
* ABC's _Good Morning America_ made a similar return with 2 minutes and 16 seconds and _never made clear they had ignored it since February 8_.
* NBC's _Today_ scrapped together 2 minutes and 16 seconds to insist it still cares about East Palestine.

MRC is keeping the pressure on the media to keep them from covering up Biden's failures.

[_**Your generous support helps MRC show Americans the truth about the media. Click here to send your gift today >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuasqib2r2u9k82k8fp9nbs9f7lvtdppvds8vg3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9jm0pj1c1h2bs)

Media Research Center found the best way to expose the left-wing media.

1. MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets.

We have over 890,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

2. My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias.

3. **MRC 's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth.**

The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media ... now, _over 90% of Americans DO NOT trust the Fake News media_ anymore. **

But we can't do this alone, Friend. Can I count on you to join the fight for the truth? **Click below to donate. **

clean_body: This is how deprived The New York Times has become. Friend, This is how deprived The New York Times has become. Instead of caring for the families in Ohio affected by the chemical spill, The New York Times is attacking conservatives who disagree with Biden. They hate you more than they care about people in Ohio. They would rather ban your way of life by taking away gas stoves than report on Biden's atrocities. Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, and I'm the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies. Our goal is to raise $10,000 this week to expose The New York Times and other corrupt media organizations. The New York Times will say anything that goes against Biden is " right-wing," even caring for your fellow Americans. People have every right to be critical of Biden's poor handling of the situation. But The New York Times is attempting to change the narrative and make the people concerned about it out to be the bad guys. The left-wing media lies to protect politicians ... and MRC exposes them. On Tuesday, NewsBusters reported that the broadcast networks of ABC, CBS, and NBC had abandoned the environmental fallout from the February 3 train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio. On their flagship morning and evening shows, ABC covered it for 0 seconds, and CBS and NBC only covered it for 1 minute and 42 seconds after an evacuation order was lifted on February 8. But since our study's publication and public outcry about the threats posed to the community's air, food, residents, and water supply, the liberal networks rediscovered the issue Wednesday morning. They covered the story for a combined 6 minutes and 42 seconds. Tuesday's CBS Evening News had a 31-second brief. CBS Mornings stayed on the case with a 2 minute and 29 second report. ABC's Good Morning America made a similar return with 2 minutes and 16 seconds and never made clear they had ignored it since February 8. NBC's Today scrapped together 2 minutes and 16 seconds to insist it still cares about East Palestine. MRC is keeping the pressure on the media to keep them from covering up Biden's failures. Media Research Center found the best way to expose the left-wing media. 1. MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets. We have over 890,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987. 2. My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias. 3. MRC 's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters. When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media ... now, over 90% of Americans DO NOT trust the Fake News media anymore. But we can't do this alone, Friend. Can I count on you to join the fight for the truth? Click below to donate. Thank you, Brent Bozell Founder and President of MRC The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. body:
I implore you to read this short email from start to finish.

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z95bqhpsajcdsnrtppdnph3o70tpns29uk0im95g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hm9p35cth2bs "STEVE SIGNED ENGAGEMENT")
---

Hi, this is Steve Scalise.

**I implore you to read this short email from start to finish.**

As Majority Leader, I'm humbly asking you for _**[ONLY one dollar (yes, that's it).](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf3a8joaqgqunbui9ni23me2oeghedbvd6lqun80_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hm9p35cth2bs "ONLY one dollar \(yes, that's it\).")**_ Why? Because February is a short month and we still need 10,500 gifts before 2/28 to prove the strength of our grassroots team.

I know it's annoying to pull out your card and fill out the short form, but I promise you:

**It's important.**

Democrats are always bragging that their movement is bigger and more enthusiastic than ours because they have more donors on file.

_**[They're wrong. Help me PROVE IT by adding just one dollar here.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5j0gmhlhp3d3k7i6q4a1r0i8ffhlougs41cm4g0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9hm9p35cth2bs "They're wrong. Help me PROVE IT by adding just one dollar here.")**_

If you want to give more, I certainly won't stop you but I do ask that *EVERYONE* gives at least one dollar.

Thank you,

Steve

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: In 2018, Cruz came the closest of any Republican to losing a Senate race in Texas since the 1990s, only holding off Beto O'Rourke by 2.5%. He's so hated, we absolutely can beat him in '24, and with so many Democratic races on the ballot, to hold the Senate, WE MUST.
body:
We could beat him next time
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T22c838a5-8289-4938-bab4-31f1a87b34e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Ted Cruz is one of the most despicable, heartless people to ever serve in the Senate. Of this, I have no doubt.** _When his constituents' kids were murdered while in school at Uvalde, he ignored guns and, in a slap in the face to victims and survivors, said we must strengthen "doors." When his constituents were freezing to death because of corrupt Republican deals, he responded by going to a luxury resort in Cancun. _ From the NY Times: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T505a0d16-3830-4455-82dd-37e25b638562/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**_Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the TX-Senate Democratic Nominee Fund, to convince a top-tier Dem to challenge Cruz and have a large campaign fund waiting for them when they do?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbe7f163b-07e1-47fb-a948-091a056657b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Worst of all, Cruz is a traitor who worked with Trump's coup plotters to overthrow our republic. He voted to reject Biden's victory for no reason but to demagogue, even after the deadly attack on our Capitol Jan. 6th, which he helped instigate with a lie-filled diatribe that morning._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1c3d0e6-0576-4ee7-b672-eec91d8828e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_In 2018, Cruz came the closest of any Republican to losing a Senate race in Texas since the 1990s, only holding off Beto O'Rourke by 2.5%. He's so hated, he inspires Democrats to vote against him, repels Independents & convinces Republicans to be Democrats for a day._** **_We absolutely can beat him in '24, and with so many Democratic races on the ballot, to hold the Senate, WE MUST._** [**_Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the TX-Senate Democratic Nominee Fund, to convince a top-tier Dem to challenge Cruz and have a large campaign fund waiting for them when they do?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf99196f8-7c9c-4638-98ac-4961797e665e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for taking on one of the most dangerous elected officials in America._ Cliff
---

|

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/texassenatecandidatefund3-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7c0a261-809c-4a61-8679-37f35c942ed7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Re: Tucker Carlson’s Jan. 6 footage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | **Kevin McCarthy gives Tucker Carlson access to Jan. 6 riot surveillance tapes**
**_NEW YORK POST_**
Peter, you deserve the facts - _all_ of the facts.

I promised I would give you the truth regarding January 6th, and now I am delivering. I have released the full 44,000 hours of uncut camera surveillance footage.

It is in the public interest to know everything that happened that day - not just the narrative that Pelosi's partisan committee wanted you to see ahead of the 2022 midterm elections...

We made a Commitment to America - a commitment to YOU - when we asked for your vote last fall. A commitment to ALL of America requires truth and transparency over partisan games. Now, we are delivering.
**Would you consider chipping in to help House Republicans keep delivering on our commitments to America?**

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Using a tragedy to sow division
body:
This is how deprived The New York Times has become.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4313raurm9p2r47u2pjssg5pho1qobv1k3nhscg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9jm4p34c3h2bs)

Friend,

This is how deprived The New York Times has become.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zblo98qjs7pkt6rdbgcqlsvok4thq629r6fr3v28_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9jm4p34c3h2bs)
Instead of caring for the families in Ohio affected by the chemical spill, The New York Times is attacking conservatives who disagree with Biden.

They hate you more than they care about people in Ohio.

They would rather ban your way of life by taking away gas stoves than report on Biden's atrocities.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, and I'm the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

Our goal is to raise $10,000 this week to expose The New York Times and other corrupt media organizations.

[_**Friend, will you send $10, $35, $50, or any amount to expose the true evil in media? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3toef2gedl400m07ahk95bj6k1rrv28q3m8q95o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9jm4p34c3h2bs)

The New York Times will say anything that goes against Biden is _" right-wing,"_ even caring for your fellow Americans.

People have every right to be critical of Biden's poor handling of the situation. But The New York Times is attempting to change the narrative and make the people concerned about it out to be the bad guys.

**The left-wing media lies to protect politicians ... and MRC exposes them.**

On Tuesday, NewsBusters reported that the broadcast networks of ABC, CBS, and NBC had abandoned the environmental fallout from the February 3 train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio.

On their flagship morning and evening shows, ABC covered it for 0 seconds, and CBS and NBC only covered it for 1 minute and 42 seconds after an evacuation order was lifted on February 8.

But since our study's publication and public outcry about the threats posed to the community's air, food, residents, and water supply, the liberal networks rediscovered the issue Wednesday morning.

They covered the story for a combined 6 minutes and 42 seconds.
* Tuesday's CBS _Evening News_ had a 31-second brief.
* CBS Mornings stayed on the case with a 2 minute and 29 second report.
* ABC's _Good Morning America_ made a similar return with 2 minutes and 16 seconds and _never made clear they had ignored it since February 8_.
* NBC's _Today_ scrapped together 2 minutes and 16 seconds to insist it still cares about East Palestine.

MRC is keeping the pressure on the media to keep them from covering up Biden's failures.

[_**Your generous support helps MRC show Americans the truth about the media. Click here to send your gift today >>>**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zi2l3nqu2fatqbambev1becg7fv3r5hrhuccf04g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7c9jm4p34c3h2bs)

Media Research Center found the best way to expose the left-wing media.

1. MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets.

We have over 890,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

2. My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias.

3. **MRC 's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth.**

The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media ... now, _over 90% of Americans DO NOT trust the Fake News media_ anymore. **

But we can't do this alone, Friend. Can I count on you to join the fight for the truth? **Click below to donate. **

clean_body: This is how deprived The New York Times has become. Friend, This is how deprived The New York Times has become. Instead of caring for the families in Ohio affected by the chemical spill, The New York Times is attacking conservatives who disagree with Biden. They hate you more than they care about people in Ohio. They would rather ban your way of life by taking away gas stoves than report on Biden's atrocities. Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, and I'm the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies. Our goal is to raise $10,000 this week to expose The New York Times and other corrupt media organizations. The New York Times will say anything that goes against Biden is " right-wing," even caring for your fellow Americans. People have every right to be critical of Biden's poor handling of the situation. But The New York Times is attempting to change the narrative and make the people concerned about it out to be the bad guys. The left-wing media lies to protect politicians ... and MRC exposes them. On Tuesday, NewsBusters reported that the broadcast networks of ABC, CBS, and NBC had abandoned the environmental fallout from the February 3 train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio. On their flagship morning and evening shows, ABC covered it for 0 seconds, and CBS and NBC only covered it for 1 minute and 42 seconds after an evacuation order was lifted on February 8. But since our study's publication and public outcry about the threats posed to the community's air, food, residents, and water supply, the liberal networks rediscovered the issue Wednesday morning. They covered the story for a combined 6 minutes and 42 seconds. Tuesday's CBS Evening News had a 31-second brief. CBS Mornings stayed on the case with a 2 minute and 29 second report. ABC's Good Morning America made a similar return with 2 minutes and 16 seconds and never made clear they had ignored it since February 8. NBC's Today scrapped together 2 minutes and 16 seconds to insist it still cares about East Palestine. MRC is keeping the pressure on the media to keep them from covering up Biden's failures. Media Research Center found the best way to expose the left-wing media. 1. MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets. We have over 890,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987. 2. My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias. 3. MRC 's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters. When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media ... now, over 90% of Americans DO NOT trust the Fake News media anymore. But we can't do this alone, Friend. Can I count on you to join the fight for the truth? Click below to donate. Thank you, Brent Bozell Founder and President of MRC The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible. Here’s why your support today is so critical:
* **We’re competing with the GOP dark money machine.**

Republican operatives in Georgia are DESPERATE to flip our state back to red, and they have a Rolodex full of far-right billionaires ready to help them do it with _massive_ contributions. Last year, one conservative donor made a contribution of $1.6 BILLION to a SINGLE GOP organization!

**Our grassroots movement can’t raise the money we need to compete with the Georgia GOP and their shady donors overnight — that’s why we MUST get started early.**
[Donate to help Georgia Democrats get a head start](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59184249/393491464/710125701?amount=10&refcode=20230224.1_GADems_2AR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDM1NzQ0YS01Y2I0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yIPUw-0P3I4NsjOnsiTdqTtUXY2gxW_lifUSAiPfYkA=)
---
* **We need to build massive statewide voter outreach infrastructure.**

Right now, Georgia Republicans like Kelly Loeffler are _bragging_ that voter suppression helped Republicans reelect Brian Kemp last year. To counteract the GOP’s anti-democratic tactics, we need to work even harder to educate, organize, and mobilize voters.

**It takes a lot of time (and money) to hire, train, and deploy the staff who will help us counteract Republican attacks on voting. If we want to drive massive turnout in Georgia in 2024, we can’t wait until next year.**
[Donate to help power Georgia voter outreach efforts](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59184255/393491474/710125701?amount=10&refcode=20230224.1_GADems_2AR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDM1NzQ0YS01Y2I0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yIPUw-0P3I4NsjOnsiTdqTtUXY2gxW_lifUSAiPfYkA=)
---
* **We need to be ready for whatever the GOP has in store.**

The Georgia GOP is _furious_ that our grassroots movement has defeated them three years in a row. Now that extreme Georgia Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene are rising to power on the national stage, we fully expect them to work harder than ever before — and to spend more money than ever before — to defeat us in 2024.

**If we have a slow start this year, Georgia Republicans could see it as a clear pathway to defeating us in 2024. But if we continue building our grassroots movement, we can show the GOP that we’re a force to be reckoned with.**
[Donate to show that Democrats are ready to WIN!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59184272/393491488/710125701?amount=10&refcode=20230224.1_GADems_2AR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDM1NzQ0YS01Y2I0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yIPUw-0P3I4NsjOnsiTdqTtUXY2gxW_lifUSAiPfYkA=)
---

November 2024 might seem like a long way away, Peter. But when you consider all of the work we need to do to ensure that Democrats win in Georgia, we guarantee that it will be here before we know it.

[**_Republicans aren’t waiting to prepare for the next election, so we can’t wait either. Please, if you’re able, will you be one of the supporters we need to make a grassroots donation today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59184289/393491509/710125701?amount=10&refcode=20230224.1_GADems_2AR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDM1NzQ0YS01Y2I0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yIPUw-0P3I4NsjOnsiTdqTtUXY2gxW_lifUSAiPfYkA=)

— Georgia Democrats

name: Liz
subject: How much do you know…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Hey team,
We've been talking a lot about what's happening in redistricting and how important a fair redistricting process and fair maps are for protecting voters. Well, it's time to find out how much you know about what's happening in North Carolina -- whose legislators want to overturn the _Harper v. Hall_ decision -- and what A.G. Holder said about it.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: let me explain why emails like this one matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Emails like this one are one of our campaign’s most efficient ways to raise money, and they allow me to give my full energy to issues that matter most to Granite Staters.
| | |
---
Dear friends,
I'm reaching out to ask for your support in our grassroots fundraising effort to retire our (victorious!) campaign’s debt. Polls were close and in order to win, we made the strategic decision to spend a bit beyond the funds we had on hand.
**[Before I go on, could you please make a donation – $3 or any amount – to help us finish paying off this debt?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59184483/393491998/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2215-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTM1NzQ0YS01Y2I0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iX5IM4yC2QYv27qD7NBmOmOJIGyJFarKSJJ014gMfuQ=)**
Over the past few years, I have had the honor of working on important issues that impact our state and our country, from creating jobs, to improving access to health care, to strengthening our national security.
I’m delighted to continue that important work, and that’s where I need to continue to focus - not fundraising.
I'm reaching out to you today to ask for your help in our online fundraising effort to retire our debt. Emails like this one are one of our campaign’s most efficient ways to raise money, and they allow me to give my full energy to issues that matter most to Granite Staters.
Whether you can contribute $3 or more, your donation will go a long way in helping us reach our fundraising goals and continue to push for policies that positively impact families here in New Hampshire and across the country.
To make a donation, you can visit my campaign’s ActBlue page here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59184486/393492002/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2215-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTM1NzQ0YS01Y2I0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iX5IM4yC2QYv27qD7NBmOmOJIGyJFarKSJJ014gMfuQ=)**
Every donation, no matter the size, is greatly appreciated and will go a long way in supporting our efforts.
Thank you for your continued support. Together, we can make a real difference.
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan
| If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, **[donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59184490/393492005/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk2215-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTM1NzQ0YS01Y2I0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iX5IM4yC2QYv27qD7NBmOmOJIGyJFarKSJJ014gMfuQ=)**. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59184494/393492010/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk2215-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTM1NzQ0YS01Y2I0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iX5IM4yC2QYv27qD7NBmOmOJIGyJFarKSJJ014gMfuQ=) This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59184498/393492020/-2088849429?refcode=mh-jtk2215-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTM1NzQ0YS01Y2I0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iX5IM4yC2QYv27qD7NBmOmOJIGyJFarKSJJ014gMfuQ=&emci=ac1e9de4-f3b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a135744a-5cb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5452893).

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: During these last days of Black History Month, We continue to honor and remember the Late John Lewis, a civil rights icon and voting rights champion.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Good morning, friends, advocates and voters.
We hope this final February edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well during these last days of Black History Month.
This past Tuesday would have been civil rights icon and voting rights champion, Congressman John Lewis’ 83rd birthday. We honor him today and all days, as he reminds us that, “When you see something that is not right, not fair, not just, you have to speak up. You have to say something; you have to do something.”
Please take a few moments to check out our upcoming events, news you can use and other updates.
Graphic picturing NPP's CEO, Kadida Kenner standing next to a large poster of John Lewis holding a framed poster of herself. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Screen%20Shot%202023-02-23%20at%201.34.14%20PM.png]
Upcoming Events
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Screen%20Shot%202023-02-23%20at%205.40.24%20PM.png]
Lift Every Voice A Campus Conversation
Tuesday Feb 28th 12:30 - 1:30pm
Student Union Building at Lincoln University
Join us for a community conversation around why voting is important so you can make your voice heard.
We will have bingo, trivia, prizes and food.
To RSVP or for any questions, please contact Call Dyneco Gibson at (717) 847-1201 / dyneco@newpaproject.org
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/2-2.png]
A Community Conversation about “Why Courts Matter”
Tuesday, February 28 from 5:30-6:30pm
Allison Hill Community Center
1524 Walnut St, Harrisburg, PA 17103
Guest Speakers - Anthony Burnett, LOOP
Kadida Kenner, CEO, New PA Project Education Fund
Refreshments will be provided
For more information contact Rick Hicks at (223) 239-0270 / rick@newpaproject.org
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Image-7.jpeg]
Civic Education and Voter Registration Event
"Voting is Our Civic Duty"
Friday, Feb 24th 3:00pm
The Open Door Clubhouse
3147 Emerald St. Philadelphia
Join us at 3pm for an interactive presentation about voter education and local elections hosted by the New Pennsylvania Project. Learn how you can impact your community and hear from your local leaders about what elections mean for you. Let's also be sure everyone is registered to vote ahead of the Primary Election happening on Tuesday, May 16.
Complimentary refreshments will be provided. Following COVID protocols. Masks are required for this event.
Special Guests and Presentations by:
Jim Herrity, Councilmember at Large
Arthur Green, Ward Leader
Curtis Thomas, Former PA State Representative
Katy Personette, Director of Development and Policy, New Pennsylvania Project
For more information, please contact Carrie Fowler at carrie@newpaproject.org
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Screen%20Shot%202023-02-23%20at%201.59.41%20PM.png]
Who Can Help Me? A Community Conversation
Tuesday, Feb 28 6:00 - 8:00pm
The Boys & Girls Club of Bethlehem
1430 Fritz Dr. Bethlehem
Learn what community resources are available to you and how voting can impact these resources.
Food and refreshments will be provided.
Guests include:
A Representative of Congresswoman Susan Wild, 7th District
Enid Santiago, New PA Project Education Fund
To RSVP or any questions, please contact Nancy Lopez Sosa at (484) 954-5899 / nancy@newpaproject.org
Translated flyer in Spanish provided below
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Screen%20Shot%202023-02-23%20at%201.56.53%20PM.png]
Congratulations to Our CEO
Our CEO is one of City and State PA’s Power of Diversity: Black 100 Power list honorees. Read about all the honorees here [https://www.cityandstatepa.com/power-lists/2023/02/2023-power-diversity-black-100/382752/]
Graphic depicting a picture of Kadida Kenner with words: ''City &State Pennsylvania Power of Diversity: Black 100. Kadida Kenner, CEO, New Pennsylvania Project. Presented by PA Chamber for Black Owned Business and Moravia Health [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/333032481_6008748515879056_6381604314405534504_n.jpg]
We're Hiring!
Come work with the New Pennsylvania Project, and help us expand democracy and transform the electorate in PA.
We’re hiring motivated talent for:
*
Director
of
Strategic
Communications
*
Regional
Organizing
Directors
for
Allegheny
County,
the
Capital
Region
and
the
Poconos
Region
*
Community
Engagement
Associates
-
Statewide
*
Fellows
-
Part-time
View all the job descriptions here [bit.ly/3YW9MFt]
NPP in the News
NPP's CEO, Kadida Kenner's monthly column in the Bucks County Beacon:
Pennsylvanians Must Reject Restrictive Voter ID Laws [https://buckscountybeacon.com/2023/02/pennsylvanians-must-reject-restrictive-voter-id-laws/] (Bucks County Beacon)
"To instill faith in our elections, Pennsylvania lawmakers should pass legislation for same-day voter registration like in North Carolina, and early voting like Georgians are lucky to have. Making the ballot more accessible, and the act of voting quicker and simpler should be the goal, not restrictive voter ID laws advocated for by those who fall for Trump’s Big Lies.
Pennsylvania already has voter ID laws on the books, and they’re effective. The truth is, any additional Voter ID laws are solutions in search of a problem. The Pennsylvania electorate made their voices heard last November. They want an increase to the $7.25/hour minimum wage, fair education funding for our public schools, affordable housing and the protection and expansion of our voting rights. All of our elected officials should work on those issues first and foremost."
News You Can Use
Webster, Kenyatta Propose Legislation to Clarify, Streamline Mail-In Voting Process [https://www.politicspa.com/webster-kenyatta-propose-legislation-to-clarify-streamline-mail-in-voting-process/118589/] (Politics PA)
“While they agree that mail-in and drop-off voting makes the democratic process more accessible for eligible voters in every region throughout our state, it has been a source of confusion and contention. In response to what they say is a lack of clear guidance from the state legislature, the duo is proposing legislation that would clarify and streamline the mail-in voting process in the Commonwealth.
* *
Change
the
term
“permanent”
mailing
list
to
“annual”
mailing
list
to
better
reflect
its
operation
and
purpose.
*
Change
the
deadline
to
apply
for
a
mail-in
or
an
absentee
ballot
from
the
current
deadline
of
7
days
before
Election
Day
to
12
days
before
Election
Day,
ensuring
the
postal
service
has
sufficient
time
to
deliver
ballots.
*
Eliminate
the
requirement
for
the
use
of
secrecy
envelopes,
making
the
choice
to
use
the
envelope
at
the
discretion
of
the
voter.
*
Clarify
that
the
requirement
to
sign
and
date
a
mail-in
or
absentee
ballot
means
to
include
the
date
of
the
voter’s
signature,
and
clarify
that
failure
to
date
a
ballot
cannot
be
the
sole
grounds
to
disqualify
a
ballot.
*
Statutorily
provide
counties
the
authority
to
use
ballot
drop
boxes
and
establish
minimum
requirements
for
counties
that
choose
to
use
them.

Such legislation would clarify some of the issues raised by the decision of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.”
Gov. Josh Shapiro expects John Fetterman to ‘come back stronger than ever’ after hospitalization for clinical depression [https://www.inquirer.com/politics/pennsylvania/john-fetterman-josh-shapiro-depression-hospitalization-20230222.html] (Philadelphia Inquirer)
“The State Senate previously passed a constitutional amendment that included three amendments, one of which is a voter ID law. The House bill will be a standalone bill that the Republican-controlled Senate will consider.
Should the bill pass both the House and Senate, as well as receive Governor Josh Shapiro’s signature, it will be on the November ballot as a constitutional amendment. for voters to decide.”
PA House starts special session as Dems, GOP spar over operating rules [https://www.cityandstatepa.com/politics/2023/02/pa-house-starts-special-session-dems-gop-spar-over-operating-rules/383179/] (City&State PA)
“The new Democratic majority in the state House did end up approving operating rules for the special session on Tuesday after hours of debate with Republicans.
The rules, contained in HR 7, established a special committee called the “Committee to Provide Justice to Otherwise Barred Victims of Childhood Sexual Abuse” to advance bills through the legislative process during the special session.
The committee met briefly Tuesday to advance the two measures that would create the two-year legal window, and then the House adjourned until it reconvenes for a non-voting session on Wednesday, and for a voting session on Thursday.“
Tweet of the Week
Tweet Screenshot from Tom Bonier stating: ''Wow. I'm just now getting a first look at the 2022 PA vote history (the record of who voted). In 2014 voters under 30 accounted for only 6.6% of total turnout. In 2018 that went up to 9.8%. In 2022? They accounted for 11.1% of all ballots cast. Huge youth turnout.'' Posted 11:19am on 2/18/23 with 182K views. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Screen%20Shot%202023-02-23%20at%201.47.27%20PM.png]
Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition.
In solidarity,
Team NPP
Graphic picturing Deputy Director of Organizing, Nancy Lopez Sosa and Regional Organizing Director Ben Gillespie in the background at a community event in Norristown [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_0970.JPG]

clean_body: [] Good morning, friends, advocates and voters. We hope this final February edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well during these last days of Black History Month. This past Tuesday would have been civil rights icon and voting rights champion, Congressman John Lewis’ 83rd birthday. We honor him today and all days, as he reminds us that, “When you see something that is not right, not fair, not just, you have to speak up. You have to say something; you have to do something.” Please take a few moments to check out our upcoming events, news you can use and other updates. Graphic picturing NPP's CEO, Kadida Kenner standing next to a large poster of John Lewis holding a framed poster of herself. [] Upcoming Events [] Lift Every Voice A Campus Conversation Tuesday Feb 28th 12:30 - 1:30pm Student Union Building at Lincoln University Join us for a community conversation around why voting is important so you can make your voice heard. We will have bingo, trivia, prizes and food. To RSVP or for any questions, please contact Call Dyneco Gibson at (717) 847-1201 / dyneco@newpaproject.org [] A Community Conversation about “Why Courts Matter” Tuesday, February 28 from 5:30-6:30pm Allison Hill Community Center 1524 Walnut St, Harrisburg, PA 17103 Guest Speakers - Anthony Burnett, LOOP Kadida Kenner, CEO, New PA Project Education Fund Refreshments will be provided For more information contact Rick Hicks at (223) 239-0270 / rick@newpaproject.org [] Civic Education and Voter Registration Event "Voting is Our Civic Duty" Friday, Feb 24th 3:00pm The Open Door Clubhouse 3147 Emerald St. Philadelphia Join us at 3pm for an interactive presentation about voter education and local elections hosted by the New Pennsylvania Project. Learn how you can impact your community and hear from your local leaders about what elections mean for you. Let's also be sure everyone is registered to vote ahead of the Primary Election happening on Tuesday, May 16. Complimentary refreshments will be provided. Following COVID protocols. Masks are required for this event. Special Guests and Presentations by: Jim Herrity, Councilmember at Large Arthur Green, Ward Leader Curtis Thomas, Former PA State Representative Katy Personette, Director of Development and Policy, New Pennsylvania Project For more information, please contact Carrie Fowler at carrie@newpaproject.org [] Who Can Help Me? A Community Conversation Tuesday, Feb 28 6:00 - 8:00pm The Boys & Girls Club of Bethlehem 1430 Fritz Dr. Bethlehem Learn what community resources are available to you and how voting can impact these resources. Food and refreshments will be provided. Guests include: A Representative of Congresswoman Susan Wild, 7th District Enid Santiago, New PA Project Education Fund To RSVP or any questions, please contact Nancy Lopez Sosa at (484) 954-5899 / nancy@newpaproject.org Translated flyer in Spanish provided below [] Congratulations to Our CEO Our CEO is one of City and State PA’s Power of Diversity: Black 100 Power list honorees. Read about all the honorees here [] Graphic depicting a picture of Kadida Kenner with words: ''City &State Pennsylvania Power of Diversity: Black 100. Kadida Kenner, CEO, New Pennsylvania Project. Presented by PA Chamber for Black Owned Business and Moravia Health [] We're Hiring! Come work with the New Pennsylvania Project, and help us expand democracy and transform the electorate in PA. We’re hiring motivated talent for: Director of Strategic Communications Regional Organizing Directors for Allegheny County, the Capital Region and the Poconos Region Community Engagement Associates - Statewide Fellows - Part-time View all the job descriptions here [bit.ly/3YW9MFt] NPP in the News NPP's CEO, Kadida Kenner's monthly column in the Bucks County Beacon: Pennsylvanians Must Reject Restrictive Voter ID Laws [] (Bucks County Beacon) "To instill faith in our elections, Pennsylvania lawmakers should pass legislation for same-day voter registration like in North Carolina, and early voting like Georgians are lucky to have. Making the ballot more accessible, and the act of voting quicker and simpler should be the goal, not restrictive voter ID laws advocated for by those who fall for Trump’s Big Lies. Pennsylvania already has voter ID laws on the books, and they’re effective. The truth is, any additional Voter ID laws are solutions in search of a problem. The Pennsylvania electorate made their voices heard last November. They want an increase to the $7.25/hour minimum wage, fair education funding for our public schools, affordable housing and the protection and expansion of our voting rights. All of our elected officials should work on those issues first and foremost." News You Can Use Webster, Kenyatta Propose Legislation to Clarify, Streamline Mail-In Voting Process [] (Politics PA) “While they agree that mail-in and drop-off voting makes the democratic process more accessible for eligible voters in every region throughout our state, it has been a source of confusion and contention. In response to what they say is a lack of clear guidance from the state legislature, the duo is proposing legislation that would clarify and streamline the mail-in voting process in the Commonwealth. Change the term “permanent” mailing list to “annual” mailing list to better reflect its operation and purpose. Change the deadline to apply for a mail-in or an absentee ballot from the current deadline of 7 days before Election Day to 12 days before Election Day, ensuring the postal service has sufficient time to deliver ballots. Eliminate the requirement for the use of secrecy envelopes, making the choice to use the envelope at the discretion of the voter. Clarify that the requirement to sign and date a mail-in or absentee ballot means to include the date of the voter’s signature, and clarify that failure to date a ballot cannot be the sole grounds to disqualify a ballot. Statutorily provide counties the authority to use ballot drop boxes and establish minimum requirements for counties that choose to use them. Such legislation would clarify some of the issues raised by the decision of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.” Gov. Josh Shapiro expects John Fetterman to ‘come back stronger than ever’ after hospitalization for clinical depression [] (Philadelphia Inquirer) “The State Senate previously passed a constitutional amendment that included three amendments, one of which is a voter ID law. The House bill will be a standalone bill that the Republican-controlled Senate will consider. Should the bill pass both the House and Senate, as well as receive Governor Josh Shapiro’s signature, it will be on the November ballot as a constitutional amendment. for voters to decide.” PA House starts special session as Dems, GOP spar over operating rules [] (City&State PA) “The new Democratic majority in the state House did end up approving operating rules for the special session on Tuesday after hours of debate with Republicans. The rules, contained in HR 7, established a special committee called the “Committee to Provide Justice to Otherwise Barred Victims of Childhood Sexual Abuse” to advance bills through the legislative process during the special session. The committee met briefly Tuesday to advance the two measures that would create the two-year legal window, and then the House adjourned until it reconvenes for a non-voting session on Wednesday, and for a voting session on Thursday.“ Tweet of the Week Tweet Screenshot from Tom Bonier stating: ''Wow. I'm just now getting a first look at the 2022 PA vote history (the record of who voted). In 2014 voters under 30 accounted for only 6.6% of total turnout. In 2018 that went up to 9.8%. In 2022? They accounted for 11.1% of all ballots cast. Huge youth turnout.'' Posted 11:19am on 2/18/23 with 182K views. [] Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m up for re-election and need your help, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
I’m up for re-election in 2024, friend, and as one of just three Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I’m a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. _(__There's already a Republican vying for the GOP nomination.)_
NBC says my race could be “even nastier and more expensive” than last year’s Senate race in Ohio – and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent.
**[Frankly, it’s going to be my toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can win in Ohio. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and American Bridge PAC as we begin the new year?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59184839/393493228/-1708609261?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2275-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmZmEwMGY5LTVjYjQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_ThOuNjy_PSgtXPuS1lBxiF7fIQqjT9yFJJ4E74R89k=)**
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families.
I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago – a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do.
Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by.
That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about, friend. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do – whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips – your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you.
[**I need you in this fight, too friend. It won’t be easy, but if we organize, work hard, and start early, I know we can do this. Please consider chipping in $15 – or whatever amount makes the most sense for you – to my campaign and American Bridge PAC.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59184840/393493229/-1708609261?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2275-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmZmEwMGY5LTVjYjQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_ThOuNjy_PSgtXPuS1lBxiF7fIQqjT9yFJJ4E74R89k=)
__If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately:__ | | | [Donate $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59184841/393493230/-1708609261?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=jtk2275-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmZmEwMGY5LTVjYjQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_ThOuNjy_PSgtXPuS1lBxiF7fIQqjT9yFJJ4E74R89k=)

The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do. Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by. That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about, friend. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do – whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips – your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With gratitude, Sherrod | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. American Bridge 21st Century 800 Maine Ave SW Suite 400 Washington, DC 20024 United States

It’s so important that workers like these have a voice in Washington, D.C. That’s why I’m so happy to have Greg Casar in the U.S. House of Representatives.
