name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
In an interview published in Imprimis, Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d056bfd91c3144699a5fdc1054fc1f68&_e=3yAtnixc1AScer-xvFMKnGbZOg1_APPcEVvEBh7KutUr0_WNlIiWysUWw9of-s1VlM0ej5L-1WJmvtR4ddERPCpkkrzg3Y1PVVyMTbteJK8lYx4cQJk0YdpDR0yIgSQ07iBGDEZ-idCFTe33gu52EXNL17SfPwGTLgGR0uH2ZXuqwjXD6RLoR3MbgZZpSYR2NOuBeKTBCZRPCnsTghrJEukKMl9M9ncN1RFxQzHL2yRfxxaJ89v14JMKh-gcImZOTfbUdEQneq2S17mLFoAtIgiY7NMl4354aA1DgWoQGq2wEyIR4GKIVmBK2kyky9ujY4IBLDFR3BPX_iSGkYX3KOpd6ghV5UE6mH_FMhN9rW8s7eJr34H9LJW2FDXQdRr7mFIofxyVzepgql3xCQMa9w%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d056bfd91c3144699a5fdc1054fc1f68&_e=3yAtnixc1AScer-xvFMKnGbZOg1_APPcEVvEBh7KutUr0_WNlIiWysUWw9of-s1VlM0ej5L-1WJmvtR4ddERPCpkkrzg3Y1PVVyMTbteJK8lYx4cQJk0YdpDR0yIgSQ07iBGDEZ-idCFTe33gu52EXNL17SfPwGTLgGR0uH2ZXuqwjXD6RLoR3MbgZZpSYR2NOuBeKTBCZRPCnsTghrJEukKMl9M9ncN1RFxQzHL2yRfxxaJ89v14JMKh-gcImZOrhg9B0n3K7RQdek45PlyiRfviZojYDwmS2C0roHCikvaOcPBMG7gtw8ey9deh7LjssdTE_FRAA7Rkasn_vQp8iE1AdftVFL6ahE1uG1IzrBMIg0wBcFhb5hNv-VbAGlI6yij4LI8_eT6tE9xXHVnvw%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d056bfd91c3144699a5fdc1054fc1f68&_e=3yAtnixc1AScer-xvFMKnGbZOg1_APPcEVvEBh7KutUr0_WNlIiWysUWw9of-s1VlM0ej5L-1WJmvtR4ddERPCpkkrzg3Y1PVVyMTbteJK8lYx4cQJk0YdpDR0yIgSQ07iBGDEZ-idCFTe33gu52EXNL17SfPwGTLgGR0uH2ZXuqwjXD6RLoR3MbgZZpSYR2NOuBeKTBCZRPCnsTghrJEukKMl9M9ncN1RFxQzHL2yRfxxaJ89v14JMKh-gcImZOf4kYE3CZL664EhA4zBGnjDz_CEvg8nQ79sZfWz1egKNQSiNU4989EtAZ4C0a5OsuZzC7mmRmvlJIuuwZxPLOUXdquyUeq6whdZwWPUnleikM1yn_S7WosgRyycwcbLRPaRjgJQpFTYOavQ-_BFuoCQ%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d056bfd91c3144699a5fdc1054fc1f68&_e=3yAtnixc1AScer-xvFMKnGbZOg1_APPcEVvEBh7KutUr0_WNlIiWysUWw9of-s1VlM0ej5L-1WJmvtR4ddERPCpkkrzg3Y1PVVyMTbteJK8lYx4cQJk0YdpDR0yIgSQ07iBGDEZ-idCFTe33gu52EXNL17SfPwGTLgGR0uH2ZXuqwjXD6RLoR3MbgZZpSYR2NOuBeKTBCZRPCnsTghrJEukKMl9M9ncN1RFxQzHL2yRfxxaJ89v14JMKh-gcImZO8Kofow7Tgx0MbMRJ5IYQh-iwEV86tk4SvvmbxKZk3IBC92HNLWJeoHoMfEcrumnKZIJUrye_rvKYCeCN72SZ0uRfD3XXYTWeUe1zaOXL6SJUeRLodYHdaAUr4uA506u-8KL3xJAFR7O-H0WCtzhYnQ%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d056bfd91c3144699a5fdc1054fc1f68&_e=3yAtnixc1AScer-xvFMKnGbZOg1_APPcEVvEBh7KutUr0_WNlIiWysUWw9of-s1VlM0ej5L-1WJmvtR4ddERPCpkkrzg3Y1PVVyMTbteJK8lYx4cQJk0YdpDR0yIgSQ07iBGDEZ-idCFTe33gu52EXNL17SfPwGTLgGR0uH2ZXuqwjXD6RLoR3MbgZZpSYR2NOuBeKTBCZRPCnsTghrJEukKMl9M9ncN1RFxQzHL2yRfxxaJ89v14JMKh-gcImZOvmrO0WVGljjIu17YCysqeHZJh9tYCyElIenFWQszDVjZBhfUMa3cT3F7QEpN_-1VZd5Z0BR6HkijBCFffn3gzKUxmMco-lwDVqbKNLCo56bNEIzA09Z6cDV64VPK7u0L-KOBEciOLMnVAZxhciQN4A%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: An actual screenshot from our ActBlue dashboard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’ll keep this quick.
#
Derek, we’ll keep this quick. Here are three things you need to know:
1. Our work runs on small-dollar donations. Always has, always will.
2. February is a short month, so we have less time than usual to hit our monthly fundraising goal.
3. Online fundraising has slowed down...a *lot*. Just look at this actual screenshot from our ActBlue account showing amounts given each day. 👇

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230224-1?refcode=em20230224-1-8258&refcode2=8258_434096_avahMU&akid=8258%2E434096%2EavahMU)
So with just a few days left until our end-of-month deadline, we’re setting a goal to raise another $30,000. **[Will you please chip in $5 or anything you can to ensure we don’t fall short of our February goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230224-1?refcode=em20230224-1-8258&refcode2=8258_434096_avahMU&akid=8258%2E434096%2EavahMU)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230224-1?refcode=em20230224-8258&refcode2=8258_434096_avahMU&akid=8258%2E434096%2EavahMU)**
Without supporters like you, John would never have defeated Dr. Oz, flipped PA blue, and became a U.S. Senator. So we know you’ve got our backs.
Thank you, thank you, thank you!!!
💛 Team Fetterman HQ
P.S. If you read this entire email + are on the fence about donating...**[consider that for just $2.59, or the cost of an extra large Sheetz Coffee, you can be an official Team Fetterman end-of-month donor!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230224-1?refcode=em20230224-1-8258&refcode2=8258_434096_avahMU&akid=8258%2E434096%2EavahMU)** _But if today’s not the day, that’s okay too._ 🥰
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230224-1?refcode=em20230224-1-8258&refcode2=8258_434096_avahMU&akid=8258%2E434096%2EavahMU)
_^Be careful, it’s hot!_

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230224-8258-footer&t=1&refcode2=8258_434096_avahMU&akid=8258%2E434096%2EavahMU)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8258%2E434096%2EavahMU)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8258%2E434096%2EavahMU)

Donald J. Trump February 23rd, 2023
ICYMI: President Donald J. Trump Delivers Hope, Supplies to East Palestine, Ohio
**Mar-a-Lago, FL** — On Wednesday, President Donald J. Trump visited East Palestine, Ohio to hear from the people of the community and deliver supplies to help those who are still affected by the train derailment. The East Palestine community warmly welcomed President Trump as [hundreds of people](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kNFq7CAQhp_G3CXE0ai5yEX3pKWw0J5Cob1bTDQbz6oJ0RB2n_6YZVuQkfl-Z8b5dYMZ58BILSBTTQUDLjPTQAmkBKBYkLqkRad6xRnmWFMxqIohWiodLtOgJi-t-heX1c1FP7lsbHpJS1oSENVAO07kXoV5J4XECrN-yGwzxjgHRJ4QvKSzbVuhpLFXl0JqUqyXRL3eQrrkEk1vdY4xF7gidUKf-7C8W4w_h_xZhpj_lVaHaLzO4zitQXoV8m6KMdF8k1EvxRidReRlje7ktDKrQ6TV-zwEbIdhWpdeJ9ibk3ywXrpZmrNP9MeOH2XyUfuYBAF1-hI7eWtUSsf19Va749dZ3OFoVFqzbW-iGy-3t0O2NGrejLUmMJ48PD82dlkaZc1wbRA_IIB7HcDdITjSw_cbO34d2_xdfrznLavotqvwJ8V4nfXv00eX4rEZIN7-B5SilkI) lined the streets to show their support.

_President Trump met with local officials and residents from East Palestine._
_ _
While on the ground in East Palestine, President Trump met with members of the police and fire departments, first responders, local and statewide officials, and residents to pledge his support for the community and to always fight on their behalf.

“We have told you loud and clear, you are not forgotten. You are not forgotten. We stand with you, we pray for you,” President Trump [said in a speech](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UMluwyAU_Bp8SwTPGPDBh6ZWLqkSRVGXW4QBxzR4kY0TJV9f7LqVEGJmmHmLyQjjHFicCoh0lkBJcGQzwBBjAEpEnGK6LrTSnBFODBWlThiiWJvh2pa6baTT374f626t2jqqMgokKTkFKagQugjRRCpKVEIwiUtFI5dV3ncDil8QbMPxd-u96Sd7QL2R7s0-30-TOnjpxyE8CIMQl2CG05QGwIRA8TZk5IARsNHX59poO9aBMbW0biGHduyVCaSyZ7lwStadtJdmNv-O-ae0jTeND4KANA3kuXFWB-hv5uN4uZ1SPpOV1VPp_CmK6vrcb6I-093dOmcHxsNuLlMH8zpCKWfLR4b4BgHMPoB5ctjRzdee7T53-eogj4dVzhJ6n1R4Dbd_dOb_65KyXiYDxPMfdBiDEQ) at the East Palestine Fire Department.

_President Trump thanks Ohio Senator J.D. Vance in an address to the East Palestine community_

U.S. Senator [J.D. Vance said in his speech](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UMtugzAQ_BpzS2QvfnHgUIpyQUpUVWp6i4xtghteAqM0-foaSitZ1u7MzuzDpoQLATxOJEQmZVARHLkUMMQYgBIZJ5juS6ON4EQQS2VlGEcUGzvd-sr0nWrMlx_ndtjrvo3qlCnJykQLAJCUxIxIXnFBSy2SCgNjUZPW3g8Til8QHMLzd-e9HRd5yN7nUZXWTiGcvPLzEhAerBLGcRiGcIoFpig-BIccMAI--_bSWuPmNiC2Va7ZwKmfR20DqN1FbZhW7aDctVvFv0v-MX3nbecDISFJAnjpGmeWuoJ9F6z4OMsVrJ1ZWudPWda35zGLxtQMd9c0buIiXOa6TLAeI7RqXPVIkcgQwKoDWPeGgmafR16ci3x3Um-nXc4ZvS8svIbfPwb7X7q57LfNAIn8B7qLgYA) : “President Trump, thanks so much for coming and shining a light on this community. We can't forget about the people of East Palestine. We need to finish the clean-up effort. That's the most important thing.”

After meeting with local officials, President Trump [treated first responders to lunch](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UEFugzAQfI25OYLFGHPg0BRFVSOlrXpob5HBS3ACNsKmUfr6GppWsrzSzOzs7mCZ8DwHnhYCIlVm0CZxpEuIIY0BWCLSImabWjUq50meIBOtyjhhsUJ3sa2yRvbq7Kd5GDeNHaKuBCZYjSKRICCPBWYN1lmd8AKSlDOuor7svB8dSR8I7MJrrPlC47U1tnVeenSLUyAMXl0oqzmt55ujrZ6cpxO60RqFk6ND87sBdbSWrsNQtEJDWzvRVup-npB6S7-0056iDM2j7NF5bZCku9kPxwGVngeSVjgEPQG-gM7OUxMUVaOP8o41chilPpmA_qXzx1jjwwGBEFAUATyaXqtF93563p356xNfwU6rcHVVfYu6u3wfttFUqvGq-147nodIT8sGa4phVK_bW0nyLQFY-wDWwGDPtp8Hvv_YV_RFvr3QimfsurDwGH5_G_FfenfZ3C8Dklc_5Iyddg) at the local McDonald’s.

_President Trump meets with community members at the local McDonald’s_

The East Palestine McDonald’s franchise owner Steve Telischak [praised President Trump](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kE2PgjAQhn9NuUFgQD4OHHSJF7MaT-6eTKVTmbUFYssS_fXbEt2keTt9pp3pO1gneVFAnlYlBKJegUzigGqIIY0BsqRMqziLLqIVRZ4UCWalFKucZbFAcxukGHquxI-9T3qM2kEHXV1JAJRVJUvBpZBJVsikjRHTkqNsMxGourN2NCxdM9i6Nc9z1D8saTS-hCO-u9ti8LGXyTgZB0WWWh8u_ULkxoYjV2gs9RgOHQ3hLxmyUWe1Yul2svqsUdCkWdqg5qQY5B6aYbq36GBLZ_5iLdcjp2vv6Nv9OzP0FnvrEiVUlYPnXpFwx_WnxBMe4fu2wI6Ec9U0z_LS3Z77TXCvxTiTUmTywo3s6n-wTMm1UiQfNSs2DGB553z6gcAu23zt891p14QHfjyETb7KZp-FD6f2MeL_1VeV6OUMWNH8AfSkj7s) for his “uplifting” visit.

The visit from President Trump served as a beacon of hope for the East Palestine community as they continue to navigate the aftermath of this disaster.

The Biden administration—which has largely ignored the victims of East Palestine— [reversed a decision](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kEuPgyAUhX8N7jB6fYALF9Mx3Zi0mVnMY9WgXAutghGNaX_9UKczCZDwHe49nItlnDMGeVJwCGSZQRdHgS4hgiQCSGOeFFEaNrKVLI9ZjCnvZJaTNJLorraT1oheXuZpGcawtUOgSmglF8gENpwxEXXQNV1TCC5Z1nQYN0FfqnkeHUleCOz9Wtc1NLi6FfH66OHRxSJttERDlXB-G4mS_nrRzYuq5Yx01YZapS2d0I3WOKQx4xDzjCT7ZR5OA0q9DCSpcBC6J5A_oLPL1KKHrT6JJ2vFMAp9Np7-Jf9TrJnRzF7gUBQenkyvpb9Oop3eP77Vrd6g0tInqqo7b9T1ftgFUynHVfe9djnz4zo_frBNyFv1uruVhO0IwFYHsA0D6nT3dcjrz7qiR_F2pFWepetDhVd_zrcR_58-u4TPZEBY9QMp55B7) to withhold a FEMA emergency declaration once President Trump announced his visit to the Ohio town.

[ Sean Hannity of _FOX News_ ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UNFugyAU_Rp8awMXBHzwYZ1pljRrs2VN92aoYGUVNYrp2q8fOreEEM45nHvvuSYlXAjgNJEQ6TSGkuDIpoCBYgBGJE0wW591oQUnghgmSx1zxLA2w7UtdduoWn_5fnTdumhdVKWqJDHTPDlTLjHFihiqOaaSkARMjEVUp5X33YDoE4JtOP5mvTf9ZA_oYyp1Uv17O8PBKz8O4UE4SMFjTijFQoqEAUN0G6pkgBHw0bvcGW1HFxjjlK0XcmjHvjCBLGyuFq5QrlP20szm36B_Stt40_ggSEiSQOZNbXWAL_vm-G2Or-4yk5XVU-vsIc_V9bHfRH2qu5utaztwEbZzmSaYFxJa1ba8p0hsEMDsA5izw45tPvd8d9plq4N6O6wyHrPbpMJzuP29M_9flyrrJRkgkf0A6x2EHA) highlighted the residents of East Palestine, with one remarking, “honestly, I'm not surprised. [Biden and his administration] haven't been to the border yet, so why would they come to East Palestine?"

When President Trump announced his trip to Ohio, Joe Biden was touring eastern Europe promising an additional $500 million in aid to Ukraine. The mayor of East Palestine [called](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kE2P2yAQhn-NfSOyBwz44MOm1l4i7UdbaXuLCIxjGsCWwRtlf31xlK00Qswz3y92NRcCOG0llKZrYKir0nZQAa0AWC1pW7HdyWgjeC1qZHIwDS9YZTBepsFMQTnzNy2rn3d68uXY1ZqJhiku22xM1ngSFWpTKa0bFBRK140pzbGgTwU8Z0sjjta5rTx74-Qx4DXmL5VcNA0QVDGRWTmMyQYkXt2mhZyswUDWy6I29mmjTZmdzzmJRKdmYgPJncmgNG5z6POa_NGjsasvaI9eWVcA32Cc1iUn0V7bo3owrfys7Dlk-q3Fd2QKCUPKAQltm-ExOGs297ek8tfnx8-3OxytyTf2_Zc8jZevl325dGa-5kNt5CILeN42uGuWRzk73LpC7AuAex3AXR44sP2fF374OPTkVb2_kp437LpF4Ud-023G_6mPLrvHZVCI_h8GIZQx) Biden’s move “the biggest slap in the face.”

“I sincerely hope that when your representatives and all of the politicians get here, including Biden, they get back from touring Ukraine, that he’s got some money left over,” [President Trump said in remarks](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kEtvozAQxz8N3IhgDDYcODSLopUiJeppu6fIj6FxYx7Cpmzz6TuO0pWs8cxvPA__sS24EMBZU0Nq2gr6Ik9tCzmwHKAsatbk5U4ZbQQvRIFl3ZuKJ2Vu0N-m3kyjdOYjLOsw7_Q0pNe2rLEqGFRNw1StpGDIVKW4ikOY0Dx17TWE2SfsJYEDnW3bdmpBG5RcQmxCbJ6cDVZ7cuMqdOUQ_Wjwn3art5-YPcZmBh0Fi4-hvrlJGp9tMuCSofQhm6VDH-yImewjDIu0IxXR5QYcQ1yCHdYwXAY0dh0S1uFAuQR4hH5aF40Etb3IJ9NymKV9H4n-CPWTmcYQe7KuhqYheBmdNRTeDx-Hvy9G_94e8GoNCdB191pdb_fTPl1aM2_WOeu5IHXf4wYPQWmUs_1Xm4h9AvCoIxWidnAs928nfvxz7LKzfD1nHa_KLWbhF9nwNeP_p88uu-fPIBHdN5yhnw0) at the East Palestine Fire Department.

During his visit, President Trump [offered a message](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kMtOwzAQRb_G2VHFE8ePRRaUqJuKlkoI2EWu7TSmeRE7RO3X44SAZFkzZ3xnfMdkmDIGNBEcIp2lUOI4shnEkMQABPNExGRz1kozihk2hJc6pYjE2rhrV-qulbX-9MPY9BvVNVGVcYrLs5EGhEohjTUogzlowYwihnIW1Vnlfe9Q8ohgF46frPdmmOUhc_K7cPLmijn20o8uBJgCJ4wJQjiL-ZwIlOxCixxiBHT0TdEYbccmENNIW6_QdeOgTIDKFnJlSja9tJd2Ef-6_Kt0rTetDwUOQgRYtLXVs_rl9Pb8NfHXwwIrq-fR-Z2fq-v9sI2GTPeTrWvrKAurucw_WLYRRtW2vGWIbRHAogNYjMOebD8OdP--zx-O8nR8yGlKprkKT-H2t978P127bFZngFj-A3Qag9k) to Joe Biden, who has yet to visit East Palestine: _“_ Get over here.”

_President Trump speaks to the community at the East Palestine Fire Department_
_ _
In an [interview with Real America’s Voice](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UMtuwyAQ_Bp8SwQLBnzwIYmVQyMl6kNK1UuEDY5p8EM2VpR8fbHrVkKImWVmd9akhAsBnCYSIp3GUBIc2RQwUAzAiKQJZutcF1pwIohhstQxRwxrM9zaUreNcvrb92PdrYu2jqpUJsFRyzzWQBXNTY6ZUSUUHChlhsSRSyvvuwHRDYJ9OP5uvTf9JA_oY7I6q_6tneHglR-H8CAcpEiE5BJzKhjDmCC6Dy4ZYAR89PWlNtqOdWBMraxbyKEd-8IEsrAXtXCFqjtlr80s_g36V2kbbxofChKSJJCXxlkd4Pv49ZL3e73bzGRl9dQ6e8q8uj2P26hPdXe3ztmBi7Cd6zTBvJDQytnykSKxRQCzDmDODge2_Tzyw_mQrU7q9bTKeMzuUxV24faPzvx_XVzWSzJAIvsByZ6Enw) , one East Palestine resident thanked President Trump, “We don’t get this kind of spotlight here, and he brought it here.”

_FOX News’_ [Laura Ingraham spoke](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UMtuwyAQ_Bp8awSLeR18aGrlEilRH2pyi4jBMYmxLRsrSr6-2HUrAWJmmVlmbUa4EMCpkpCYjEFJcOIywEAxQEokVThdnU1hBCeC2FSWhnGUYmOHW1uattG1uYZ-9N2qaH1SZbwQAjOpqFYASlNTUstS0JQzY6NpUmdVCN2A6CuCTVzh7kKw_SSP6GuyOuj-o53hEHQYh3ghHKTgNG7JiQJKKUF0E11ywAj4GPzJW-NGHxnrtasXcmjHvrCRLNxJL1yhfafdpZnFv0H_Km0TbBNiQYJSkTw1tTMRMu8_r8fm-t3PZOXM1Dp_ynN1e-7WSZ-Z7u7q2g1cxOlcph_MA4mtalc-MiTWCGDWAczZYZuujzu-PWzzl71-37_knKX3qQpv8QyPzv4_XVxWSzJAIv8BRVuEcw) with an East Palestine couple who said President Trump’s visit “definitely helped lift spirits” of residents.

[Tucker Carlson highlighted](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UMGOgyAU_Bq8tYEHAh48rLXNJk3a7Gn31lDByhbUKKZpv37RdTchhJlh3nvzTE64EMBpJiHReQo1wYnNAQPFAIxImmG2vepKC04EMUzWOuWIYW3Ge1frrlVOf4dh8v226nzS5LWsOCaCEkU4lxklNWjMaqZEhnHKROLyJoR-RPQNwSGe8LAhmGG2R7Tr3OSvVhXTzZmIx6DCNMYH4SBTLqSkGGOQlFCO6CGWKQEj4FPwF2-0nXxkjFfWreTYTUNlIlnZi1q5Svle2Vu7mH-T_ildG0wboiAhyyJ5aZ3VEZ721Z725fSeLmRj9dy6fMlrc3-dimTIdf-wztmRi7ie2zzBspHYytn6mSNRIIDFB7CEhyMrvk78-HksN2f1cd6UPGWPWYVdvMOzN_9f1yrbNRkgUf4AxY-Djg) the efforts of Blue Line Moving’s John Rourke to partner with President Trump to deliver bottled water to the community.

Peter, A recent analysis from _Pew Research Center_ found that only 23 out of the 50 states have EVER elected a Black woman to Congress. What’s more, there are currently ZERO Black women serving in the United States Senate. Throughout our nation’s history, only **two** have ever been elected — Carol Moseley Braun and Kamala Harris. It’s a disgrace. Our government will never work for us until it looks like us. Until all our voices have a seat at the table, until all our voices are being heard, our work is far from finished. clean_body: | = Peter, A recent analysis from Pew Research Center found that only 23 out of the 50 states have EVER elected a Black woman to Congress. What’s more, there are currently ZERO Black women serving in the United States Senate. Throughout our nation’s history, only two have ever been elected — Carol Moseley Braun and Kamala Harris. It’s a disgrace. Our government will never work for us until it looks like us. Until all our voices have a seat at the table, until all our voices are being heard, our work is far from finished. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Fight for Progress

body:

During a recent episode of his podcast, “The Joe Rogan Experience,” host Joe Rogan and his guest, comedian Ryan Long, discussed the issue of gender identity and the recent cultural focus on it. They used the example of a Canadian shop teacher who identifies as a trans woman and wears large prosthetic breasts while teaching children.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lucas=20Kunce?=
subject: Would you trust Elon Musk and Mark Zuckerberg with your birth certificate, driver’s license, or passport? What about your kids?
body:
#
Peter — Would you trust elites like Elon Musk and Mark Zuckerberg with personal documents like your birth certificate, driver’s license, or passport just for making an account on Twitter or Facebook? What about your kids?
Josh Hawley’s new legislation to “protect kids online” would require us to. **Just read the bill text for yourself:**
[](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=d6c91976df&e=8095450ef8)
**[HELP LUCAS FIGHT BACK »](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=28e7afd8f1&e=8095450ef8)**
**I’m not interested in co-parenting with Josh Hawley and his creepy Big Brother BS — and I bet you aren’t either.**
Josh Hawley is so obsessed with controlling us, he'd require every American (including teen minors!) who makes a social media account surrender sensitive personal documents to Big Tech giants... The same kind of documents you’d need to get a Social Security card, and the same Big Tech giants known for exposing data for hundreds of millions of users.
**We can’t give Josh six more years to control us in the U.S. Senate. Between now and Election Day, we’re going to hold him accountable on issues like this — but your support is how we’re going to get that message in front of Missouri voters.**
**[If you’re ready to defeat him and elect a real warrior for everyday American families, please rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can to my grassroots campaign today.](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=72a33042b9&e=8095450ef8)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=7fd1836df8&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $25](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=23dcb31e4e&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $30](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=c916b481d3&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $50](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=b974f4a4b3&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $100](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=24f1a06f10&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $250](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=f8b5d9af36&e=8095450ef8) [Give another amount](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=d0c0dcb313&e=8095450ef8)
---
I’ve said for a long time that these social media companies have blood on their hands. They’re hurting our kids. But Hawley’s plan makes all of us less safe by giving Big Tech giants even more power over our families and even more of our personal information.
We need real action, not more campaign props from phonies like Josh. We need to end Section 230’s obscene protections for social media giants, reject the corporate judges who keep shielding Big Tech from accountability, and we need to investigate and prosecute the mega-rich corporate executives who are putting our kids in danger.
That’s why we’re building a movement to kick Josh Hawley out of the U.S. Senate next year.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=2f37c53798&e=8095450ef8)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=10a32a162c&e=8095450ef8&c=da6cbc1036). Mail us: PO BOX 1240, Independence, MO 64050.

name: Team NPP
subject: What’s next for PA school funding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
It’s up to the voters to make real change, and it’s up to us to support them.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59196689/393535038/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230224SFWN_N_TEAM_90DO_3_NG_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkNDNhNGI5LTdhYjQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OqE5kWRPTCkHULaJ-9XWJItBRFTINc0IvmKnQDc3bH4=)
| Fellow activist,

This month’s landmark Commonwealth Court ruling against PA’s school funding system is a great leap forward for our historically disenfranchised and neglected communities.

Under the current system, Pennsylvania has one of the worst spending gaps between higher-income and lower-income districts in the country. This funding gap in turn creates a marked “achievement gap” which further disadvantages students from already under-resourced communities.

Now, it’s up to the courts to rule on any appeals to this decision, the legislature to write the legislation to address it, and the voters to hold them accountable. As a voting rights organization, you can probably guess where we come in.

**[One of the best tools to reach equity in every aspect of our society is empowering all voters to be a force for change in their own right. That’s what makes our work to expand the electorate centering historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth so important. Will you donate $10 now to help us stand up against inequity?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59196691/393535043/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230224SFWN_N_TEAM_90DO_3_NG_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkNDNhNGI5LTdhYjQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OqE5kWRPTCkHULaJ-9XWJItBRFTINc0IvmKnQDc3bH4=)** clean_body: It’s up to the voters to make real change, and it’s up to us to support them. = | Fellow activist, This month’s landmark Commonwealth Court ruling against PA’s school funding system is a great leap forward for our historically disenfranchised and neglected communities. Under the current system, Pennsylvania has one of the worst spending gaps between higher-income and lower-income districts in the country. This funding gap in turn creates a marked “achievement gap” which further disadvantages students from already under-resourced communities. Now, it’s up to the courts to rule on any appeals to this decision, the legislature to write the legislation to address it, and the voters to hold them accountable. As a voting rights organization, you can probably guess where we come in. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. | | Let's get a few basic principles out of the way:
1. Corporations aren't people. They're corporations.
2. Money isn't speech. It's money.
3. Elections are for voters, not politicians or special interests.

In the ten years since the disastrous _Citizens United_ decision, there's been an explosion of secret money in our elections, and it just keeps getting worse and worse. **[Please sign my petition calling on Congress to pass a constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59196946/393535908/-1587562881?source=2023ECU_JM&referrer=group-merkley&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-jeff-merkley-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2023-02-citizensunited-email%26recurring%3D0%26noskip%3Dtrue%26amount%3D12&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODE0YzgxNC03YmI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0AA9DmX7W82BCdFtg4Yy-2HG7Dy2DUBHF2vpxD017Y=&emci=faa91a45-6eb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7814c814-7bb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7731215)** and allow Congress to pass reasonable fundraising and spending limits in our elections, including strict limits on corporate spending in politics. Elections are for voters, not politicians or special interests. In the ten years since the disastrous Citizens United decision, there's been an explosion of secret money in our elections, and it just keeps getting worse and worse. and allow Congress to pass reasonable fundraising and spending limits in our elections, including strict limits on corporate spending in politics. name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Show support for the Factory Farm Moratorium Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59196933/393535893/-625192558?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliN2M1MjM1LTdiYjQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2G3IhHjLJS9SzI3vxpXeVdBm8j29q1xfIATfO5_1SKo=&emci=f073c631-79b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9b7c5235-7bb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) | | | Dear Peter, Factory farms are endangering our rural communities, air, water, climate, health, animal welfare, and family farms. This Tuesday, our lawmakers will have their first informational hearing on the Factory Farm Moratorium Bill. If passed, the bill would place a moratorium on any new or expanded factory farms. This would mean less human-caused greenhouse gas emissions, less air and water pollution from manure, and a healthier, more environmentally friendly Oregon. [**We need to show support for the Factory Farm Moratorium Bill now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59196934/393535894/-625192558?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliN2M1MjM1LTdiYjQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2G3IhHjLJS9SzI3vxpXeVdBm8j29q1xfIATfO5_1SKo=&emci=f073c631-79b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9b7c5235-7bb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Factory farm facilities concentrate large numbers of animals in confined spaces. Oregon’s 11 mega-dairies alone produce a staggering amount of manure: in 2019, it was over 6.5 billion pounds. This leads to a huge amount of greenhouse gas emissions, producing the equivalent emissions of 318,000 cars every year. The large quantities of manure that mega-dairies and other factory farms produce also contaminate our drinking water, as harmful substances from manure make their way into our groundwater systems. Some of the largest factory farms in Oregon today are located in rural Latinx and Hispanic communities, meaning these communities are disproportionately suffering the negative impacts. **[We need a “time out” on more factory farms until Oregon acts to protect its water, climate, communities, and special places.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59196935/393535895/-625192558?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliN2M1MjM1LTdiYjQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2G3IhHjLJS9SzI3vxpXeVdBm8j29q1xfIATfO5_1SKo=&emci=f073c631-79b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9b7c5235-7bb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230)** Oregon is becoming a target for factory farms, harming our ground water resources, undermining our climate goals, and polluting our beautiful state. As Oregonians, we want to address climate change; and we want clean air and water for our families, neighbors, and future generations. We can't let a handful of corporations threaten all of this by building massive factory farms in our state. [**Please take a moment today to email your state lawmakers, urging them to support the Factory Farm Moratorium Bill.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59196936/393535896/-625192558?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliN2M1MjM1LTdiYjQtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2G3IhHjLJS9SzI3vxpXeVdBm8j29q1xfIATfO5_1SKo=&emci=f073c631-79b4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9b7c5235-7bb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Thank you for taking action, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---

name: TammyBaldwin.com
subject: Here’s what you need to know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Peter – Here’s what you need to know: **The situation:** Wisconsin has two important elections over the next two years: the state Supreme Court race this April, and our Senate race next November. The implications of these elections are _huge_ , which is why we need to win. **The problem:** Republicans know how competitive Wisconsin is, and they’ll spend whatever it takes to tip the scales in their favor. Trump’s hand-picked Supreme Court nominee is running this April, which means MAGA millionaires will start pouring money into Wisconsin. Our team is hard at work to match their fundraising efforts, but we’re still a bit behind where we need to be this month. subject: No American should have to choose between their monthly student loan payment and putting food on the table
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59197316/393536591/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDhhYTdlYy03YmI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05Z7Dd-vb3SyR03WlqP7xu8KHaJFulI1uVMCTTkz1VA=)
Friends —
[**I am writing today to ask you to join me in calling on the Supreme Court to uphold the Biden Administration’s student loan forgiveness program.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59197318/393536592/-734370799?refcode2=f08aa7ec-7bb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230224-1-t1b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDhhYTdlYy03YmI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05Z7Dd-vb3SyR03WlqP7xu8KHaJFulI1uVMCTTkz1VA=&emci=b58064f4-6ab4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f08aa7ec-7bb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16877361)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59197319/393536593/-734370799?refcode2=f08aa7ec-7bb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230224-1-t1b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDhhYTdlYy03YmI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05Z7Dd-vb3SyR03WlqP7xu8KHaJFulI1uVMCTTkz1VA=&emci=b58064f4-6ab4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f08aa7ec-7bb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16877361)
In less than one week, the conservative Supreme Court majority will hear a case on whether to uphold the Biden Administration’s student debt relief program which would grant over 44 million borrowers life-changing debt relief.
With the cost of tuition skyrocketing, higher education has become inaccessible to lower income students, forcing many who dream of earning their degree to take on thousands of dollars of student loans at the mere age of 18.
Collectively, borrowers across the country now owe over $1.7 trillion in student loans. Borrowers of color take on a disproportionate amount of that debt, leading to the exacerbation of generational wealth inequality.
This is a crisis.
We’ve thrown young Americans into debt right as they begin adulthood, and now, millions of Americans of all ages face years of debt payments with interest, putting the American Dream farther out of reach.
The Biden Administration’s debt relief program could change the lives of many struggling Americans, but it’s at risk under the conservative Supreme Court majority.
[**So please: Join me in calling on the Supreme Court to uphold the Biden Administration’s student debt relief program. This program will help millions of Americans and their families. Add your name here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59197320/393536594/-734370799?refcode2=f08aa7ec-7bb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230224-1-t1b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDhhYTdlYy03YmI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05Z7Dd-vb3SyR03WlqP7xu8KHaJFulI1uVMCTTkz1VA=&emci=b58064f4-6ab4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f08aa7ec-7bb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16877361)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59197321/393536595/-734370799?refcode2=f08aa7ec-7bb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230224-1-t1b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDhhYTdlYy03YmI0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05Z7Dd-vb3SyR03WlqP7xu8KHaJFulI1uVMCTTkz1VA=&emci=b58064f4-6ab4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f08aa7ec-7bb4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16877361)
As an educator myself, I understand the importance of a college education and how impactful it can be for lower income students trying to break the cycle of poverty and advance in society. _But under no circumstance should any American have to choose between their monthly student loan payment and putting food on the table._
Please take a moment to add your name today if you agree.
Thank you,
Robert Garcia

* * *
Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress

65 Pine Ave
#348
Long Beach, CA 90802
United States This email was sent to . body:
Thank you in advance.
#
Our February fundraising deadline is just days away, Peter.
The far-right has consistently named Cori one of their top targets, and any potential challenger will have the support of super PACs looking to take our people-powered movement down.
We will never get fossil fuel executives or big pharma lining up to write Cori checks — we have something even better — YOU!
This grassroots team has had Cori's back before, but if we're going to keep the first activist from the movement in defense of Black lives in Congress, we can't lose your support. **We took a look this morning, and here's what we found next to your name in our supporter records:**
**Supporter Name:** Peter **Supporter ID:** 1082990 **Past donations:** **Not yet!******* **Suggested contribution:** $5 **[Contribute $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230224.GkhrS4&amount=5&refcode=em20230224-2235&t=1&akid=2235%2E1082990%2EVcwX44)**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: My story in pictures.
body:
I wanted to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.
| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e045fefe0ca74e29a10fbde23c2325e2&_e=dXYdyJxxo-k4zSwx8CyQ5p-EUNAw4qhBNjtSb4liySYOqW47zruCPclaykQtRuGMrGJojnoQAP6tQAjqPi9u0wyw7nqg3Q7O5tzhBuIH19zTpg7NTdgXhgKCHqIcVRCQ3EPitgemBR0BJJhCpYE74l_ajgQZPrKgxZMY1pOyPFAoMr3zzOrUgpbU51nBnDLwrzEMdSnFD9VMZST1kTgZBQlniet6SdrNYSaV0SyZ9aPAHCHAbQoLFNab3zVRIIGYJ5nIHenCpyC0OxyfztEVxDzes3OntQQ-087oopAih3cLpToziwgttwaQT75MX6sx6cHMAY1d6QUW49_GKAV-pghuZGFeW-areEong42KqPA86Bv7uXH2ojE5G_5jXToqsYMxpwzSQhxTqNXy6vzEq80JFG0wAE1P2qo3WhzGK0ly9pkk81eIlZseToGpymqljMgPsCr9jUE5HaS6Z1IrmWU2FpheGyKXRvjL9NKs62CY7ds2vPLwg1ezDPUU0EvCvDKLirOW2s9uIgEiX0RS2u2gN2n73-inYq61fcsxE1QgL0XuOM7KjVx07ytHjYfVEPYsCq7m05y58nhid326FpFwqhWLuE_i0QtLptAx62sJfDn6AUR0apEo2-GbdI1PMavxTuG91RHYkLSjgCQgmQ%3D%3D)
---
| | | |
My name is Nikki Haley. **[I wanted to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. After you get to know more about me, I hope you'll consider joining my team today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e045fefe0ca74e29a10fbde23c2325e2&_e=dXYdyJxxo-k4zSwx8CyQ5p-EUNAw4qhBNjtSb4liySYOqW47zruCPclaykQtRuGMrGJojnoQAP6tQAjqPi9u0wyw7nqg3Q7O5tzhBuIH19zTpg7NTdgXhgKCHqIcVRCQ3EPitgemBR0BJJhCpYE74l_ajgQZPrKgxZMY1pOyPFAoMr3zzOrUgpbU51nBnDLwrzEMdSnFD9VMZST1kTgZBQlniet6SdrNYSaV0SyZ9aPAHCHAbQoLFNab3zVRIIGYJ5nIHenCpyC0OxyfztEVxDzes3OntQQ-087oopAih3cLpToziwgttwaQT75MX6sx6cHMAY1d6QUW49_GKAV-pghuZGFeW-areEong42KqPA86Bv7uXH2ojE5G_5jXToqsYMxpwzSQhxTqNXy6vzEq80JFG0wAE1P2qo3WhzGK0ly9pkk81eIlZseToGpymqljMgPsCr9jUE5HaS6Z1IrmWU2FpheGyKXRvjL9NKs62CY7ds2vPLwg1ezDPUU0EvC6XlG7MKbxP6Ax1x9I8eG22nKLoP4GoF-kj0mgmfCcSosXdOh5tOBrFqKfE5BbbQFUc6jkAmrzZWuz1zh1vPhtQbAFaiV0rECIJ4LkLbmCBoR46E1ujpOl5c50YDy2_ITHnzf_LqXKOQQvY5LDGf-7g%3D%3D "I wanted to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. After you get to know more about me, I hope you’ll consider joining my team today.")**

I'm the proud daughter of legal immigrants. We were the only Indian family in our small, rural southern town. My dad wore a turban. He still does to this day. My mom wore a sari. Nobody knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. I was a brown girl in a black-and-white world.
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e045fefe0ca74e29a10fbde23c2325e2&_e=dXYdyJxxo-k4zSwx8CyQ5p-EUNAw4qhBNjtSb4liySYOqW47zruCPclaykQtRuGMrGJojnoQAP6tQAjqPi9u0wyw7nqg3Q7O5tzhBuIH19zTpg7NTdgXhgKCHqIcVRCQ3EPitgemBR0BJJhCpYE74l_ajgQZPrKgxZMY1pOyPFAoMr3zzOrUgpbU51nBnDLwrzEMdSnFD9VMZST1kTgZBQlniet6SdrNYSaV0SyZ9aPAHCHAbQoLFNab3zVRIIGYJ5nIHenCpyC0OxyfztEVxDzes3OntQQ-087oopAih3cLpToziwgttwaQT75MX6sx6cHMAY1d6QUW49_GKAV-pghuZGFeW-areEong42KqPA86Bv7uXH2ojE5G_5jXToqsYMxpwzSQhxTqNXy6vzEq80JFG0wAE1P2qo3WhzGK0ly9pkk81eIlZseToGpymqljMgPsCr9jUE5HaS6Z1IrmWU2FpheGyKXRvjL9NKs62CY7ds2vPLwg1ezDPUU0EvCeNaKj4UpPY3hubKKYalgVUIDtIW4FoZp5r9ITK877UbKrgdyqXCPUeZe0cTsC896x0-XTgd8JtLt1p_5HZgRrp05fFRf0oGM97ZWcoqE-FevpfP1y7zDWW14y0t5z3Zb6qY9sTQp4OoMVvIm397KsQ%3D%3D)
---
Every day, my family faced stares, whispers, suspicion, and exclusion. Not every day was great. But every day was better than the one before.
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e045fefe0ca74e29a10fbde23c2325e2&_e=dXYdyJxxo-k4zSwx8CyQ5p-EUNAw4qhBNjtSb4liySYOqW47zruCPclaykQtRuGMrGJojnoQAP6tQAjqPi9u0wyw7nqg3Q7O5tzhBuIH19zTpg7NTdgXhgKCHqIcVRCQ3EPitgemBR0BJJhCpYE74l_ajgQZPrKgxZMY1pOyPFAoMr3zzOrUgpbU51nBnDLwrzEMdSnFD9VMZST1kTgZBQlniet6SdrNYSaV0SyZ9aPAHCHAbQoLFNab3zVRIIGYJ5nIHenCpyC0OxyfztEVxDzes3OntQQ-087oopAih3cLpToziwgttwaQT75MX6sx6cHMAY1d6QUW49_GKAV-pghuZGFeW-areEong42KqPA86Bv7uXH2ojE5G_5jXToqsYMxpwzSQhxTqNXy6vzEq80JFG0wAE1P2qo3WhzGK0ly9pkk81eIlZseToGpymqljMgPsCr9jUE5HaS6Z1IrmWU2FpheGyKXRvjL9NKs62CY7ds2vPLwg1ezDPUU0EvCOUuvFUqTjmla00wac3ENLU54ST98-R5MxL4zgQY_BxHwPZw-c1Z7dZgLqh_LtqrbVtU4cTrtjiACX1mbNoEePHvAE1Hw0gLBZXK5kkQ8Vjl86LngmFKsfDhZPUic7nk4eOjASxX90qJ8GYA9D7Kdmg%3D%3D)
---
|
I started doing the books at my mom's store when I was just 13. After graduating from Clemson with an accounting degree and working in the corporate world, I came back to the family store.

I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for the government to take it away. When I mentioned my frustrations to my mom, she said: "Don't complain. Do something about it."
So I did. I ran for the state legislature. It wasn't easy.
---
I was running against a 30-year incumbent. No one said I had a shot.

A week before the primary, I was polling at 15 percent. But together, we fueled a grassroots campaign, took on the status quo, and won. Then, I immediately got to work for the people of my state.

After I served in the state legislature, I ran for governor. I was the underdog. I was the least funded, and least known GOP candidate in the race. But together, we won. Then we cut taxes, created thousands of jobs, and revitalized our economy.
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e045fefe0ca74e29a10fbde23c2325e2&_e=dXYdyJxxo-k4zSwx8CyQ5p-EUNAw4qhBNjtSb4liySYOqW47zruCPclaykQtRuGMrGJojnoQAP6tQAjqPi9u0wyw7nqg3Q7O5tzhBuIH19zTpg7NTdgXhgKCHqIcVRCQ3EPitgemBR0BJJhCpYE74l_ajgQZPrKgxZMY1pOyPFAoMr3zzOrUgpbU51nBnDLwrzEMdSnFD9VMZST1kTgZBQlniet6SdrNYSaV0SyZ9aPAHCHAbQoLFNab3zVRIIGYJ5nIHenCpyC0OxyfztEVxDzes3OntQQ-087oopAih3cLpToziwgttwaQT75MX6sx6cHMAY1d6QUW49_GKAV-pghuZGFeW-areEong42KqPA86Bv7uXH2ojE5G_5jXToqsYMxpwzSQhxTqNXy6vzEq80JFG0wAE1P2qo3WhzGK0ly9pkk81eIlZseToGpymqljMgPsCr9jUE5HaS6Z1IrmWU2FpheGyKXRvjL9NKs62CY7ds2vPLwg1ezDPUU0EvChqoIn8HgtxZJdjaP9o1X-dc3Wpr7N-BVjd6DTCpaZ_CkQk5MvrZxgLxzI48rgtEQyuqAGvxQQJAZHFWWjqHDiewiGtDH1gir72wzNafznOvOrr945TCsIV9Yvunm0fn5cD1Z86liBWU7akJUqK16gA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e045fefe0ca74e29a10fbde23c2325e2&_e=dXYdyJxxo-k4zSwx8CyQ5p-EUNAw4qhBNjtSb4liySYOqW47zruCPclaykQtRuGMrGJojnoQAP6tQAjqPi9u0wyw7nqg3Q7O5tzhBuIH19zTpg7NTdgXhgKCHqIcVRCQ3EPitgemBR0BJJhCpYE74l_ajgQZPrKgxZMY1pOyPFAoMr3zzOrUgpbU51nBnDLwrzEMdSnFD9VMZST1kTgZBQlniet6SdrNYSaV0SyZ9aPAHCHAbQoLFNab3zVRIIGYJ5nIHenCpyC0OxyfztEVxDzes3OntQQ-087oopAih3cLpToziwgttwaQT75MX6sx6cHMAY1d6QUW49_GKAV-pghuZGFeW-areEong42KqPA86Bv7uXH2ojE5G_5jXToqsYMxpwzSQhxTqNXy6vzEq80JFG0wAE1P2qo3WhzGK0ly9pkk81eIlZseToGpymqljMgPsCr9jUE5HaS6Z1IrmWU2FpheGyKXRvjL9NKs62CY7ds2vPLwg1ezDPUU0EvCNziPJFAzlGKKpmeipq1F_88cGXM0weaDIvdS4MpJFLaHvwGSmPMbCFAW_7M4Dcor2pn7VO1JH4IaRSbX1DTSiUfD5Lp6XuKv2l3Rt0x_Kzr8VuZKy8ul2GXZBCambI-q1ksuw_Ydw-AdaF74uN-z8Q%3D%3D)
---
Then, I was proud to serve our country at the United Nations. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

After I left the UN, I started a grassroots movement to stand for America. I crisscrossed the country to endorse, advise, and financially support more than 60 strong conservative candidates.
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e045fefe0ca74e29a10fbde23c2325e2&_e=dXYdyJxxo-k4zSwx8CyQ5p-EUNAw4qhBNjtSb4liySYOqW47zruCPclaykQtRuGMrGJojnoQAP6tQAjqPi9u0wyw7nqg3Q7O5tzhBuIH19zTpg7NTdgXhgKCHqIcVRCQ3EPitgemBR0BJJhCpYE74l_ajgQZPrKgxZMY1pOyPFAoMr3zzOrUgpbU51nBnDLwrzEMdSnFD9VMZST1kTgZBQlniet6SdrNYSaV0SyZ9aPAHCHAbQoLFNab3zVRIIGYJ5nIHenCpyC0OxyfztEVxDzes3OntQQ-087oopAih3cLpToziwgttwaQT75MX6sx6cHMAY1d6QUW49_GKAV-pghuZGFeW-areEong42KqPA86Bv7uXH2ojE5G_5jXToqsYMxpwzSQhxTqNXy6vzEq80JFG0wAE1P2qo3WhzGK0ly9pkk81eIlZseToGpymqljMgPsCr9jUE5HaS6Z1IrmWU2FpheGyKXRvjL9NKs62CY7ds2vPLwg1ezDPUU0EvCc0N8xQvPNTJNcBBb9Zi0aBWRmU5-2X2saQPLbOPVhntkiBB17PqGtO9qQvARB8bPNJ3SzAhf1aHv2AkPuJvBowFphBR3LnF1Qw4bOT0954YP3NDF12AESCagehJAWDeqVAUx_MWx4qGqz52vzG8ibQ%3D%3D)
---
| _**So who am I?**_

I am a proud American. I am the proud daughter of Indian immigrants and a proud military wife. I am a conservative. I am a mom. And soon a mother-in law! I am a runner. I am an unabashed Clemson Tigers fan. I've served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America's ambassador to the United Nations...and I'm a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country.
---
**[And now, I am running to be your next President of the United States.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e045fefe0ca74e29a10fbde23c2325e2&_e=dXYdyJxxo-k4zSwx8CyQ5p-EUNAw4qhBNjtSb4liySYOqW47zruCPclaykQtRuGMrGJojnoQAP6tQAjqPi9u0wyw7nqg3Q7O5tzhBuIH19zTpg7NTdgXhgKCHqIcVRCQ3EPitgemBR0BJJhCpYE74l_ajgQZPrKgxZMY1pOyPFAoMr3zzOrUgpbU51nBnDLwrzEMdSnFD9VMZST1kTgZBQlniet6SdrNYSaV0SyZ9aPAHCHAbQoLFNab3zVRIIGYJ5nIHenCpyC0OxyfztEVxDzes3OntQQ-087oopAih3cLpToziwgttwaQT75MX6sx6cHMAY1d6QUW49_GKAV-pghuZGFeW-areEong42KqPA86Bv7uXH2ojE5G_5jXToqsYMxpwzSQhxTqNXy6vzEq80JFG0wAE1P2qo3WhzGK0ly9pkk81eIlZseToGpymqljMgPsCr9jUE5HaS6Z1IrmWU2FpheGyKXRvjL9NKs62CY7ds2vPLwg1ezDPUU0EvCJ1ss801VIWGGIzpJNuHM9_o9hx4zBllFRySgecoGcbbQOBPDzMLSHowrCrdF_EXwwV_wAQxyWG266nfqKi5Q3xeKj9Yg9S8hjWrMKIjJLjTTfAAUled9mGhfNicYOZE3Mn9REW0m1jgZ8NYtVHLAFw%3D%3D "And now, I am running to be your next President of the United States.")**
---

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e045fefe0ca74e29a10fbde23c2325e2&_e=dXYdyJxxo-k4zSwx8CyQ5p-EUNAw4qhBNjtSb4liySYOqW47zruCPclaykQtRuGMrGJojnoQAP6tQAjqPi9u0wyw7nqg3Q7O5tzhBuIH19wrg0ywdsSipNn7ouTc73tTnuPOXw2PAxoOmNEDxs9LyWWSM1Rpw413TdkB-atmVrE6ToDBcgYPQC0J58-7rrvzSCbOfjC2wj2UWYzRikC8a-wNoqyP2qdU8l3f48jihof8aejW1y0qaJmAhZfLRBKWqsG_kaPxPDIEY18W6EEV2A%3D%3D)
---

We need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people.

I hope you will join me as I embark on this journey and fight for our country.

Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She's served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America's ambassador to the United Nations...and she's a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country.

Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people.

clean_body: I wanted to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. | | | | | | | | | | My name is Nikki Haley. "I wanted to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. After you get to know more about me, I hope you’ll consider joining my team today." I'm the proud daughter of legal immigrants. We were the only Indian family in our small, rural southern town. My dad wore a turban. He still does to this day. My mom wore a sari. Nobody knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. I was a brown girl in a black-and-white world. | | Every day, my family faced stares, whispers, suspicion, and exclusion. Not every day was great. But every day was better than the one before. | | | | | I started doing the books at my mom's store when I was just 13. After graduating from Clemson with an accounting degree and working in the corporate world, I came back to the family store. I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for the government to take it away. When I mentioned my frustrations to my mom, she said: "Don't complain. Do something about it." So I did. I ran for the state legislature. It wasn't easy. I was running against a 30-year incumbent. No one said I had a shot. A week before the primary, I was polling at 15 percent. But together, we fueled a grassroots campaign, took on the status quo, and won. Then, I immediately got to work for the people of my state. After I served in the state legislature, I ran for governor. I was the underdog. I was the least funded, and least known GOP candidate in the race. But together, we won. Then we cut taxes, created thousands of jobs, and revitalized our economy. | | | | | | Then, I was proud to serve our country at the United Nations. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. After I left the UN, I started a grassroots movement to stand for America. I crisscrossed the country to endorse, advise, and financially support more than 60 strong conservative candidates. | | | | | So who am I? I am a proud American. I am the proud daughter of Indian immigrants and a proud military wife. I am a conservative. I am a mom. And soon a mother-in law! I am a runner. I am an unabashed Clemson Tigers fan. I've served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America's ambassador to the United Nations...and I'm a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country. "And now, I am running to be your next President of the United States." | We need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people. I hope you will join me as I embark on this journey and fight for our country. "If you’d like to join my team and help me in this fight, I’m humbly asking for your support today." My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! All of our merchandise is made in America. She's served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America's ambassador to the United Nations...and she's a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country. Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people. body:

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=4d25f59a7a704665a31220d36ef63326&_e=u4L2g9flA_ja0UAZUJ4tukMuflUVMvUD-ZTH8beLfdO_gqc4yWZKo8mIIP1ONWB1z_7_2x0FHddpnbd4MArF-rwY8kD_pJUpXVa5cMrLq2f8YsnuBud9ku5waZo8gXNXaBCv7vkGTmB7T2eqsr_r7-cZk8dJIhz3t8Luka5XczpQhong8KjkK2zLnqY6lZuHtZSrAoxx9nJ80v_QE2ypeR4ZdIzi73uzqB_wmRrTlo4dQyt-YJ392eP_dCtFb6g6mwj0ppr-bhNjCZFmANntj_gowze2834ADeKUwNcd4gajF9P1iI0izqgjLl2vm0txqllshAZv-3mzSP7AXg7qc1p8l0oZZxxcVaMQ17y20aaPavBdc_ueXzvQbKpdYytenipiqfiyZ5v7NcAUZ40-gJAFhNpIEkF0DSZgl_5ASDXkQTES4uqqPsSI2p8KbQIPRKAuLQw9Mi_Fd5Gw4AkejwIhYHMQIgurhVeKSsM0f8hnFleakIIL95pN-JCTBpf5ggWPHd87Ye245TK14jBsIw%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,

As your Senator, I am dedicated to representing the interests of the great state of Iowa. Today I'm writing you to share some of the initiatives I have been working on to protect and support our state.

**_[Donate now to protect Iowa!](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=4d25f59a7a704665a31220d36ef63326&_e=u4L2g9flA_ja0UAZUJ4tukMuflUVMvUD-ZTH8beLfdO_gqc4yWZKo8mIIP1ONWB1z_7_2x0FHddpnbd4MArF-rwY8kD_pJUpXVa5cMrLq2f8YsnuBud9ku5waZo8gXNXaBCv7vkGTmB7T2eqsr_r7-cZk8dJIhz3t8Luka5XczpQhong8KjkK2zLnqY6lZuHtZSrAoxx9nJ80v_QE2ypeR4ZdIzi73uzqB_wmRrTlo4dQyt-YJ392eP_dCtFb6g6mwj0ppr-bhNjCZFmANntj_gowze2834ADeKUwNcd4gajF9P1iI0izqgjLl2vm0txqllshAZv-3mzSP7AXg7qc1p8l0oZZxxcVaMQ17y20aaPavBdc_ueXzvQbKpdYyteTv0PUDelLvUNFaBHSNUsfM8ZsvzSWlLoxkzpJvi7In7hXMB8uPJj12I6iUJ2w4K2oGKa4z9niHoUIXxkVpblENVda7LsB0yFE1IWifKyx9q3Rdzoxd_-oun9bx9VLh4VvGYySwNyrnZOdBjAGpPoBA%3D%3D)_**

One of my top priorities is ensuring that Iowa farmers and producers have the resources and support they need to succeed. This includes fighting for fair trade deals, supporting renewable energy, and investing in infrastructure projects that will benefit our rural communities.

I am also committed to improving access to quality healthcare for all Iowans. This means working to lower the cost of prescription drugs, protecting access to essential health services, and expanding rural access to telehealth technology.

**_[Donate now to protect Iowa!](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=4d25f59a7a704665a31220d36ef63326&_e=u4L2g9flA_ja0UAZUJ4tukMuflUVMvUD-ZTH8beLfdO_gqc4yWZKo8mIIP1ONWB1z_7_2x0FHddpnbd4MArF-rwY8kD_pJUpXVa5cMrLq2f8YsnuBud9ku5waZo8gXNXaBCv7vkGTmB7T2eqsr_r7-cZk8dJIhz3t8Luka5XczpQhong8KjkK2zLnqY6lZuHtZSrAoxx9nJ80v_QE2ypeR4ZdIzi73uzqB_wmRrTlo4dQyt-YJ392eP_dCtFb6g6mwj0ppr-bhNjCZFmANntj_gowze2834ADeKUwNcd4gajF9P1iI0izqgjLl2vm0txqllshAZv-3mzSP7AXg7qc1p8l0oZZxxcVaMQ17y20aaPavBdc_ueXzvQbKpdYyteBNmUf5aKQt3MAwoVGsfamELx2_LOKwU2zoHsZtmPN-dXi0McYFILOaHzc0eO1Ouhw-En1mB9pfEORtInM01vh31PiaXH_dgg2W84dC9Q0p08sZ7dl6B3vti8mn_kxY3XFwMP-d7H32dnUFasjV4NnA%3D%3D)_**

Finally, I am committed to keeping our communities safe and secure. This includes supporting law enforcement and first responders, as well as working to reduce crime and improve public safety.

**As your Senator, I will always work tirelessly to protect the interests of Iowa and ensure that our state remains a great place to live, work, and raise a family. If you have any concerns or ideas you would like to share, please don't hesitate to let me know.**

**_[Thank you for your continued support and trust in me as your Senator. Donate now to protect Iowa!](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=4d25f59a7a704665a31220d36ef63326&_e=u4L2g9flA_ja0UAZUJ4tukMuflUVMvUD-ZTH8beLfdO_gqc4yWZKo8mIIP1ONWB1z_7_2x0FHddpnbd4MArF-rwY8kD_pJUpXVa5cMrLq2f8YsnuBud9ku5waZo8gXNXaBCv7vkGTmB7T2eqsr_r7-cZk8dJIhz3t8Luka5XczpQhong8KjkK2zLnqY6lZuHtZSrAoxx9nJ80v_QE2ypeR4ZdIzi73uzqB_wmRrTlo4dQyt-YJ392eP_dCtFb6g6mwj0ppr-bhNjCZFmANntj_gowze2834ADeKUwNcd4gajF9P1iI0izqgjLl2vm0txqllshAZv-3mzSP7AXg7qc1p8l0oZZxxcVaMQ17y20aaPavBdc_ueXzvQbKpdYyter9lUQRYfcP19iyCBFfSg4-W-_pMIczxw9qG4VvU0fajVaKyv-sjA_B28quEdqQZauY3soKMo1Zy-t1wZwY4vYOGJQTM0gqOKXa2oUo1vaKX1FnVYkDK0Rn-94JUqxopYTVRPvmjPDCnNwD1X9NGR5Q%3D%3D)_**

Sincerely,

[](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=4d25f59a7a704665a31220d36ef63326&_e=u4L2g9flA_ja0UAZUJ4tukMuflUVMvUD-ZTH8beLfdO_gqc4yWZKo8mIIP1ONWB1z_7_2x0FHddpnbd4MArF-rwY8kD_pJUpXVa5cMrLq2f8YsnuBud9ku5waZo8gXNXaBCv7vkGTmB7T2eqsr_r7-cZk8dJIhz3t8Luka5XczpQhong8KjkK2zLnqY6lZuHtZSrAoxx9nJ80v_QE2ypeR4ZdIzi73uzqB_wmRrTlo4dQyt-YJ392eP_dCtFb6g6mwj0ppr-bhNjCZFmANntj_gowze2834ADeKUwNcd4gajF9P1iI0izqgjLl2vm0txqllshAZv-3mzSP7AXg7qc1p8l0oZZxxcVaMQ17y20aaPavBdc_ueXzvQbKpdYyteidBuKw5SuHFgSaLP9YelHzn_8DBkoTLVDbA2IxSS_RFdQSaLPXw9iJxtMRN8roc_Ub6ppJ20-WxC3CBMkauZqBvRCnmr0NxW1rj6kgwmfq7RXT9WvGeXfZnxyi3hcraVNAL97Kisp05ydXnIErf77g%3D%3D)

He thought the war would end quickly, and that the world would do nothing. He was wrong. **The Ukrainian people held the line, and America and its allies stood strong alongside them.** Together, we showed Putin and tyrants across the globe that we will fight for democracy. For the past year, the Ukrainian people have shown us the meaning of bravery. Against a lawless enemy who imagined victory as inevitable, Ukrainians held firm and inspired the world with their courage. They not only stalled Putin’s unprovoked attack, _they're pushing it backwards._ Meanwhile, America has led a determined and growing alliance of democracies to defend Ukrainian freedom. On a bipartisan basis, we have acted to provide billions of dollars to help Ukrainians fight back and rebuild; weaken Russia’s economy; strengthen NATO; and make Putin and his oligarchs pay a price. **Last winter, we passed my bill to use the funds from seized Russian yachts and other ill-gotten assets to support relief and recovery in Ukraine. Thanks in part to you and this team, we’re holding Russian oligarchs accountable and helping Ukraine rebuild.** Over the coming months, I will continue doing everything I can to support the brave people of Ukraine. I will keep working to advance liberty and justice and to hold the enemies of democracy, foreign or domestic, accountable. The road ahead will be difficult, but one year later, we can say this: Vladimir Putin is weaker. NATO is stronger. And our resolve to fight for democracy, in Ukraine and across the globe, is unwavering. [**Please chip in today so we can continue fighting for democracy at home and abroad. clean_body: | = = One year ago today, Vladimir Putin invaded Ukraine. He thought the war would end quickly, and that the world would do nothing. He was wrong. The Ukrainian people held the line, and America and its allies stood strong alongside them. Together, we showed Putin and tyrants across the globe that we will fight for democracy. For the past year, the Ukrainian people have shown us the meaning of bravery. Against a lawless enemy who imagined victory as inevitable, Ukrainians held firm and inspired the world with their courage. They not only stalled Putin’s unprovoked attack, they're pushing it backwards. Meanwhile, America has led a determined and growing alliance of democracies to defend Ukrainian freedom. On a bipartisan basis, we have acted to provide billions of dollars to help Ukrainians fight back and rebuild; weaken Russia’s economy; strengthen NATO; and make Putin and his oligarchs pay a price. Last winter, we passed my bill to use the funds from seized Russian yachts and other ill-gotten assets to support relief and recovery in Ukraine. Thanks in part to you and this team, we’re holding Russian oligarchs accountable and helping Ukraine rebuild. Over the coming months, I will continue doing everything I can to support the brave people of Ukraine. I will keep working to advance liberty and justice and to hold the enemies of democracy, foreign or domestic, accountable. The road ahead will be difficult, but one year later, we can say this: Vladimir Putin is weaker. NATO is stronger. And our resolve to fight for democracy, in Ukraine and across the globe, is unwavering. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Together, let’s continue the work of supporting Ukraine and upholding democracy worldwide. As President Biden said, Ukraine will never be a victory for Russia. Never. Thank you, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

subject: ALERT: Conservative News You Won't Want to Miss
body:
Updates on the lawsuits challenging Pritzker's Assault Weapons Ban and more shocking discoveries about GOP politicians coordinating with Democrats.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/e6a3ad96913f/alert-conservative-news-you-wont-want-to-miss?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

ICYMI: our latest news and top stories from this week. Sign up today (https://www.illinoisreview.com/switching-plans-wizard?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) so that you never miss our breaking news!

Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau Supporting Local Candidate with Ties to Mike Madigan and Gery Chico (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/orland-park-mayor-keith-pekau-supporting-local-candidate-with-ties-to-mike-madigan-and-gery-chico.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

“A man is known by the company he keeps” is a profound quote often attributed to the Greek slave and storyteller, Aesop. And as Illinois Review learns more about the company that Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau keeps, the identity of who he is comes into focus. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/orland-park-mayor-keith-pekau-supporting-local-candidate-with-ties-to-mike-madigan-and-gery-chico.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/orland-park-mayor-keith-pekau-supporting-local-candidate-with-ties-to-mike-madigan-and-gery-chico.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Illinois Supreme Court Denies Consolidation of State Rep. Caulkins' Lawsuit Against Gov. Pritzker's Assault Weapons Ban with the DeVore Cases (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/illinois-supreme-court-denies-consolidation-of-state-rep-caulkins-lawsuit-against-gov-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-with-the-devore-cases.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Tuesday, State Rep. Dan Caulkins, Gov. JB Pritzker and Illinois Attorney General Kwame Raoul requested that the Illinois Supreme Court consolidate the three cases brought by former Republican AG candidate Thomas DeVore against Pritzker’s Assault Weapons Ban but keep their case out of it. On Thursday, the Illinois Supreme Court did just that. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/illinois-supreme-court-denies-consolidation-of-state-rep-caulkins-lawsuit-against-gov-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-with-the-devore-cases.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/illinois-supreme-court-denies-consolidation-of-state-rep-caulkins-lawsuit-against-gov-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-with-the-devore-cases.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

State Rep. Dan Caulkins Jumps the Gun on Pritzker Lawsuit, Seeks Summary Judgment on Equal Protection Violations (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/state-rep-dan-caulkins-jumps-the-gun-on-pritzker-lawsuit-seeks-summary-judgment-on-equal-protection-violations.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

As Illinois Review reported last month, State Rep. Dan Caulkins of Decatur had filed a lawsuit challenging Gov. JB Pritzker’s Assault Weapons Ban nearly identical to the three lawsuits filed by former Republican AG candidate Thomas DeVore.

With Temporary Restraining Orders granted in all four of the cases, DeVore recently moved to transfer and consolidate the cases before Effingham County Judge Joshua Morrison.

But in a surprising turn of events, counsel for Rep. Caulkins filed a two-paragraph opposition to DeVore’s consolidation motion yesterday with the Illinois Supreme Court. Joining with Gov. JB Pritzker and Attorney General Kwame Raoul, Rep. Caulkins is opposing consolidation on the basis that his case – while nearly identical to and filed after DeVore’s initial case – is procedurally different than DeVore’s three cases.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/state-rep-dan-caulkins-jumps-the-gun-on-pritzker-lawsuit-seeks-summary-judgment-on-equal-protection-violations.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y8p-mc6SwAU&t=631s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Publisher Scott Kaspar joins Addison Smith live on "In Focus" on One America News Network (OANN) to discuss recent developments in the state court challenges raised by former Republican AG candidate Thomas DeVore and State Rep. Dan Caulkins, Decatur, against Gov. JB Pritzker's Assault Weapons Ban.

Mayor Keith Pekau Playing Favorites, Hires Big Campaign Donor Who Also Donated to Lightfoot, to Develop Orland Park Land Deal Worth $253M (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/mayor-keith-pekau-playing-favorites-hires-big-campaign-donor-who-also-donated-to-lightfoot-to-develop-orland-park-land-deal-worth-253m.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
It pays to be friends with Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau, literally, as one local realty firm has discovered, when last March, Pekau and the village board voted in favor of signing a six-figure consulting agreement with one of the mayor’s biggest donors to develop village-owned property along one of Orland Park’s busiest corridors. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/mayor-keith-pekau-playing-favorites-hires-big-campaign-donor-who-also-donated-to-lightfoot-to-develop-orland-park-land-deal-worth-253m.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/mayor-keith-pekau-playing-favorites-hires-big-campaign-donor-who-also-donated-to-lightfoot-to-develop-orland-park-land-deal-worth-253m.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Dist. 92 Superintendent Tim Arnold Harasses and Intimidates Mother, Physically Blocks Her From Recording Public Meeting, as Student Test Scores Continue to Drop (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/dist-92-superintendent-tim-arnold-harasses-and-intimidates-mother-physically-blocks-her-from-recording-public-meeting-as-student-test-scores-continue-to-drop.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

During a recent public meeting with parents to discuss their children’s school curriculum, District 92 school superintendent Tim Arnold expresses frustration that a mother was recording his remarks on her cell phone by blocking her camera, in an unprecedented show of disrespect to a taxpaying citizen who helps fund his over $204,000 annual salary. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/dist-92-superintendent-tim-arnold-harasses-and-intimidates-mother-physically-blocks-her-from-recording-public-meeting-as-student-test-scores-continue-to-drop.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=ed431ce3e2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_24_05_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-ed431ce3e2-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: Blue Nevada
subject: new polling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, national Republicans are attacking Sen. Jacky Rosen (D-NV) with everything they’ve got, and she's counting on your urgent grassroots support to fight back. Here's why:
* With _FiveThirtyEight_ reporting that Senate control could once again come down to Nevada, **_The Washington Post_ is calling Jacky one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection.**

* The GOP flooded Nevada with over $55 MILLION last year to try and turn this battleground state red.

* New polling in Nevada shows Democrats and Republicans NECK AND NECK **– but right now, we're falling short of the $100,000 we need to fight back and pull ahead.**

**In 2022, the GOP lost Nevada by a _razor-thin_ margin – just 0.77% – making it the closest Senate race in the entire country.** **To defeat them and defend this Democratic seat, we MUST reach our $100,000 end-of-month goal. But time is ****running out to close the gap, which is why we're asking:**

* When the American people see Members of Congress trading stocks as they vote on major legislation that can move markets, it erodes the public trust.
* When the American people hear that after important briefings on issues like COVID-19 or the Russian invasion of Ukraine, Members of Congress have traded related stocks, it erodes the public trust.
* When Twitter accounts devoted to tracking politicians’ stock trading have more than one million followers who use that information to guide their stock purchases because they believe Members of Congress have inside information, it’s a striking condemnation of the current system and the need for reform.

The need for change is clear, and Abigail is proud to be on the frontlines advocating for reform that fortifies public trust in our government institutions.

Representatives are elected to look out for their constituents, not their financial portfolios. It’s really that simple.

With your support, Abigail can continue advocating for this crucial stock trading ban. clean_body: The need for change is clear, and Abigail is proud to be on the frontlines advocating for reform that fortifies public trust in our government institutions. | = | Peter, One of Abigail’s top priorities in office is to enact commonsense ethics reforms and ban Members of Congress, their spouses, and their dependent children from trading individual stocks. And public support for this straightforward reform is massive. = | = When the American people see Members of Congress trading stocks as they vote on major legislation that can move markets, it erodes the public trust. When the American people hear that after important briefings on issues like COVID-19 or the Russian invasion of Ukraine, Members of Congress have traded related stocks, it erodes the public trust. When Twitter accounts devoted to tracking politicians’ stock trading have more than one million followers who use that information to guide their stock purchases because they believe Members of Congress have inside information, it’s a striking condemnation of the current system and the need for reform. The need for change is clear, and Abigail is proud to be on the frontlines advocating for reform that fortifies public trust in our government institutions. Representatives are elected to look out for their constituents, not their financial portfolios. It’s really that simple. With your support, Abigail can continue advocating for this crucial stock trading ban. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, sincerely, Team Spanberger | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg , VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together.
