name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Should Dr. Ben Carson Be Canceled?
body:
Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture."

|
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5074d88549b8447fa1beb1ce97576a88&_e=A5ctOEE_ECuSmWOC7s6PYRnHw2iu6jzl7lfnwg7ulcd79tJPw4naBy9Mraknniu2-Nezs84RnFfn-iQ7EXeJC9nIL32F8tWER7CVC86eso7qnnT4M3uynWzKDV08OF4H9jeZ9QPU44eCbpS2qvYLGMZ3yrjY9g3lTZd6H0qIPUWcnFkYsrUtpLs2LI9520y684IWLN8NfbGbfI8Kh-sNBup_z6d9XsJ8mUbs2RsPDcano4nnWi6s5WtP56XEISrh2je0EKvv7RboIwr7ckNHQQnwSWIBXmVCx4d_DgPh4nlbIIVblGVcW1EKHImNGHfCcQDHehJJBZorsCzg5QrI3SgZ1IOliMQf2Jp_s956nAIO1J6mbXPIYBvKUKiAEqyt_lrcrcFzbzbjTbGtoa5CppzievhcTZVrxZ_NAc3NQeI%3D)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

"Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_" What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?"_

And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country.

And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5074d88549b8447fa1beb1ce97576a88&_e=A5ctOEE_ECuSmWOC7s6PYRnHw2iu6jzl7lfnwg7ulcd79tJPw4naBy9Mraknniu2-Nezs84RnFfn-iQ7EXeJC9nIL32F8tWER7CVC86eso7qnnT4M3uynWzKDV08OF4H9jeZ9QPU44eCbpS2qvYLGMZ3yrjY9g3lTZd6H0qIPUWcnFkYsrUtpLs2LI9520y684IWLN8NfbGbfI8Kh-sNBup_z6d9XsJ8mUbs2RsPDcano4nnWi6s5WtP56XEISrh2je0EKvv7RboIwr7ckNHQc4_Dfy_FHy1skzasK80zhxpAumUn0mgtpCGN9ofTi6dsQwL5RmzujAEYEonz5hSzUr4uK2kNwPYUNXbvLv6jqWxMGZV0XCO-KOQMLfdNG1F4R3Pj72tQr7fYspucB3GESD7GMgbyGRixTq8NRByNMc%3D)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country."

If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here's the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5074d88549b8447fa1beb1ce97576a88&_e=A5ctOEE_ECuSmWOC7s6PYRnHw2iu6jzl7lfnwg7ulcd79tJPw4naBy9Mraknniu2-Nezs84RnFfn-iQ7EXeJC9nIL32F8tWER7CVC86eso7qnnT4M3uynWzKDV08OF4H9jeZ9QPU44eCbpS2qvYLGMZ3yrjY9g3lTZd6H0qIPUWcnFkYsrUtpLs2LI9520y684IWLN8NfbGbfI8Kh-sNBup_z6d9XsJ8mUbs2RsPDcano4nnWi6s5WtP56XEISrh2je0EKvv7RboIwr7ckNHQR05EKsnG2YTWA7DsW5Aw7sCVdb8wX8m0qCcWECZx0y7Q7tLVRkcWvnWXD1g-qeSCL-pfqLC-oZDD1L5fb5F5JVTYuOWeiV6UxJ6juKx0IKQ2XaIvHayGiquOUH2G_pweJOMhTVaU9QlhFQrgunZnY8%3D)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Andrew D. Hughes
Executive Director & CEO
American Cornerstone Institute

clean_body: Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." | | | | | Fellow Patriot, Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped. This is something he has experienced firsthand. As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration! These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous. Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country. "Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them. The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going. But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI): " What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?" And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country. And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our National Statement Against Cancel Culture that you can review and then co-sign. Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American. And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans. He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country." If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's National Statement Against Cancel Culture. Here's the link again for you: Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country. I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you! Sincerely, Andrew D. Hughes Executive Director & CEO American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. | Team – Ever since the GOP took over the House, Republicans have been doing everything they can to roll back our rights and freedoms.

_**Right now, Republicans are trying to:**_
❌ Lower taxes for the ultra-wealthy and raise them for the middle class
❌ Gut Social Security
❌ Roll back reproductive freedoms

_**Bottom line: A GOP majority is dangerous for working families across the country, so it’s up to us to take back the House.**_ [**That’s why we need your help today. We must protect every Democratic seat in 2024 to prevent MAGA Republicans from destroying the progress Democrats have made. body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1ecb0be9742b443390c2b6d804af505b&_e=C8FZH_GweagOuc4CHIrFyiBl-dDQABx6N-s0wZc5CND2Z1aGqACQlsNgcCS9FV2aLbxkEIJ9Y7UzZW6_Ml6wIbNaQ2k2aoqr9CvZ_kSqnGmYPKsiBoPu-N8iiFwAJK-Cv1LqEMzFXz_GUermT1HFe-OwUKC28QmzhPJWe3ovuLmGFTrkP3VdgIDuKnW-zqQ35ejjzmNlAa4AZei2tijNYVmcKQJw_-1uE0G-_3tgePla9PQWZSEu8m5deokqRM86KEowbFWdKsvdro19zSavUhpj6ozg_6PYHD_jto_ON865W3vxG_nXGj-LCZWLhD27jXsCbZV6TWQblFIvRKd4w4D-VPCvxUvA7vLP-7-bNH8%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | **What’s In Our Skies 🛸**
---
| |
---
Don’t get me wrong, I think how the U.S. handled the Chinese spy balloon was an embarrassing disaster for our country. It was the tip of the iceberg that showed how [compromised and broken](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1ecb0be9742b443390c2b6d804af505b&_e=C8FZH_GweagOuc4CHIrFyrPtvXFhfzyEvjuUMXO1SOESwVFvtG2p--kXfVkhvtNfnVmo2LJ2GLj4Ao9BoIJ6k8in4FUfSfivFsM0FQqg75f3VVHynPpa7u4zkkIay11Zt_edA98V2b7MC9JrIZBB5jNeUJovQpeddECRmRgRjgXpi9cS4p55aH-CNxlCQR7j2IE2jmezLJbS6Nb0pCD8xQ%3D%3D) our military, and executive branch have become under President Biden and General Milley. But one glimmer of good that has come out of this national security fiasco is that Americans are now paying more [attention](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1ecb0be9742b443390c2b6d804af505b&_e=C8FZH_GweagOuc4CHIrFykneOjSXiuIjziKqyFziyUrTZDP5lXnstibhrcMQUa3tDwF6eJKohhN-6j7wsG_7oA8BI-rw607xVa4AZ_S2OXIFiLymZcmm9m3rcwSF_CCygYzbUg2NZz8v1v7a_Kp8O-jPkp6OYPQKicCbcBbt54oFtqcG3SiEEysNgrsj8l_ocGl0txubhqq5FOwDsqO6tZJSaNmBK6qXk_YBnaciEHctGnzKkt8vQZC46A3yzRhCGTcWxx02efyq33SFqkQEjg%3D%3D) to our skies—particularly to the very real presence of unidentified flying objects (UFOs). Just this week, another piece of the puzzle was [revealed](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1ecb0be9742b443390c2b6d804af505b&_e=C8FZH_GweagOuc4CHIrFygdTcpy_e_85lla4CY2eTcaFN7sxeSU2yPrBj5qNKFgqVtOcwD-Mzh630U3CnWxjl0pZoIydVA9EksVHHsjz2_XzL-Qbp4E9OlvoSkteuf639iI6VLxOQRN0n8o1jwaljyfhmtC3zC7aK9rA6Tpj52GdvzYW0Zl3qqLRPA0kJn_IosM9UoVOQjWebVLIQOPcumfI5BgdseVHz1hzIB2ugooMfFdao9ymFWnzzijtZURvm4gf6pUiuTR3H1SgCakEvaR_hFNzYStkvpcJXGy4NmcdR7rT7jcTHX2mqa3vGxv8) that the Pentagon is investigating UFOs that possibly turned off warheads. Reports show former U.S. Air Force personnel have testified that UFOs [interfered with nukes](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1ecb0be9742b443390c2b6d804af505b&_e=C8FZH_GweagOuc4CHIrFyneXq6Z0D-jOCq4vKt46DLtwu19bYKbgrHjUKlUJvmTqEGa3kX3R0Z3p3YjNrytH94rchtiHJsSok1AN2emnuDvZXeA2HfFBXXx4MAwDLMt5LlANcOTQMwfDUDkdfqF98OPmv98aKOK-s_MYPzzifcOZx7pWEwd-_5kIvHxfIpwuAhXbZHL1cr3vJGdrYpgTPcMHXL6s0730gBM5bDiuDxNEIVqIQMNbI6KRO8AUO2uBEQf-AFDM_jgqnd-UX1iMYLlWbI20cr2JkjbzmuUGKT6_NIzkknfYaIf17OXuevwc) in the 1960s. The officers reportedly disclosed to the government’s All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office that they had peculiar encounters with the objects near our U.S. military bases. You may be asking yourself, why are we just hearing about this now!? I’ve been saying this for [years](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1ecb0be9742b443390c2b6d804af505b&_e=C8FZH_GweagOuc4CHIrFyiXTHzsGdXDgRVQRHMN88zOsEWaQrd-C5yxTFKWQ9ZzZIO5hyrv7R_ORdJz0PgE7gk-GGToonrE6oKogIqNYOCWycP2n-wdL3kvPMiqonj3P37wVaASmwa1AgXbYHV0xHV4YaXkKQ6u49zQd7NuQy1SWHZ1yT_NuLRKxFeYCmcbhOhVUnMXbFn5WWYcvHpgaWMffIplxyUDtTcPCc8Dw0pknD0q1x12d2KMbtWanJTAoS0tOV4CFzS4Og9q6REDm7UzHKsj-_6vyLvojM20lDVw%3D), and I’m glad people are finally picking up on it: The government is not being straightforward with the American people about its UFO research. The Pentagon is funded on our dime. We have every right to know the discoveries behind made there, whatever they may be. But the more money that gets poured into these projects, the less transparency is afforded to Americans. President Biden has already done enough to embolden our enemies. At a time when they are not holding back their aggression, it's crucial we know what we’re up against. Clearly, good faith is not something we can bank on.
Today, and every day I try to shed light on the importance of transparency and doing right by taxpayers. So I hope this [heightened UFO awareness](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1ecb0be9742b443390c2b6d804af505b&_e=C8FZH_GweagOuc4CHIrFytpYTLxzl33lH23yMCeeocvW5duuU1LaY5g7BW0XfRhC9D0PiUo66yTz79KihsCCiLq7wGQgE-Qmdcg9twclvngAcm5qWQCcvABA7ageCu4GCxkiXZ8tKBenWlVeL4zH-fksm8SM6tPSdVi9_Bl6NtLztAPBq8grEcwSdEI0mN8XJTtKYTJoiyzSNTwEM18-Lst8407Svk77l6VWMQusC5A%3D) continues, and we can do just that!

_Image Courtesy of WBIR_ Anyone that knows me knows I am a dog lover. That’s why I am happy to report Mardi Growl is returning to downtown Knoxville on March 4. This impressive pet “paw-rade” is meant to raise money to help Young-Williams Animal Center through parade registrations and sponsorships. It also showcases all the bestest boys and girls throughout the community **🐶.**
For more information on the event, [see here.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=1ecb0be9742b443390c2b6d804af505b&_e=C8FZH_GweagOuc4CHIrFyoI6AfeypNwj3RsXKV6mWwTAQ-kcNgeTTL3LvqZDL81Lalxiqt9oNxKNMmHc1lG4kn2uZEEKzCI4UCjDHklhzUkFrTRw1Efa6e649Bawq7GZlQ3Vj8xa1rF21y0T_aOjxg2vXfmbuCjqxa_HypsYLP53gf1_9XU6Quyu0pGGxPjyJTG7Hk3iLEs1jXAEGCxMIW-a0-8Sw42qN9zov5HkJ3wEnwqmPrTphROePSXRtIGnmPMqhC5ChvehVw6-UDVRsS2e3_2o-jH9sgPmIXNSuhIPaJnjkLOraoe0dSxUwXKkJqWu83WxS3sIriysX20Mk3dIcxU2vQ55nZb194-Xx4S7RTDVDkziDQZxzE4xZlYf-1Z34h9XoI4mhojGBcJpAA%3D%3D)

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | | | What’s In Our Skies 🛸 | | Don’t get me wrong, I think how the U.S. handled the Chinese spy balloon was an embarrassing disaster for our country. It was the tip of the iceberg that showed how our military, and executive branch have become under President Biden and General Milley. But one glimmer of good that has come out of this national security fiasco is that Americans are now paying more to our skies—particularly to the very real presence of unidentified flying objects (UFOs). Just this week, another piece of the puzzle was that the Pentagon is investigating UFOs that possibly turned off warheads. Reports show former U.S. Air Force personnel have testified that UFOs in the 1960s. The officers reportedly disclosed to the government’s All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office that they had peculiar encounters with the objects near our U.S. military bases. You may be asking yourself, why are we just hearing about this now!? I’ve been saying this for , and I’m glad people are finally picking up on it: The government is not being straightforward with the American people about its UFO research. The Pentagon is funded on our dime. We have every right to know the discoveries behind made there, whatever they may be. But the more money that gets poured into these projects, the less transparency is afforded to Americans. President Biden has already done enough to embolden our enemies. At a time when they are not holding back their aggression, it's crucial we know what we’re up against. Clearly, good faith is not something we can bank on. Today, and every day I try to shed light on the importance of transparency and doing right by taxpayers. So I hope this continues, and we can do just that! | | | | | Mardi Growl 🐶 | | Image Courtesy of WBIR Anyone that knows me knows I am a dog lover. That’s why I am happy to report Mardi Growl is returning to downtown Knoxville on March 4. This impressive pet “paw-rade” is meant to raise money to help Young-Williams Animal Center through parade registrations and sponsorships. It also showcases all the bestest boys and girls throughout the community 🐶. For more information on the event, | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → Kids coming together 😇💪 () → Who’s here 😅🐶 (-) → Tennessee proud 🤝😄 () | | | | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

\- February 23, 2023 - ICYMI: President Donald J. Trump Delivers Hope, Supplies to East Palestine, Ohio

**Mar-a-Lago, FL** — On Wednesday, President Donald J. Trump visited East Palestine, Ohio to hear from the people of the community and deliver supplies to help those who are still affected by the train derailment. The East Palestine community warmly welcomed President Trump as [hundreds of people](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kV9vpCAUxT-NvmH04t8HH7Zj-2LStJvNdrcvhIE7IzOIruAa--kXrd2EQDgHzr38wDrJiwLKuCqTUNYgShAiVDXEQGOAFChABlF-ToFzLCEpZZZhEaTxokwkB8O1vLlp7sdIDH3Y1ZAniZBxJXiFZUzPAFWWyKy6ZJSit0Jdd86NNqDfAnjyY1mWSHKl195PPiSa7141uFi_8MkpoZEkSVEmGa289GMrRs6TMldLHrl15IVrtE4ZJK4bZsuNtOQ8OOdVsnCHU9S5Xgf0aXY961GquQ9og1u9APJNtMM8CfSiEZrxftTqsh6W8FuursabOxFKlFh7xcYJrZJoHPuEwG5sx8AkavUXJ8u6YURm59GnoWVuYOibZeNXs2zo1PBVZDDOR302QF4v3V08t-1JeJsZraQ3Xv6s97RryrfHXeyU9Aibn9_Xj1NyfX0Pp1qOi9Ja2Xz7netBsw-P59RB8RAA7PcAdvrQpg-_nvP2rW3I7-X2QZo8S5fNhZOf3Tri_6NHSnRQg6Bo_gEAH7vN) lined the streets to show their support.
|
---
_President Trump met with local officials and residents from East Palestine._
While on the ground in East Palestine, President Trump met with members of the police and fire departments, first responders, local and statewide officials, and residents to pledge his support for the community and to always fight on their behalf.
“We have told you loud and clear, you are not forgotten. You are not forgotten. We stand with you, we pray for you,” President Trump [said in a speech](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9UE2PmzAU_DVwSwQPY8yBQ3fTPTTVqun39mJ57ZfwIgMWNouSX1_D0kqW5ZnxG3sGm5xXFYisFnlqGtACtE6pgQyKDIBBAVDCnr8yUAoF5MKUJVYJy2bq92bolTXXME6d2-uhS9uGGSx5XrPzueY1aMi1ZqUo8jPXtagEpLZpQ3A-KT4k8BRXmCkEHJfxiEZU9jPdf3xbVB9UmHw85BwEE2XGs7pmEXAhkuIpehwgS4BPoZMdGpq6yGCnyG6kH6ZRYyR7baXqnKXzbZN0hIou_eKxJC12pG8dSTeiJ4N9kO_h5FWu8aRBS284etkODqWfXHRDL8MgUfkgnbLoA_Uoh5aGf48MfYhW7x_Yfe-40KfZvXyKsuwtmSi8nernj7HBL68r2ZJZYv38ers_5pfTn3RsjJvJWvJ8af2ypFur3uI0SfWQAKxzAGurcGQPv5_58dfxsHuZr_fdgZdsXlR4jHu4Ofx_dXPZb61BUh3-AgSIqT4) at the East Palestine Fire Department.

The East Palestine community warmly welcomed President Trump as lined the streets to show their support. | President Trump met with local officials and residents from East Palestine. While on the ground in East Palestine, President Trump met with members of the police and fire departments, first responders, local and statewide officials, and residents to pledge his support for the community and to always fight on their behalf. “We have told you loud and clear, you are not forgotten. [Biden and his administration] haven't been to the border yet, so why would they come to East Palestine?" When President Trump announced his trip to Ohio, Joe Biden was touring eastern Europe promising an additional $500 million in aid to Ukraine. The mayor of East Palestine Biden’s move “the biggest slap in the face.” “I sincerely hope that when your representatives and all of the politicians get here, including Biden, they get back from touring Ukraine, that he’s got some money left over,” at the East Palestine Fire Department. | President Trump receives a briefing from local first responders on the crisis in East Palestine During his visit, President Trump to Joe Biden, who has yet to visit East Palestine: “Get over here.” | | President Trump speaks to the community at the East Palestine Fire Department In an , one East Palestine resident thanked President Trump, “We don’t get this kind of spotlight here, and he brought it here.” FOX News’ with an East Palestine couple who said President Trump’s visit “definitely helped lift spirits” of residents. the efforts of Blue Line Moving’s John Rourke to partner with President Trump to deliver bottled water to the community. | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She's served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America's ambassador to the United Nations...and she's a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country.

Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people.

In order to build momentum and get Nikki's message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki's team and pitch in a donation today?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Thank you,

Team Haley

name: CaucusRoom
subject: President Who?
body:
IRS targeting Americans. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Friday!**
## **Here are some recent articles shared by CaucusRoom members. **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-y/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-j/) **President Who?** White House press secretary**[Karine Jean-Pierre slipped up during a Thursday press briefing, accidentally referring to President Biden as "President Obama."](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-t/)** **Trump Visits Ohio** **[Trump visited East Palestine to speak with local residents and deliver pallets of water](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-i/)** and cleaning supplies to the community more than two weeks after a Norfolk Southern train derailed. **Cause of the Derailment** The operators of the Norfolk Southern train involved in a toxic derailment in East Palestine, Ohio, earlier this month**[received a "critical audible alarm message instructing the crew to slow and stop the train to inspect a hot axle](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-d/)."** **That's Interesting** [**The mysterious death of an aide to President Bill Clinton with ties to Jeffrey Epstein has been officially ruled a suicide**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-h/) -- despite there being no sign of a weapon near the body. **Ramaswamy for President 2024** **[Tech entrepreneur Vivek Ramaswamy, who announced his candidacy for president Tuesday](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-k/) **during an interview with Tucker Carlson, has revealed what actions he intends to take on day one if elected president. _Are you a fan of Ramaswamy?_ **[Join the Ramaswamy For President group](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-u/).** **Transparency**** ** Florida Republican Rep. Byron Donalds **[is helping lead an effort to force the Biden administration to be more transparent](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-o/)** about how taxpayer-funded aid is being spent in Ukraine. **Racial Targeting** A conservative legal group is accusing the**[Biden administration of directing the Internal Revenue Service to audit more white and Asian Americans](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-x/) **in an effort to boost 'equity.'

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-m/)!**
* **[Show and Tell](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-c/).**
* We miss the**[mean tweets](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-q/).**
* **[Problem solved](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-a/).**
* I'm getting**[good at this](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-f/).**

**Watch the February Council Meeting by clicking the picture below.** [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-z/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-v/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-e/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-g/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
800 Washington Ave Ste C
Golden, CO 80401 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-qhuhdo-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-yd) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-u-qhuhdo-trhiujldw-yh/)
